name: Bulbasaur
flavor_text: There is a plant seed on its back right from the day this Pokémon is born. The seed slowly grows larger.

name: Ivysaur
flavor_text: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

name: Venusaur

attacks.name: Mega Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

attacks.name: Giant Bloom
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Caterpie

attacks.name: Find a Friend
attacks.effect: Put 1 random [G] Pokémon from your deck into your hand.

flavor_text: For protection, it releases a horrible stench from the antenna on its head to drive away enemies.

name: Metapod
flavor_text: It is waiting for the moment to evolve. At this stage, it can only harden, so it remains motionless to avoid attack.

name: Butterfree

ability.name: Ability: Powder Heal
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may heal 20 damage from each of your Pokémon.

flavor_text: In battle, it flaps its wings at great speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.

name: Weedle
flavor_text: Often found in forests and grasslands. It has a sharp, toxic barb of around two inches on top of its head.

name: Kakuna
flavor_text: Almost incapable of moving, this Pokémon can only harden its shell to protect itself when it is in danger.

name: Beedrill
flavor_text: It has three poisonous stingers on its forelegs and its tail. They are used to jab its enemy repeatedly.

name: Oddish
flavor_text: If exposed to moonlight, it starts to move. It roams far and wide at night to scatter its seeds.

name: Gloom
flavor_text: Its pistils exude an incredibly foul odor. The horrid stench can cause fainting at a distance of 1.25 miles.

name: Vileplume

attacks.name: Soothing Scent
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: It has the world’s largest petals. With every step, the petals shake out heavy clouds of toxic pollen.

name: Paras
flavor_text: The mushrooms, known as tochukaso, are controlling the bug. Even if the bug bugs the mushrooms, they tell it to bug off.

name: Parasect
flavor_text: The bug is mostly dead, with the mushroom on its back having become the main body. If the mushroom comes off, the bug stops moving.

name: Venonat
flavor_text: Poison oozes from all over its body. It catches small bug Pokémon at night that are attracted by light.

name: Venomoth

attacks.name: Poison Powder
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: The wings are covered with dustlike scales. Every time it flaps its wings, it looses highly toxic dust.

name: Bellsprout
flavor_text: Even though its body is extremely skinny, it is blindingly fast when catching its prey.

name: Weepinbell
flavor_text: The leafy parts act as cutters for slashing foes. It spits a fluid that dissolves everything.

name: Victreebel

ability.name: Ability: Fragrance Trap
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, once during your turn, you may switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Basic Pokémon to the Active Spot.

flavor_text: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.

name: Exeggcute
flavor_text: Though it may look like it’s just a bunch of eggs, it’s a proper Pokémon. Exeggcute communicates with others of its kind via telepathy, apparently.

name: Exeggutor

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: Each of Exeggutor’s three heads is thinking different thoughts. The three don’t seem to be very interested in one another.

attacks.name: Tropical Swing
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.

name: Tangela

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Hidden beneath a tangle of vines that grows nonstop even if the vines are torn off, this Pokémon’s true appearance remains a mystery.

name: Scyther
flavor_text: It slashes through grass with its sharp scythes, moving too fast for the human eye to track.

name: Pinsir

attacks.name: Double Horn
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: These Pokémon judge one another based on pincers. Thicker, more impressive pincers make for more popularity with the opposite gender.

name: Cottonee
flavor_text: It shoots cotton from its body to protect itself. If it gets caught up in hurricane-strength winds, it can get sent to the other side of the Earth.

name: Whimsicott
flavor_text: It scatters cotton all over the place as a prank. If it gets wet, it’ll become too heavy to move and have no choice but to answer for its mischief.

name: Petilil

attacks.name: Blot
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: The leaves on its head grow right back even if they fall out. These bitter leaves refresh those who eat them.

name: Lilligant

attacks.name: Leaf Supply
attacks.effect: Take a [G] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched [G] Pokémon.

flavor_text: The fragrance of the garland on its head has a relaxing effect, but taking care of it is very difficult.

name: Skiddo

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: Until recently, people living in the mountains would ride on the backs of these Pokémon to traverse the mountain paths.

name: Gogoat
flavor_text: It can sense the feelings of others by touching them with its horns. This species has assisted people with their work since 5,000 years ago.

name: Charmander

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.effect: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It has a preference for hot things. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

name: Charmeleon
flavor_text: It has a barbaric nature. In battle, it whips its fiery tail around and slashes away with sharp claws.

name: Charizard

attacks.name: Fire Spin
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. It may cause forest fires by blowing flames.

attacks.name: Crimson Storm
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Vulpix

attacks.name: Tail Whip
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

flavor_text: While young, it has six gorgeous tails. When it grows, several new tails are sprouted.

name: Ninetales

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.effect: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It is said to live 1,000 years, and each of its tails is loaded with supernatural powers.

name: Growlithe
flavor_text: It has a brave and trustworthy nature. It fearlessly stands up to bigger and stronger foes.

name: Arcanine

attacks.name: Heat Tackle
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavor_text: An ancient picture scroll shows that people were captivated by its movement as it ran through prairies.

attacks.name: Inferno Onrush
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

name: Ponyta
flavor_text: It can’t run properly when it’s newly born. As it races around with others of its kind, its legs grow stronger.

name: Rapidash
flavor_text: This Pokémon can be seen galloping through fields at speeds of up to 150 mph, its fiery mane fluttering in the wind.

name: Magmar
flavor_text: Magmar dispatches its prey with fire. But it regrets this habit once it realizes that it has burned its intended prey to a charred crisp.

name: Flareon

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.effect: Discard 1 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Inhaled air is carried to its flame sac, heated, and exhaled as fire that reaches over 3,000 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Moltres

attacks.name: Sky Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: It’s one of the legendary bird Pokémon. When Moltres flaps its flaming wings, they glimmer with a dazzling red glow.

attacks.name: Inferno Dance
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. Take an amount of [R] Energy from your Energy Zone equal to the number of heads and attach it to your Benched [R] Pokémon in any way you like.

name: Heatmor
flavor_text: There’s a hole in its tail that allows it to draw in the air it needs to keep its fire burning. If the hole gets blocked, this Pokémon will fall ill.

name: Salandit
flavor_text: It taunts its prey and lures them into narrow, rocky areas where it then sprays them with toxic gas to make them dizzy and take them down.

name: Salazzle
flavor_text: Salazzle makes its opponents light-headed with poisonous gas, then captivates them with alluring movements to turn them into loyal servants.

name: Sizzlipede
flavor_text: It stores flammable gas in its body and uses it to generate heat. The yellow sections on its belly get particularly hot.

name: Centiskorch

attacks.name: Fire Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: When it heats up, its body temperature reaches about 1,500 degrees Fahrenheit. It lashes its body like a whip and launches itself at enemies.

name: Squirtle
flavor_text: When it retracts its long neck into its shell, it squirts out water with vigorous force.

name: Wartortle
flavor_text: It is recognized as a symbol of longevity. If its shell has algae on it, that Wartortle is very old.

name: Blastoise

attacks.name: Hydro Pump
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [W] Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: It crushes its foe under its heavy body to cause fainting. In a pinch, it will withdraw inside its shell.

attacks.name: Hydro Bazooka
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [W] Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Psyduck

attacks.name: Headache
attacks.effect: Your opponent can't use any Supporter cards from their hand during their next turn.

flavor_text: It is constantly wracked by a headache. When the headache turns intense, it begins using mysterious powers.

name: Golduck
flavor_text: When it swims at full speed using its long, webbed limbs, its forehead somehow begins to glow.

name: Poliwag
flavor_text: For Poliwag, swimming is easier than walking. The swirl pattern on its belly is actually part of the Pokémon’s innards showing through the skin.

name: Poliwhirl
flavor_text: Staring at the swirl on its belly causes drowsiness. This trait of Poliwhirl’s has been used in place of lullabies to get children to go to sleep.

name: Poliwrath

ability.name: Ability: Counterattack
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, do 20 damage to the Attacking Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its body is solid muscle. When swimming through cold seas, Poliwrath uses its impressive arms to smash through drift ice and plow forward.

name: Tentacool
flavor_text: Tentacool is not a particularly strong swimmer. It drifts across the surface of shallow seas as it searches for prey.

name: Tentacruel

attacks.name: Poison Tentacles
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: When the red orbs on Tentacruel’s head glow brightly, watch out. The Pokémon is about to fire off a burst of ultrasonic waves.

name: Seel
flavor_text: Thanks to its thick fat, cold seas don’t bother it at all, but it gets tired pretty easily in warm waters.

name: Dewgong
flavor_text: It sunbathes on the beach after meals. The rise in its body temperature helps its digestion.

name: Shellder
flavor_text: It is encased in a shell that is harder than diamond. Inside, however, it is surprisingly tender.

name: Cloyster

ability.name: Ability: Shell Armor
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes -10 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: Cloyster that live in seas with harsh tidal currents grow large, sharp spikes on their shells.

name: Krabby
flavor_text: It can be found near the sea. The large pincers grow back if they are torn out of their sockets.

name: Kingler

attacks.name: KO Crab
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, this attack does 80 more damage.

flavor_text: Its large and hard pincer has 10,000-horsepower strength. However, being so big, it is unwieldy to move.

name: Horsea
flavor_text: Horsea makes its home in oceans with gentle currents. If this Pokémon is under attack, it spits out pitch-black ink and escapes.

name: Seadra

attacks.name: Water Arrow
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: It’s the males that raise the offspring. While Seadra are raising young, the spines on their backs secrete thicker and stronger poison.

name: Goldeen
flavor_text: Its dorsal, pectoral, and tail fins wave elegantly in water. That is why it is known as the Water Dancer.

name: Seaking

attacks.name: Horn Hazard
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: In autumn, its body becomes more fatty in preparing to propose to a mate. It takes on beautiful colors.

name: Staryu
flavor_text: If you visit a beach at the end of summer, you’ll be able to see groups of Staryu lighting up in a steady rhythm.

name: Starmie
flavor_text: This Pokémon has an organ known as its core. The organ glows in seven colors when Starmie is unleashing its potent psychic powers.

name: Magikarp
flavor_text: An underpowered, pathetic Pokémon. It may jump high on rare occasions but never more than seven feet.

name: Gyarados

attacks.name: Hyper Beam
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Once it appears, it goes on a rampage. It remains enraged until it demolishes everything around it.

name: Lapras

attacks.name: Hydro Pump
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 3 extra [W] Energy attached, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text: A smart and kindhearted Pokémon, it glides across the surface of the sea while its beautiful song echoes around it.

name: Vaporeon

attacks.name: Bubble Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin, which is often mistaken for a mermaid’s.

name: Omanyte
flavor_text: Because some Omanyte manage to escape after being restored or are released into the wild by people, this species is becoming a problem.

name: Omastar

attacks.name: Ancient Whirlpool
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't attack.

flavor_text: Weighed down by a large and heavy shell, Omastar couldn’t move very fast. Some say it went extinct because it was unable to catch food.

name: Articuno

attacks.name: Ice Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: It’s said that this Pokémon’s beautiful blue wings are made of ice. Articuno flies over snowy mountains, its long tail fluttering along behind it.

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Ducklett
flavor_text: When attacked, it uses its feathers to splash water, escaping under cover of the spray.

name: Swanna
flavor_text: Despite their elegant appearance, they can flap their wings strongly and fly for thousands of miles.

name: Froakie
flavor_text: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked.

name: Frogadier
flavor_text: It can throw bubble-covered pebbles with precise control, hitting empty cans up to a hundred feet away.

name: Greninja

ability.name: Ability: Water Shuriken
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may do 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.

name: Pyukumuku
flavor_text: It lives in warm, shallow waters. If it encounters a foe, it will spit out its internal organs as a means to punch them.

name: Bruxish

attacks.name: Second Strike
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: It grinds its teeth with great force to stimulate its brain. It fires the psychic energy created by this process from the protuberance on its head.

name: Snom
flavor_text: It eats snow that has accumulated on the ground. It prefers soft, freshly fallen snow, so it will eat its way up a mountain, aiming for the peak.

name: Frosmoth

attacks.name: Powder Snow
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: Frosmoth senses air currents with its antennae. It sends its scales drifting on frigid air, making them fall like snow.

name: Pikachu
flavor_text: When it is angered, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches in its cheeks.

name: Raichu

attacks.name: Thunderbolt
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its tail discharges electricity into the ground, protecting it from getting shocked.

attacks.name: Circle Circuit
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Benched [L] Pokémon.

name: Magnemite
flavor_text: The electromagnetic waves emitted by the units at the sides of its head expel antigravity, which allows it to float.

name: Magneton

ability.name: Ability: Volt Charge
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may take a [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Three Magnemite are linked by a strong magnetic force. Earaches will occur if you get too close.

name: Voltorb
flavor_text: It rolls to move. If the ground is uneven, a sudden jolt from hitting a bump can cause it to explode.

name: Electrode
flavor_text: The more energy it charges up, the faster it gets. But this also makes it more likely to explode.

name: Electabuzz

attacks.name: Thunder Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage. If tails, this Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavor_text: Many power plants keep Ground-type Pokémon around as a defense against Electabuzz that come seeking electricity.

name: Jolteon

attacks.name: Pin Missile
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: It concentrates the weak electric charges emitted by its cells and launches wicked lightning bolts.

name: Zapdos

attacks.name: Raging Thunder
attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon has complete control over electricity. There are tales of Zapdos nesting in the dark depths of pitch-black thunderclouds.

attacks.name: Thundering Hurricane
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

name: Blitzle
flavor_text: When thunderclouds cover the sky, it will appear. It can catch lightning with its mane and store the electricity.

name: Zebstrika

attacks.name: Thunder Spear
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: When this ill-tempered Pokémon runs wild, it shoots lightning from its mane in all directions.

name: Tynamo
flavor_text: While one alone doesn’t have much power, a chain of many Tynamo can be as powerful as lightning.

name: Eelektrik
flavor_text: They coil around foes and shock them with electricity-generating organs that seem simply to be circular patterns.

name: Eelektross

attacks.name: Thunder Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.

name: Helioptile
flavor_text: When spread, the frills on its head act like solar panels, generating the power behind this Pokémon’s electric moves.

name: Heliolisk

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: One Heliolisk basking in the sun with its frill outspread is all it would take to produce enough electricity to power a city.

name: Pincurchin

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: This Pokémon generates electricity when it digests food. It uses its five hard teeth to scrape seaweed off surfaces and eat it.

name: Clefairy
flavor_text: It is said that happiness will come to those who see a gathering of Clefairy dancing under a full moon.

name: Clefable
flavor_text: A timid fairy Pokémon that is rarely seen, it will run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: Abra

attacks.name: Teleport
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon uses its psychic powers while it sleeps. The contents of Abra’s dreams affect the powers that the Pokémon wields.

name: Kadabra
flavor_text: Using its psychic power, Kadabra levitates as it sleeps. It uses its springy tail as a pillow.

name: Alakazam

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: It has an incredibly high level of intelligence. Some say that Alakazam remembers everything that ever happens to it, from birth till death.

name: Slowpoke
flavor_text: It is incredibly slow and dopey. It takes five seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.

name: Slowbro
flavor_text: When a Slowpoke went hunting in the sea, its tail was bitten by a Shellder. That made it evolve into Slowbro.

name: Gastly
flavor_text: It wraps its opponent in its gas-like body, slowly weakening its prey by poisoning it through the skin.

name: Haunter
flavor_text: It likes to lurk in the dark and tap shoulders with a gaseous hand. Its touch causes endless shuddering.

name: Gengar

attacks.name: Bother
attacks.effect: Your opponent can't use any Supporter cards from their hand during their next turn.

flavor_text: To steal the life of its target, it slips into the prey’s shadow and silently waits for an opportunity.

ability.name: Ability: Shadowy Spellbind
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent can't use any Supporter cards from their hand.

name: Drowzee
flavor_text: It remembers every dream it eats. It rarely eats the dreams of adults because children’s are much tastier.

name: Hypno

ability.name: Ability: Sleep Pendulum
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of psi moves, such as Hypnosis and Confusion.

name: Mr. Mime

attacks.name: Barrier Attack
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes -20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: The broadness of its hands may be no coincidence—many scientists believe its palms became enlarged specifically for pantomiming.

name: Jynx

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its strange cries sound like human language. There are some musicians who compose songs for Jynx to sing.

name: Mewtwo

attacks.name: Power Blast
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [P] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene-splicing and DNA-engineering experiments.

attacks.name: Psydrive
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [P] Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Ralts
flavor_text: The horns on its head provide a strong power that enables it to sense people’s emotions.

name: Kirlia
flavor_text: It has a psychic power that enables it to distort the space around it and see into the future.

name: Gardevoir

ability.name: Ability: Psy Shadow
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may take 1 [P] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to the [P] Pokémon in the Active Spot.

flavor_text: To protect its Trainer, it will expend all its psychic power to create a small black hole.

name: Woobat
flavor_text: While inside a cave, if you look up and see lots of heart-shaped marks lining the walls, it’s evidence that Woobat live there.

name: Swoobat
flavor_text: Emitting powerful sound waves tires it out. Afterward, it won’t be able to fly for a little while.

name: Golett
flavor_text: They were sculpted from clay in ancient times. No one knows why, but some of them are driven to continually line up boulders.

name: Golurk

attacks.name: Double Lariat
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 100 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Artillery platforms built into the walls of ancient castles served as perches from which Golurk could fire energy beams.

name: Sandshrew
flavor_text: It loves to bathe in the grit of dry, sandy areas. By sand bathing, the Pokémon rids itself of dirt and moisture clinging to its body.

name: Sandslash
flavor_text: The drier the area Sandslash lives in, the harder and smoother the Pokémon’s spikes will feel when touched.

name: Diglett
flavor_text: It lives about one yard underground, where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears aboveground.

name: Dugtrio

attacks.name: Dig
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its three heads bob separately up and down to loosen the soil nearby, making it easier for it to burrow.

name: Mankey
flavor_text: It lives in groups in the treetops. If it loses sight of its group, it becomes infuriated by its loneliness.

name: Primeape

attacks.name: Fight Back
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: It becomes wildly furious if it even senses someone looking at it. It chases anyone that meets its glare.

name: Machop
flavor_text: Its whole body is composed of muscles. Even though it’s the size of a human child, it can hurl 100 grown-ups.

name: Machoke
flavor_text: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power-save belt to be able to regulate its motions.

name: Machamp
flavor_text: It quickly swings its four arms to rock its opponents with ceaseless punches and chops from all angles.

name: Geodude
flavor_text: Geodude that have lived a long life have had all their edges smoothed out until they’re totally round. They also have a calm, quiet disposition.

name: Graveler
flavor_text: It climbs up cliffs as it heads toward the peak of a mountain. As soon as it reaches the summit, it rolls back down the way it came.

name: Golem

attacks.name: Double-Edge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

flavor_text: When Golem grow old, they stop shedding their shells. Those that have lived a long, long time have shells green with moss.

name: Onix
flavor_text: As it digs through the ground, it absorbs many hard objects. This is what makes its body so solid.

name: Cubone

attacks.name: Growl
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon do -20 damage.

flavor_text: When the memory of its departed mother brings it to tears, its cries echo mournfully within the skull it wears on its head.

name: Marowak
flavor_text: This Pokémon overcame its sorrow to evolve a sturdy new body. Marowak faces its opponents bravely, using a bone as a weapon.

attacks.name: Bonemerang
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 80 damage for each heads.

name: Hitmonlee

attacks.name: Stretch Kick
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This amazing Pokémon has an awesome sense of balance. It can kick in succession from any position.

name: Hitmonchan
flavor_text: Its punches slice the air. They are launched at such high speed, even a slight graze could cause a burn.

name: Rhyhorn
flavor_text: Strong, but not too bright, this Pokémon can shatter even a skyscraper with its charging tackles.

name: Rhydon
flavor_text: It begins walking on its hind legs after evolution. It can punch holes through boulders with its horn.

name: Kabuto
flavor_text: This species is almost entirely extinct. Kabuto molt every three days, making their shells harder and harder.

name: Kabutops

attacks.name: Leech Life
attacks.effect: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Kabutops slices its prey apart and sucks out the fluids. The discarded body parts become food for other Pokémon.

name: Mienfoo
flavor_text: In one minute, a well-trained Mienfoo can chop with its arms more than 100 times.

name: Mienshao
flavor_text: When Mienshao comes across a truly challenging opponent, it will lighten itself by biting off the fur on its arms.

name: Clobbopus
flavor_text: It’s very curious, but its means of investigating things is to try to punch them with its tentacles. The search for food is what brings it onto land.

name: Grapploct

attacks.name: Knock Back
attacks.effect: Switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

flavor_text: A body made up of nothing but muscle makes the grappling moves this Pokémon performs with its tentacles tremendously powerful.

name: Ekans
flavor_text: By dislocating its jaw, it can swallow prey larger than itself. After a meal, it curls up and rests.

name: Arbok

attacks.name: Corner
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavor_text: The latest research has determined that there are over 20 possible arrangements of the patterns on its stomach.

name: Nidoran♀

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Put 1 random Nidoran♂ from your deck onto your Bench.

flavor_text: Females are more sensitive to smells than males. While foraging, they’ll use their whiskers to check wind direction and stay downwind of predators.

name: Nidorina
flavor_text: The horn on its head has atrophied. It’s thought that this happens so Nidorina’s children won’t get poked while their mother is feeding them.

name: Nidoqueen

attacks.name: Lovestrike
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 more damage for each of your Benched Nidoking.

flavor_text: Nidoqueen is better at defense than offense. With scales like armor, this Pokémon will shield its children from any kind of attack.

name: Nidoran♂
flavor_text: The horn on a male Nidoran’s forehead contains a powerful poison. This is a very cautious Pokémon, always straining its large ears.

name: Nidorino
flavor_text: With a horn that’s harder than diamond, this Pokémon goes around shattering boulders as it searches for a moon stone.

name: Nidoking

attacks.name: Poison Horn
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: When it goes on a rampage, it’s impossible to control. But in the presence of a Nidoqueen it’s lived with for a long time, Nidoking calms down.

name: Zubat
flavor_text: It emits ultrasonic waves from its mouth to check its surroundings. Even in tight caves, Zubat flies around with skill.

name: Golbat
flavor_text: It loves to drink other creatures’ blood. It’s said that if it finds others of its kind going hungry, it sometimes shares the blood it’s gathered.

name: Grimer

attacks.name: Poison Gas
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: Born from sludge, these Pokémon now gather in polluted places and increase the bacteria in their bodies.

name: Muk

attacks.name: Venoshock
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: It’s thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.

name: Koffing
flavor_text: Its body is full of poisonous gas. It floats into garbage dumps, seeking out the fumes of raw, rotting trash.

name: Weezing

ability.name: Ability: Gas Leak
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may make your opponent's Active Pokémon Poisoned.

flavor_text: If one of the twin Koffing inflates, the other one deflates. It constantly mixes its poisonous gases.

name: Mawile

attacks.name: Crunch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: It uses its docile-looking face to lull foes into complacency, then bites with its huge, relentless jaws.

name: Pawniard
flavor_text: Pawniard will fearlessly challenge even powerful foes. In a pinch, it will cling to opponents and pierce them with the blades all over its body.

name: Bisharp
flavor_text: This Pokémon commands a group of several Pawniard. Groups that are defeated in territorial disputes are absorbed by the winning side.

name: Meltan

attacks.name: Amass
attacks.effect: Take 1 [M] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It dissolves and eats metal. Circulating liquid metal within its body is how it generates energy.

name: Melmetal

ability.name: Ability: Hard Coat
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes -20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: At the end of its life-span, Melmetal will rust and fall apart. The small shards left behind will eventually be reborn as Meltan.

name: Dratini
flavor_text: It sheds many layers of skin as it grows larger. During this process, it is protected by a rapid waterfall.

name: Dragonair
flavor_text: They say that if it emits an aura from its whole body, the weather will begin to change instantly.

name: Dragonite

attacks.name: Draco Meteor
attacks.effect: 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random 4 times. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, do 50 damage to it.

flavor_text: It is said that somewhere in the ocean lies an island where these gather. Only they live there.

name: Pidgey
flavor_text: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

name: Pidgeotto
flavor_text: The claws on its feet are well developed. It can carry prey such as an Exeggcute to its nest over 60 miles away.

name: Pidgeot

ability.name: Ability: Drive Off
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

flavor_text: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as Magikarp.

name: Rattata
flavor_text: Its incisors grow continuously throughout its life. If its incisors get too long, this Pokémon becomes unable to eat, and it starves to death.

name: Raticate
flavor_text: People say that it fled from its enemies by using its small webbed hind feet to swim from island to island in Alola.

name: Spearow
flavor_text: Its reckless nature leads it to stand up to others—even large Pokémon—if it has to protect its territory.

name: Fearow

attacks.name: Drill Run
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Carrying food through Fearow’s territory is dangerous. It will snatch the food away from you in a flash!

name: Jigglypuff
flavor_text: When its huge eyes waver, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

name: Wigglytuff
flavor_text: It has a very fine fur. Take care not to make it angry, or it may inflate steadily and hit with a body slam.

attacks.name: Sleepy Song
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Meowth

attacks.name: Pay Day
attacks.effect: Draw 1 card.

flavor_text: All it does is sleep during the daytime. At night, it patrols its territory with its eyes aglow.

name: Persian

attacks.name: Shadow Claw
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

flavor_text: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.

name: Farfetch’d
flavor_text: The stalk this Pokémon carries in its wings serves as a sword to cut down opponents. In a dire situation, the stalk can also serve as food.

name: Doduo
flavor_text: A two-headed Pokémon that was discovered as a sudden mutation. It runs at a pace of over 60 miles per hour.

name: Dodrio
flavor_text: An enemy that takes its eyes off any of the three heads—even for a second—will get pecked severely.

name: Lickitung

attacks.name: Continuous Lick
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: If this Pokémon’s sticky saliva gets on you and you don’t clean it off, an intense itch will set in. The itch won’t go away, either.

name: Chansey
flavor_text: This kindly Pokémon lays highly nutritious eggs and shares them with injured Pokémon or people.

name: Kangaskhan

attacks.name: Dizzy Punch
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Although it’s carrying its baby in a pouch on its belly, Kangaskhan is swift on its feet. It intimidates its opponents with quick jabs.

name: Tauros
flavor_text: When Tauros begins whipping itself with its tails, it’s a warning that the Pokémon is about to charge with astounding speed.

name: Ditto

attacks.name: Copy Anything
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack. If this Pokémon doesn't have the necessary Energy to use that attack, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: Its transformation ability is perfect. However, if made to laugh, it can’t maintain its disguise.

name: Eevee
flavor_text: Its ability to evolve into many forms allows it to adapt smoothly and perfectly to any environment.

name: Eevee
flavor_text: Its ability to evolve into many forms allows it to adapt smoothly and perfectly to any environment.

name: Eevee
flavor_text: Its ability to evolve into many forms allows it to adapt smoothly and perfectly to any environment.

name: Porygon

ability.name: Ability: Data Scan
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may look at the top card of your deck.

flavor_text: State-of-the-art technology was used to create Porygon. It was the first artificial Pokémon to be created via computer programming.

name: Aerodactyl

attacks.name: Primal Wingbeat
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent shuffles their Active Pokémon back into their deck.

flavor_text: This is a ferocious Pokémon from ancient times. Apparently even modern technology is incapable of producing a perfectly restored specimen.

name: Snorlax
flavor_text: It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.

name: Minccino
flavor_text: The way it brushes away grime with its tail can be helpful when cleaning. But its focus on spotlessness can make cleaning more of a hassle.

name: Cinccino

attacks.name: Do the Wave
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its body secretes oil that this Pokémon spreads over its nest as a coating to protect it from dust. Cinccino won’t tolerate even a speck of the stuff.

name: Wooloo
flavor_text: Its curly fleece is such an effective cushion that this Pokémon could fall off a cliff and stand right back up at the bottom, unharmed.

name: Dubwool
flavor_text: Weave a carpet from its springy wool, and you end up with something closer to a trampoline. You’ll start to bounce the moment you set foot on it.

name: Bulbasaur
flavor_text: There is a plant seed on its back right from the day this Pokémon is born. The seed slowly grows larger.

name: Gloom
flavor_text: Its pistils exude an incredibly foul odor. The horrid stench can cause fainting at a distance of 1.25 miles.

name: Pinsir

attacks.name: Double Horn
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: These Pokémon judge one another based on pincers. Thicker, more impressive pincers make for more popularity with the opposite gender.

name: Charmander

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.effect: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It has a preference for hot things. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

name: Rapidash
flavor_text: This Pokémon can be seen galloping through fields at speeds of up to 150 mph, its fiery mane fluttering in the wind.

name: Squirtle
flavor_text: When it retracts its long neck into its shell, it squirts out water with vigorous force.

name: Gyarados

attacks.name: Hyper Beam
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Once it appears, it goes on a rampage. It remains enraged until it demolishes everything around it.

name: Lapras

attacks.name: Hydro Pump
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 3 extra [W] Energy attached, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text: A smart and kindhearted Pokémon, it glides across the surface of the sea while its beautiful song echoes around it.

name: Electrode
flavor_text: The more energy it charges up, the faster it gets. But this also makes it more likely to explode.

name: Alakazam

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: It has an incredibly high level of intelligence. Some say that Alakazam remembers everything that ever happens to it, from birth till death.

name: Slowpoke
flavor_text: It is incredibly slow and dopey. It takes five seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.

name: Diglett
flavor_text: It lives about one yard underground, where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears aboveground.

name: Cubone

attacks.name: Growl
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon do -20 damage.

flavor_text: When the memory of its departed mother brings it to tears, its cries echo mournfully within the skull it wears on its head.

name: Nidoqueen

attacks.name: Lovestrike
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 more damage for each of your Benched Nidoking.

flavor_text: Nidoqueen is better at defense than offense. With scales like armor, this Pokémon will shield its children from any kind of attack.

name: Nidoking

attacks.name: Poison Horn
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: When it goes on a rampage, it’s impossible to control. But in the presence of a Nidoqueen it’s lived with for a long time, Nidoking calms down.

name: Golbat
flavor_text: It loves to drink other creatures’ blood. It’s said that if it finds others of its kind going hungry, it sometimes shares the blood it’s gathered.

name: Weezing

ability.name: Ability: Gas Leak
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may make your opponent's Active Pokémon Poisoned.

flavor_text: If one of the twin Koffing inflates, the other one deflates. It constantly mixes its poisonous gases.

name: Dragonite

attacks.name: Draco Meteor
attacks.effect: 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random 4 times. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, do 50 damage to it.

flavor_text: It is said that somewhere in the ocean lies an island where these gather. Only they live there.

name: Pidgeot

ability.name: Ability: Drive Off
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

flavor_text: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as Magikarp.

name: Meowth

attacks.name: Pay Day
attacks.effect: Draw 1 card.

flavor_text: All it does is sleep during the daytime. At night, it patrols its territory with its eyes aglow.

name: Ditto

attacks.name: Copy Anything
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack. If this Pokémon doesn't have the necessary Energy to use that attack, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: Its transformation ability is perfect. However, if made to laugh, it can’t maintain its disguise.

name: Eevee
flavor_text: Its ability to evolve into many forms allows it to adapt smoothly and perfectly to any environment.

name: Porygon

ability.name: Ability: Data Scan
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may look at the top card of your deck.

flavor_text: State-of-the-art technology was used to create Porygon. It was the first artificial Pokémon to be created via computer programming.

name: Snorlax
flavor_text: It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.

attacks.name: Giant Bloom
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Tropical Swing
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.

attacks.name: Crimson Storm
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Inferno Onrush
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Inferno Dance
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. Take an amount of [R] Energy from your Energy Zone equal to the number of heads and attach it to your Benched [R] Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Hydro Bazooka
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [W] Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Circle Circuit
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Benched [L] Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thundering Hurricane
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

ability.name: Ability: Shadowy Spellbind
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent can't use any Supporter cards from their hand.

attacks.name: Psydrive
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [P] Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Bonemerang
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 80 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Sleepy Song
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Inferno Dance
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. Take an amount of [R] Energy from your Energy Zone equal to the number of heads and attach it to your Benched [R] Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thundering Hurricane
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

ability.name: Ability: Shadowy Spellbind
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent can't use any Supporter cards from their hand.

attacks.name: Sleepy Song
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Crimson Storm
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Circle Circuit
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Benched [L] Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psydrive
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [P] Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Mew

attacks.name: Psy Report
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand.

flavor_text: Because it can use all kinds of moves, many scientists believe Mew to be the ancestor of Pokémon.

attacks.name: Crimson Storm
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Circle Circuit
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Benched [L] Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psydrive
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [P] Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Exeggcute

attacks.name: Growth Spurt
attacks.effect: Take a [G] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Though it may look like it’s just a bunch of eggs, it’s a proper Pokémon. Exeggcute communicates with others of its kind via telepathy, apparently.

name: Exeggutor

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Each of Exeggutor’s three heads is thinking different thoughts. The three don’t seem to be very interested in one another.

attacks.name: Powerful Bloom
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

name: Snivy
flavor_text: Being exposed to sunlight makes its movements swifter. It uses vines more adeptly than its hands.

name: Servine
flavor_text: It moves along the ground as if sliding. Its swift movements befuddle its foes, and it then attacks with a vine whip.

name: Serperior

ability.name: Ability: Jungle Totem
ability.effect: Each [G] Energy attached to your [G] Pokémon provides 2 [G] Energy. This effect doesn't stack.

flavor_text: It only gives its all against strong opponents who are not fazed by the glare from Serperior’s noble eyes.

name: Morelull
flavor_text: Pokémon living in the forest eat the delicious caps on Morelull’s head. The caps regrow overnight.

name: Shiinotic

attacks.name: Flickering Spores
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: Its flickering spores lure in prey and put them to sleep. Once this Pokémon has its prey snoozing, it drains their vitality with its fingertips.

name: Dhelmise

attacks.name: Energy Whip
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 3 extra [G] Energy attached, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text: After a piece of seaweed merged with debris from a sunken ship, it was reborn as this ghost Pokémon.

name: Ponyta

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: It can’t run properly when it’s newly born. As it races around with others of its kind, its legs grow stronger.

name: Rapidash

attacks.name: Rising Lunge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: This Pokémon can be seen galloping through fields at speeds of up to 150 mph, its fiery mane fluttering in the wind.

name: Magmar

attacks.name: Fire Blast
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Magmar dispatches its prey with fire. But it regrets this habit once it realizes that it has burned its intended prey to a charred crisp.

name: Larvesta
flavor_text: This Pokémon was called the Larva That Stole the Sun. The fire Larvesta spouts from its horns can cut right through a sheet of iron.

name: Volcarona

attacks.name: Volcanic Ash
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its burning body causes it to be unpopular in hot parts of the world, but in cold ones, Volcarona is revered as an embodiment of the sun.

name: Salandit

attacks.name: Venoshock
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: It taunts its prey and lures them into narrow, rocky areas where it then sprays them with toxic gas to make them dizzy and take them down.

name: Salazzle

attacks.name: Poison Claws
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: Salazzle makes its opponents light-headed with poisonous gas, then captivates them with alluring movements to turn them into loyal servants.

name: Magikarp

attacks.name: Leap Out
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: An underpowered, pathetic Pokémon. It may jump high on rare occasions but never more than seven feet.

attacks.name: Rampaging Whirlpool
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from among the Energy attached to all Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

name: Vaporeon

ability.name: Ability: Wash Out
ability.effect: As often as you like during your turn, you may move a [W] Energy from 1 of your Benched [W] Pokémon to your Active [W] Pokémon.

flavor_text: It lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin, which is often mistaken for a mermaid’s.

name: Finneon
flavor_text: The line running down its side can store sunlight. It shines vividly at night.

name: Lumineon

attacks.name: Aqua Liner
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: With its shining light, it lures its prey close. However, the light also happens to attract ferocious fish Pokémon—its natural predators.

name: Chewtle
flavor_text: Its large front tooth is still growing in. When the tooth itches, this Pokémon will bite another Chewtle’s horn, and the two Pokémon will tussle.

name: Drednaw

attacks.name: Crunch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its massive, jagged teeth can crush a boulder in a single bite. This Pokémon has an extremely vicious disposition.

name: Cramorant

attacks.name: Dive
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight.

name: Pikachu

attacks.name: Circle Circuit
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage for each of your Benched [L] Pokémon.

flavor_text: When it is angered, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches in its cheeks.

name: Raichu

attacks.name: Gigashock
attacks.effect: This attack also does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its tail discharges electricity into the ground, protecting it from getting shocked.

name: Electabuzz

attacks.name: Thunder Spear
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: Many power plants keep Ground-type Pokémon around as a defense against Electabuzz that come seeking electricity.

name: Joltik
flavor_text: Joltik can be found clinging to other Pokémon. It’s soaking up static electricity because it can’t produce a charge on its own.

name: Galvantula

attacks.name: Electroweb
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavor_text: It launches electrified fur from its abdomen as its means of attack. Opponents hit by the fur could be in for three full days and nights of paralysis.

name: Dedenne

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: It’s small and its electricity-generating organ is not fully developed, so it uses its tail to absorb electricity from people’s homes and charge itself.

name: Mew

attacks.name: Psy Report
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand.

flavor_text: Because it can use all kinds of moves, many scientists believe Mew to be the ancestor of Pokémon.

attacks.name: Genome Hacking
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

name: Sigilyph

attacks.name: Spike Draw
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

flavor_text: Psychic power allows these Pokémon to fly. Some say they were the guardians of an ancient city. Others say they were the guardians’ emissaries.

name: Elgyem
flavor_text: If this Pokémon stands near a TV, strange scenery will appear on the screen. That scenery is said to be from its home.

name: Beheeyem

attacks.name: Mind Jack
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Whenever a Beheeyem visits a farm, a Dubwool mysteriously disappears.

name: Flabébé

attacks.name: Hypnotic Gaze
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: This Pokémon can draw forth the power hidden within blooming wild flowers. It is particularly fond of red flowers.

name: Floette

attacks.name: Leaf Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon draws forth what power is left in withered flowers to make them healthy again. It holds a red flower.

name: Florges

attacks.name: Bloomshine
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from each of your Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon creates an impressive flower garden in its territory. It draws forth the power of the red flowers around its neck.

name: Swirlix
flavor_text: It eats its own weight in sugar every day. If it doesn’t get enough sugar, it becomes incredibly grumpy.

name: Slurpuff
flavor_text: By taking in a person’s scent, it can sniff out their mental and physical condition. It’s hoped that this skill will have many medical applications.

name: Mankey

attacks.name: Focus Fist
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: It lives in groups in the treetops. If it loses sight of its group, it becomes infuriated by its loneliness.

name: Primeape
flavor_text: It becomes wildly furious if it even senses someone looking at it. It chases anyone that meets its glare.

name: Geodude
flavor_text: Geodude that have lived a long life have had all their edges smoothed out until they’re totally round. They also have a calm, quiet disposition.

name: Graveler
flavor_text: It climbs up cliffs as it heads toward the peak of a mountain. As soon as it reaches the summit, it rolls back down the way it came.

name: Golem

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: When Golem grow old, they stop shedding their shells. Those that have lived a long, long time have shells green with moss.

ability.name: Ability: Primeval Law
ability.effect: Your opponent can't play any Pokémon from their hand to evolve their Active Pokémon.

name: Marshadow

attacks.name: Revenge
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: It slips into the shadows of others and mimics their powers and movements. As it improves, it becomes stronger than those it’s imitating.

name: Stonjourner
flavor_text: The elemental composition of the rocks that form its body were found to match the bedrock of a land far away from this Pokémon’s habitat.

name: Koffing

attacks.name: Division
attacks.effect: Put 1 random Koffing from your deck onto your Bench.

flavor_text: Its body is full of poisonous gas. It floats into garbage dumps, seeking out the fumes of raw, rotting trash.

name: Weezing

attacks.name: Smokescreen
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to use an attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen.

flavor_text: If one of the twin Koffing inflates, the other one deflates. It constantly mixes its poisonous gases.

name: Purrloin
flavor_text: It steals things from people just to amuse itself with their frustration. A rivalry exists between this Pokémon and Nickit.

name: Liepard
flavor_text: Don’t be fooled by its gorgeous fur and elegant figure. This is a moody and vicious Pokémon.

name: Venipede
flavor_text: Venipede and Sizzlipede are similar species, but when the two meet, a huge fight ensues.

name: Whirlipede

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: This Pokémon spins itself rapidly and charges into its opponents. Its top speed is just over 60 mph.

name: Scolipede

attacks.name: Venoshock
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: Scolipede latches on to its prey with the claws on its neck before slamming them into the ground and jabbing them with its claws’ toxic spikes.

name: Druddigon

ability.name: Ability: Rough Skin
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, do 20 damage to the Attacking Pokémon.

flavor_text: Druddigon lives in caves, but it never skips sunbathing—it won’t be able to move if its body gets too cold.

name: Pidgey
flavor_text: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

name: Pidgeotto
flavor_text: The claws on its feet are well developed. It can carry prey such as an Exeggcute to its nest over 60 miles away.

attacks.name: Scattering Cyclone
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Tauros

attacks.name: Fighting Tackle
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 80 more damage.

flavor_text: When Tauros begins whipping itself with its tails, it’s a warning that the Pokémon is about to charge with astounding speed.

name: Eevee

attacks.name: Continuous Steps
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Its ability to evolve into many forms allows it to adapt smoothly and perfectly to any environment.

name: Chatot

attacks.name: Mimic
attacks.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Draw a card for each card in your opponent's hand.

flavor_text: It mimics the cries of other Pokémon to trick them into thinking it’s one of them. This way they won’t attack it.

name: Exeggutor

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Each of Exeggutor’s three heads is thinking different thoughts. The three don’t seem to be very interested in one another.

name: Serperior

ability.name: Ability: Jungle Totem
ability.effect: Each [G] Energy attached to your [G] Pokémon provides 2 [G] Energy. This effect doesn't stack.

flavor_text: It only gives its all against strong opponents who are not fazed by the glare from Serperior’s noble eyes.

name: Salandit

attacks.name: Venoshock
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: It taunts its prey and lures them into narrow, rocky areas where it then sprays them with toxic gas to make them dizzy and take them down.

name: Vaporeon

ability.name: Ability: Wash Out
ability.effect: As often as you like during your turn, you may move a [W] Energy from 1 of your Benched [W] Pokémon to your Active [W] Pokémon.

flavor_text: It lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin, which is often mistaken for a mermaid’s.

name: Dedenne

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: It’s small and its electricity-generating organ is not fully developed, so it uses its tail to absorb electricity from people’s homes and charge itself.

name: Marshadow

attacks.name: Revenge
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: It slips into the shadows of others and mimics their powers and movements. As it improves, it becomes stronger than those it’s imitating.

attacks.name: Powerful Bloom
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Rampaging Whirlpool
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from among the Energy attached to all Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Genome Hacking
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

ability.name: Ability: Primeval Law
ability.effect: Your opponent can't play any Pokémon from their hand to evolve their Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Scattering Cyclone
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Genome Hacking
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

ability.name: Ability: Primeval Law
ability.effect: Your opponent can't play any Pokémon from their hand to evolve their Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Powerful Bloom
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Genome Hacking
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

name: Oddish

attacks.name: Blot
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: If exposed to moonlight, it starts to move. It roams far and wide at night to scatter its seeds.

name: Gloom
flavor_text: Its pistils exude an incredibly foul odor. The horrid stench can cause fainting at a distance of 1.25 miles.

name: Bellossom
flavor_text: Plentiful in the tropics. When it dances, its petals rub together and make a pleasant ringing sound.

name: Tangela
flavor_text: Hidden beneath a tangle of vines that grows nonstop even if the vines are torn off, this Pokémon’s true appearance remains a mystery.

name: Tangrowth

attacks.name: Mega Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Tangrowth has two arms that it can extend as it pleases. Recent research has shown that these arms are, in fact, bundles of vines.

name: Yanma
flavor_text: Its eyes can see 360 degrees without moving its head. It won’t miss prey—even those behind it.

attacks.name: Air Slash
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Roselia
flavor_text: Its flowers give off a relaxing fragrance. The stronger its aroma, the healthier the Roselia is.

name: Roserade

attacks.name: Poisonous Whip
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: After captivating opponents with its sweet scent, it lashes them with its thorny whips.

name: Turtwig
flavor_text: It uses its whole body to photosynthesize when exposed to sunlight. Its shell is made from hardened soil.

name: Grotle
flavor_text: It lives along water in forests. In the daytime, it leaves the forest to sunbathe its treed shell.

name: Torterra

attacks.name: Frenzy Plant
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Frenzy Plant.

flavor_text: Ancient people imagined that beneath the ground dwelt a gigantic Torterra.

name: Kricketot
flavor_text: Its legs are short. Whenever it stumbles, its stiff antennae clack with a xylophone-like sound.

name: Kricketune

attacks.name: Entrancing Melody
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavor_text: By allowing its cry to resonate in the hollow of its belly, it produces a captivating sound.

name: Burmy
flavor_text: To shelter itself from cold, wintry winds, it covers itself with a cloak made of twigs and leaves.

name: Wormadam

attacks.name: Leaf Cutter
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: Its appearance changes depending on where it evolved. The materials on hand become a part of its body.

name: Combee

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Put 1 random Basic Pokémon from your deck onto your Bench.

flavor_text: At night, Combee sleep in a group of about a hundred, packed closely together in a lump.

name: Vespiquen
flavor_text: It houses its colony in cells in its body and releases various pheromones to make those grubs do its bidding.

name: Carnivine

attacks.name: Flog
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: It attracts prey with its sweet-smelling saliva, then chomps down. It takes a whole day to eat prey.

name: Leafeon

attacks.name: Leafy Cyclone
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavor_text: When you see Leafeon asleep in a patch of sunshine, you’ll know it is using photosynthesis to produce clean air.

name: Mow Rotom

attacks.name: Energy Cutoff
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: The lawn mower is one of the household appliances that led to the development of the Rotom Dex.

name: Shaymin

ability.name: Ability: Fragrant Flower Garden
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may heal 10 damage from each of your Pokémon.

flavor_text: It can dissolve toxins in the air to instantly transform ruined land into a lush field of flowers.

name: Magmar

attacks.name: Stoke
attacks.effect: Take a [R] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Magmar dispatches its prey with fire. But it regrets this habit once it realizes that it has burned its intended prey to a charred crisp.

name: Magmortar

attacks.name: Bursting Inferno
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

flavor_text: When Magmortar inhales deeply, the fire burning in its belly intensifies, rising in temperature to over 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Slugma
flavor_text: A common sight in volcanic areas, it slowly slithers around in a constant search for warm places.

name: Magcargo

attacks.name: Searing Flame
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

flavor_text: Its brittle shell occasionally spouts intense flames that circulate throughout its body.

name: Chimchar
flavor_text: Its fiery rear end is fueled by gas made in its belly. Even rain can’t extinguish the fire.

name: Monferno
flavor_text: It skillfully controls the intensity of the fire on its tail to keep its foes at an ideal distance.

attacks.name: Flare Blitz
attacks.effect: Discard all [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Heat Rotom

attacks.name: Heat Breath
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: If the convection microwave oven is not working properly, then the Rotom inhabiting it will become lethargic.

name: Swinub
flavor_text: It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.

name: Piloswine

ability.name: Ability: Thick Fat
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks from [R] or [W] Pokémon.

flavor_text: If it charges at an enemy, the hairs on its back stand up straight. It is very sensitive to sound.

name: Mamoswine

ability.name: Ability: Thick Fat
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks from [R] or [W] Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon can be spotted in wall paintings from as far back as 10,000 years ago. For a while, it was thought to have gone extinct.

name: Regice

ability.name: Ability: Crystal Body
ability.effect: Prevent all effects of attacks used by your opponent's Pokémon done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: With cold air that can reach temperatures as low as −328 degrees Fahrenheit, Regice instantly freezes any creature that approaches it.

name: Piplup

attacks.name: Nap
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It doesn’t like to be taken care of. It’s difficult to bond with since it won’t listen to its Trainer.

name: Prinplup
flavor_text: It lives alone, away from others. Apparently, every one of them believes it is the most important.

name: Empoleon

attacks.name: Aqua Jet
attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: It swims as fast as a jet boat. The edges of its wings are sharp and can slice apart drifting ice.

name: Buizel
flavor_text: It spins its two tails like a screw to propel itself through water. The tails also slice clinging seaweed.

name: Floatzel

attacks.name: Jet Screw
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: With its flotation sac inflated, it can carry people on its back. It deflates the sac before it dives.

name: Shellos
flavor_text: It used to have a shell on its back long ago. This species is closely related to Pokémon like Shellder.

name: Gastrodon

attacks.name: Muddy Water
attacks.effect: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: They normally inhabit rocky seashores, but in times of continuous rain, they can sometimes be found in the mountains, far from the sea.

name: Finneon

attacks.name: Elegant Swim
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: The line running down its side can store sunlight. It shines vividly at night.

name: Lumineon
flavor_text: With its shining light, it lures its prey close. However, the light also happens to attract ferocious fish Pokémon—its natural predators.

name: Snover

attacks.name: Ice Shard
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a [F] Pokémon, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: During cold seasons, it migrates to the mountain’s lower reaches. It returns to the snow-covered summit in the spring.

name: Abomasnow
flavor_text: It lives a quiet life on mountains that are perpetually covered in snow. It hides itself by whipping up blizzards.

name: Glaceon

attacks.name: Ice Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: It can control its body temperature at will. This enables it to freeze the moisture in the atmosphere, creating flurries of diamond dust.

name: Wash Rotom
flavor_text: This Rotom has entered a washing machine. It nods with satisfaction after it floods the surrounding area.

name: Frost Rotom

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Rotom has entered a refrigerator. It leaps around gleefully after it uses cold air to freeze the area around it.

attacks.name: Dimensional Storm
attacks.effect: Discard 3 [W] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack also does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Manaphy

attacks.name: Oceanic Gift
attacks.effect: Choose 2 of your Benched Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, take a [W] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to that Pokémon.

flavor_text: It is born with a wondrous power that lets it bond with any kind of Pokémon.

name: Magnemite
flavor_text: The electromagnetic waves emitted by the units at the sides of its head expel antigravity, which allows it to float.

name: Magneton
flavor_text: Three Magnemite are linked by a strong magnetic force. Earaches will occur if you get too close.

name: Magnezone

attacks.name: Thunder Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a [L] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: As it zooms through the sky, this Pokémon seems to be receiving signals of unknown origin while transmitting signals of unknown purpose.

name: Voltorb

attacks.name: Big Explosion
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavor_text: It rolls to move. If the ground is uneven, a sudden jolt from hitting a bump can cause it to explode.

name: Electrode
flavor_text: The more energy it charges up, the faster it gets. But this also makes it more likely to explode.

name: Electabuzz

attacks.name: Charge
attacks.effect: Take a [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Many power plants keep Ground-type Pokémon around as a defense against Electabuzz that come seeking electricity.

name: Electivire

attacks.name: Exciting Voltage
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [L] Energy attached, this attack does 80 more damage.

flavor_text: The amount of electrical energy this Pokémon produces is proportional to the rate of its pulse. The voltage jumps while Electivire is battling.

name: Shinx

attacks.name: Hide
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: The extension and contraction of its muscles generates electricity. It glows when in trouble.

name: Luxio
flavor_text: Strong electricity courses through the tips of its sharp claws. A light scratch causes fainting in foes.

name: Luxray

attacks.name: Volt Bolt
attacks.effect: Discard all [L] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 120 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: It can see clearly through walls to track down its prey and seek its lost young.

attacks.name: Sparking Gadget
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 40 more damage.

name: Rotom

attacks.name: Assault Laser
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: Its electricity-like body can enter some kinds of machines and take control in order to make mischief.

name: Togepi
flavor_text: The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.

name: Togetic
flavor_text: They say that it will appear before kindhearted, caring people and shower them with happiness.

name: Togekiss

attacks.name: Overdrive Smash
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Overdrive Smash attack does +60 damage.

flavor_text: These Pokémon are never seen anywhere near conflict or turmoil. In recent times, they’ve hardly been seen at all.

name: Misdreavus
flavor_text: This Pokémon startles people in the middle of the night. It gathers fear as its energy.

attacks.name: Magical Delusion
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Ralts

attacks.name: Teleport
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: The horns on its head provide a strong power that enables it to sense people’s emotions.

name: Kirlia
flavor_text: It has a psychic power that enables it to distort the space around it and see into the future.

name: Duskull
flavor_text: If it finds bad children who won’t listen to their parents, it will spirit them away—or so it’s said.

name: Dusclops
flavor_text: It seeks drifting will-o’-the-wisps and sucks them into its empty body. What happens inside is a mystery.

name: Dusknoir

ability.name: Ability: Shadow Void
ability.effect: As often as you like during your turn, you may choose 1 of your Pokémon that has damage on it, and move all of its damage to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: At the bidding of transmissions from the spirit world, it steals people and Pokémon away. No one knows whether it has a will of its own.

name: Drifloon

attacks.name: Expand
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: It is whispered that any child who mistakes Drifloon for a balloon and holds on to it could wind up missing.

name: Drifblim
flavor_text: Some say this Pokémon is a collection of souls burdened with regrets, silently drifting through the dusk.

name: Uxie

attacks.name: Mind Boost
attacks.effect: Take a [P] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to Mesprit or Azelf.

flavor_text: Known as “The Being of Knowledge.” It is said that it can wipe out the memory of those who see its eyes.

name: Mesprit

attacks.name: Supreme Blast
attacks.effect: You can use this attack only if you have Uxie and Azelf on your Bench. Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Known as “The Being of Emotion.” It taught humans the nobility of sorrow, pain, and joy.

name: Azelf

attacks.name: Psychic Arrow
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: Known as “The Being of Willpower.” It sleeps at the bottom of a lake to keep the world in balance.

name: Giratina

ability.name: Ability: Levitate
ability.effect: If this Pokémon has any Energy attached, it has no Retreat Cost.

flavor_text: This Pokémon is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours, where common knowledge is distorted and strange.

name: Cresselia

attacks.name: Moonlight Gain
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon.

name: Rhyhorn
flavor_text: Strong, but not too bright, this Pokémon can shatter even a skyscraper with its charging tackles.

name: Rhydon
flavor_text: It begins walking on its hind legs after evolution. It can punch holes through boulders with its horn.

name: Rhyperior

attacks.name: Mountain Swing
attacks.effect: Discard the top 3 cards of your deck.

flavor_text: It can load up to three projectiles per arm into the holes in its hands. What launches out of those holes could be either rocks or Roggenrola.

name: Gligar
