flavor_text: It usually clings to cliffs. When it spots its prey, it spreads its wings and glides down to attack.

name: Gliscor

attacks.name: Acrobatics
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

flavor_text: It observes prey while hanging inverted from branches. When the chance presents itself, it swoops!

name: Hitmontop
flavor_text: It launches kicks while spinning. If it spins at high speed, it may bore its way into the ground.

name: Nosepass
flavor_text: It moves less than an inch a year, but when it’s in a jam, it will spin and drill down into the ground in a split second.

name: Regirock

ability.name: Ability: Exoskeleton
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: Every bit of Regirock’s body is made of stone. As parts of its body erode, this Pokémon sticks rocks to itself to repair what’s been lost.

name: Cranidos
flavor_text: A primeval Pokémon, it possesses a hard and sturdy skull, lacking any intelligence within.

name: Rampardos

attacks.name: Head Smash
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from this attack, this Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

flavor_text: In ancient times, people would dig up fossils of this Pokémon and use its skull, which is harder than steel, to make helmets.

name: Wormadam
flavor_text: Its appearance changes depending on where it evolved. The materials on hand become a part of its body.

name: Riolu
flavor_text: They communicate with one another using their auras. They are able to run all through the night.

name: Lucario

ability.name: Ability: Fighting Coach
ability.effect: Attacks used by your [F] Pokémon do +20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: It’s said that no foe can remain invisible to Lucario, since it can detect auras—even those of foes it could not otherwise see.

name: Hippopotas
flavor_text: It shuts its nostrils tight, then travels through sand as if walking. They form colonies of around 10.

name: Hippowdon
flavor_text: It is surprisingly quick to anger. It holds its mouth agape as a display of its strength.

attacks.name: Energized Blade
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Murkrow
flavor_text: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.

name: Honchkrow

attacks.name: Skill Dive
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: It is merciless by nature. It is said that it never forgives the mistakes of its Murkrow followers.

name: Sneasel

attacks.name: Double Scratch
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: This cunning Pokémon hides under the cover of darkness, waiting to attack its prey.

attacks.name: Scratching Nails
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 40 more damage.

name: Poochyena
flavor_text: A Pokémon with a persistent nature, it chases its chosen prey until the prey becomes exhausted.

name: Mightyena
flavor_text: It will always obey the commands of a skilled Trainer. Its behavior arises from its living in packs in ancient times.

name: Stunky
flavor_text: It sprays a foul fluid from its rear. Its stench spreads over a mile radius, driving Pokémon away.

name: Skuntank

attacks.name: Poison Gas
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: It attacks by spraying a horribly smelly fluid from the tip of its tail. Attacks from above confound it.

name: Spiritomb

attacks.name: Swirling Disaster
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its constant mischief and misdeeds resulted in it being bound to an Odd Keystone by a mysterious spell.

name: Skorupi
flavor_text: After burrowing into the sand, it waits patiently for prey to come near. This Pokémon and Sizzlipede share common descent.

name: Drapion

attacks.name: Cross Poison
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads. If at least 2 of them are heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: Its poison is potent, but it rarely sees use. This Pokémon prefers to use physical force instead, going on rampages with its car-crushing strength.

name: Croagunk

attacks.name: Group Beatdown
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Pokémon you have in play. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Inflating its poison sacs, it fills the area with an odd sound and hits flinching opponents with a poison jab.

name: Toxicroak

attacks.name: Group Beatdown
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Pokémon you have in play. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Swaying and dodging the attacks of its foes, it weaves its flexible body in close, then lunges out with its poisonous claws.

name: Darkrai

attacks.name: Dark Void
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: It chases people and Pokémon from its territory by causing them to experience deep, nightmarish slumbers.

ability.name: Ability: Nightmare Aura
ability.effect: Whenever you attach a [D] Energy from your Energy Zone to this Pokémon, do 20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Skarmory

attacks.name: Metal Arms
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: People fashion swords from Skarmory’s shed feathers, so this Pokémon is a popular element in heraldic designs.

name: Registeel
flavor_text: Registeel’s body is made of a strange material that is flexible enough to stretch and shrink but also more durable than any metal.

name: Shieldon
flavor_text: A mild-mannered, herbivorous Pokémon, it used its face to dig up tree roots to eat. The skin on its face was plenty tough.

name: Bastiodon

ability.name: Ability: Guarded Grill
ability.effect: If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, this Pokémon takes −100 damage from that attack.

flavor_text: The bones of its face are huge and hard, so they were mistaken for its spine until after this Pokémon was successfully restored.

name: Wormadam

attacks.name: Iron Head
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Its appearance changes depending on where it evolved. The materials on hand become a part of its body.

name: Bronzor
flavor_text: Ancient people believed that the pattern on Bronzor’s back contained a mysterious power.

name: Bronzong

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: In ages past, this Pokémon was revered as a bringer of rain. It was found buried in the ground.

name: Probopass

attacks.name: Triple Nose
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 50 more damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Although it can control its units known as Mini-Noses, they sometimes get lost and don’t come back.

attacks.name: Metallic Turbo
attacks.effect: Take 2 [M] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Heatran

attacks.name: Steel Tackle
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavor_text: It dwells in volcanic caves. It digs in with its cross-shaped feet to crawl on ceilings and walls.

name: Gible
flavor_text: It skulks in caves, and when prey or an enemy passes by, it leaps out and chomps them. The force of its attack sometimes chips its teeth.

name: Gabite
flavor_text: In rare cases, it molts and sheds its scales. Medicine containing its scales as an ingredient will make a weary body feel invigorated.

name: Garchomp

ability.name: Ability: Reckless Shearing
ability.effect: You must discard a card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw a card.

flavor_text: It is said that when one runs at high speed, its wings create blades of wind that can fell nearby trees.

name: Lickitung
flavor_text: If this Pokémon’s sticky saliva gets on you and you don’t clean it off, an intense itch will set in. The itch won’t go away, either.

attacks.name: Licking Fury
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 40 more damage for each heads.

name: Eevee

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavor_text: Its ability to evolve into many forms allows it to adapt smoothly and perfectly to any environment.

name: Porygon
flavor_text: State-of-the-art technology was used to create Porygon. It was the first artificial Pokémon to be created via computer programming.

name: Porygon2
flavor_text: This is a Porygon that was updated with special data. Porygon2 develops itself by learning about many different subjects all on its own.

name: Porygon-Z

attacks.name: Buggy Beam
attacks.effect: Change the type of the next Energy that will be generated for your opponent to 1 of the following at random: [G],[R],[W],[L],[P],[F],[D], or [M].

flavor_text: Porygon-Z had a program installed to allow it to move between dimensions, but the program also caused instability in Porygon-Z’s behavior.

name: Aipom
flavor_text: As it did more and more with its tail, its hands became clumsy. It makes its nest high in the treetops.

name: Ambipom

attacks.name: Double Hit
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: It uses its tails for everything. If it wraps both of its tails around you and gives you a squeeze, that’s proof it really likes you.

name: Starly

attacks.name: Pluck
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: They flock around mountains and fields, chasing after bug Pokémon. Their singing is noisy and annoying.

name: Staravia
flavor_text: Recognizing their own weakness, they always live in a group. When alone, a Staravia cries noisily.

name: Staraptor

attacks.name: Clutch
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavor_text: When Staravia evolve into Staraptor, they leave the flock to live alone. They have sturdy wings.

name: Bidoof

attacks.name: Super Fang
attacks.effect: Halve your opponent's Active Pokémon's remaining HP, rounded down.

flavor_text: With nerves of steel, nothing can perturb it. It is more agile and active than it appears.

name: Bibarel
flavor_text: It busily makes its nest with stacks of branches and roots it has cut up with its sharp incisors.

name: Buneary
flavor_text: If both of Buneary’s ears are rolled up, something is wrong with its body or mind. It’s a sure sign the Pokémon is in need of care.

name: Lopunny

attacks.name: Jump Kick
attacks.effect: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Lopunny is constantly monitoring its surroundings. If danger approaches, this Pokémon responds with superdestructive kicks.

name: Glameow

attacks.name: Pose
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: It claws if displeased and purrs when affectionate. Its fickleness is very popular among some.

name: Purugly

attacks.name: Interrupt
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand. Choose a card you find there and shuffle it into your opponent's deck.

flavor_text: It would claim another Pokémon’s nest as its own if it finds a nest sufficiently comfortable.

name: Chatot

attacks.name: Fury Attack
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: It mimics the cries of other Pokémon to trick them into thinking it’s one of them. This way they won’t attack it.

name: Fan Rotom

attacks.name: Spin Storm
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, put your opponent's Active Pokémon into their hand.

flavor_text: This Rotom has entered an electric fan. It smirks with satisfaction over a prank well pulled after it blows away everything around it.

name: Regigigas

attacks.name: Raging Hammer
attacks.effect: This attack does more damage equal to the damage this Pokémon has on it.

flavor_text: It is said to have made Pokémon that look like itself from a special ice mountain, rocks, and magma.

name: Tangrowth

attacks.name: Mega Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Tangrowth has two arms that it can extend as it pleases. Recent research has shown that these arms are, in fact, bundles of vines.

name: Combee

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Put 1 random Basic Pokémon from your deck onto your Bench.

flavor_text: At night, Combee sleep in a group of about a hundred, packed closely together in a lump.

name: Carnivine

attacks.name: Flog
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: It attracts prey with its sweet-smelling saliva, then chomps down. It takes a whole day to eat prey.

name: Shaymin

ability.name: Ability: Fragrant Flower Garden
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may heal 10 damage from each of your Pokémon.

flavor_text: It can dissolve toxins in the air to instantly transform ruined land into a lush field of flowers.

name: Mamoswine

ability.name: Ability: Thick Fat
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks from [R] or [W] Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon can be spotted in wall paintings from as far back as 10,000 years ago. For a while, it was thought to have gone extinct.

name: Gastrodon

attacks.name: Muddy Water
attacks.effect: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: They normally inhabit rocky seashores, but in times of continuous rain, they can sometimes be found in the mountains, far from the sea.

name: Manaphy

attacks.name: Oceanic Gift
attacks.effect: Choose 2 of your Benched Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, take a [W] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to that Pokémon.

flavor_text: It is born with a wondrous power that lets it bond with any kind of Pokémon.

name: Shinx

attacks.name: Hide
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: The extension and contraction of its muscles generates electricity. It glows when in trouble.

name: Rotom

attacks.name: Assault Laser
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: Its electricity-like body can enter some kinds of machines and take control in order to make mischief.

name: Drifloon

attacks.name: Expand
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: It is whispered that any child who mistakes Drifloon for a balloon and holds on to it could wind up missing.

name: Mesprit

attacks.name: Supreme Blast
attacks.effect: You can use this attack only if you have Uxie and Azelf on your Bench. Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Known as “The Being of Emotion.” It taught humans the nobility of sorrow, pain, and joy.

name: Giratina

ability.name: Ability: Levitate
ability.effect: If this Pokémon has any Energy attached, it has no Retreat Cost.

flavor_text: This Pokémon is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours, where common knowledge is distorted and strange.

name: Cresselia

attacks.name: Moonlight Gain
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon.

name: Rhyperior

attacks.name: Mountain Swing
attacks.effect: Discard the top 3 cards of your deck.

flavor_text: It can load up to three projectiles per arm into the holes in its hands. What launches out of those holes could be either rocks or Roggenrola.

name: Lucario

ability.name: Ability: Fighting Coach
ability.effect: Attacks used by your [F] Pokémon do +20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: It’s said that no foe can remain invisible to Lucario, since it can detect auras—even those of foes it could not otherwise see.

name: Hippopotas
flavor_text: It shuts its nostrils tight, then travels through sand as if walking. They form colonies of around 10.

name: Spiritomb

attacks.name: Swirling Disaster
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its constant mischief and misdeeds resulted in it being bound to an Odd Keystone by a mysterious spell.

name: Croagunk

attacks.name: Group Beatdown
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Pokémon you have in play. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Inflating its poison sacs, it fills the area with an odd sound and hits flinching opponents with a poison jab.

name: Heatran

attacks.name: Steel Tackle
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavor_text: It dwells in volcanic caves. It digs in with its cross-shaped feet to crawl on ceilings and walls.

name: Garchomp

ability.name: Ability: Reckless Shearing
ability.effect: You must discard a card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw a card.

flavor_text: It is said that when one runs at high speed, its wings create blades of wind that can fell nearby trees.

attacks.name: Clutch
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavor_text: When Staravia evolve into Staraptor, they leave the flock to live alone. They have sturdy wings.

attacks.effect: Halve your opponent's Active Pokémon's remaining HP, rounded down.

flavor_text: With nerves of steel, nothing can perturb it. It is more agile and active than it appears.

flavor_text: It claws if displeased and purrs when affectionate. Its fickleness is very popular among some.

attacks.effect: This attack does more damage equal to the damage this Pokémon has on it.

attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 40 more damage.

attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 40 more damage.

ability.effect: Whenever you attach a [D] Energy from your Energy Zone to this Pokémon, do 20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.effect: Discard 3 [W] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack also does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Metallic Turbo
attacks.effect: Take 2 [M] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Heracross

attacks.name: Single-Horn Throw
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text: It loves sweet nectar. To keep all the nectar to itself, it hurls rivals away with its prized horn.

name: Burmy
flavor_text: To shelter itself from cold, wintry winds, it covers itself with a cloak made of twigs and leaves.

name: Mothim
flavor_text: It loves the honey of flowers and steals honey collected by Combee.

name: Combee
flavor_text: At night, Combee sleep in a group of about a hundred, packed closely together in a lump.

name: Vespiquen

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavor_text: It houses its colony in cells in its body and releases various pheromones to make those grubs do its bidding.

name: Cherubi
flavor_text: It nimbly dashes about to avoid getting pecked by bird Pokémon that would love to make off with its small, nutrient-rich storage ball.

name: Cherrim

attacks.name: Worry Seed
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavor_text: As a bud, it barely moves. It sits still, placidly waiting for sunlight to appear.

name: Cherrim

attacks.name: Leech Seed
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: After absorbing plenty of sunlight, Cherrim takes this form. It’s full of energy while it’s like this, and its liveliness will go on until sundown.

name: Carnivine

ability.name: Ability: Power Link
ability.effect: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, attacks used by this Pokémon do +30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: It attracts prey with its sweet-smelling saliva, then chomps down. It takes a whole day to eat prey.

ability.name: Ability: Forest Breath
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may take a [G] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your [G] Pokémon.

name: Houndour
flavor_text: It is smart enough to hunt in packs. It uses a variety of cries for communicating with others.

name: Houndoom

attacks.name: Corner
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavor_text: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.

name: Heatran

attacks.name: Ragin’ Mad Strike
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 40 more damage.

ability.name: Ability: Speed Link
ability.effect: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, this Pokémon has no Retreat Cost.

flavor_text: It dwells in volcanic caves. It digs in with its cross-shaped feet to crawl on ceilings and walls.

name: Marill
flavor_text: The fur on its body naturally repels water. It can stay dry even when it plays in the water.

name: Azumarill
flavor_text: Its long ears are superb sensors. It can distinguish the movements of things in water and tell what they are.

name: Barboach
flavor_text: Its two whiskers provide a sensitive radar. Even in muddy waters, it can detect its prey’s location.

name: Whiscash

attacks.name: Thrash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage. If tails, this Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavor_text: It is extremely protective of its territory. If any foe approaches, it attacks using vicious tremors.

name: Snorunt
flavor_text: It is said that several Snorunt gather under giant leaves and live together in harmony.

name: Froslass

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: When it finds humans or Pokémon it likes, it freezes them and takes them to its chilly den, where they become decorations.

name: Snover
flavor_text: During cold seasons, it migrates to the mountain’s lower reaches. It returns to the snow-covered summit in the spring.

name: Abomasnow

ability.name: Ability: Vigor Link
ability.effect: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, attacks used by this Pokémon cost 1 less [C] Energy.

flavor_text: It lives a quiet life on mountains that are perpetually covered in snow. It hides itself by whipping up blizzards.

ability.name: Ability: Snowy Terrain
ability.effect: During Pokémon Checkup, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, do 10 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Palkia

attacks.name: Zone Smash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: It soars across the sky in a form that greatly resembles the creator of all things. Perhaps this imitation of appearance is Palkia’s strategy for gaining Arceus’s powers.

name: Phione

attacks.name: Water Pulse
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: When the water warms, they inflate the flotation sac on their heads and drift languidly on the sea in packs.

name: Pikachu

attacks.name: Spark
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: When it is angered, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches in its cheeks.

name: Raichu

attacks.name: Spark
attacks.effect: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Resilience Link
ability.effect: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, this Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: Its tail discharges electricity into the ground, protecting it from getting shocked.

name: Electrike
flavor_text: It stores static electricity in its fur for discharging. It gives off sparks if a storm approaches.

name: Manectric

attacks.name: Flash
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to use an attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen.

flavor_text: It stimulates its own muscles with electricity, so it can move quickly. It eases its soreness with electricity, too, so it can recover quickly as well.

name: Clefairy
flavor_text: It is said that happiness will come to those who see a gathering of Clefairy dancing under a full moon.

name: Clefable

attacks.name: Moonblast
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon do −30 damage.

flavor_text: A timid fairy Pokémon that is rarely seen, it will run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: Gastly

attacks.name: Astonish
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent reveals a random card from their hand and shuffles it into their deck.

flavor_text: It wraps its opponent in its gas-like body, slowly weakening its prey by poisoning it through the skin.

name: Haunter
flavor_text: It likes to lurk in the dark and tap shoulders with a gaseous hand. Its touch causes endless shuddering.

name: Gengar

attacks.name: Hypnoblast
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: To steal the life of its target, it slips into the prey’s shadow and silently waits for an opportunity.

name: Unown

ability.name: Ability: CHECK
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may choose either player. Look at the top card of that player's deck.

flavor_text: Its flat, thin body is always stuck on walls. Its shape appears to have some meaning.

name: Rotom

attacks.name: Dash Attack
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Speed Link
ability.effect: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, this Pokémon has no Retreat Cost.

flavor_text: Its electricity-like body can enter some kinds of machines and take control in order to make mischief.

name: Sudowoodo

attacks.name: Fighting Headbutt
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: Although it always pretends to be a tree, its composition appears more similar to rock than to vegetation.

name: Phanpy
flavor_text: This Pokémon lives and nests on a riverbank. After playing in the mud, it won’t be able to settle down unless it washes its body.

name: Donphan

attacks.name: Rolling Spin
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Rolling Spin attack does +60 damage.

flavor_text: Donphan is covered in tough hide, so even being hit by a car won’t faze this Pokémon. However, it is extremely susceptible to rain.

name: Larvitar
flavor_text: Born deep underground, this Pokémon becomes a pupa after eating enough dirt to make a mountain.

name: Pupitar
flavor_text: Its shell is as hard as bedrock, and it is also very strong. Its thrashing can topple a mountain.

name: Tyranitar

ability.name: Ability: Power Link
ability.effect: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, attacks used by this Pokémon do +30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Extremely strong, it can change the landscape. It is so insolent that it doesn’t care about others.

name: Nosepass
flavor_text: It moves less than an inch a year, but when it’s in a jam, it will spin and drill down into the ground in a split second.

name: Meditite
flavor_text: It never skips its daily yoga training. It heightens its inner strength through meditation.

name: Medicham

attacks.name: Kick Shot
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: Through yoga training, it gained the psychic power to predict its foe’s next move.

name: Gible
flavor_text: It skulks in caves, and when prey or an enemy passes by, it leaps out and chomps them. The force of its attack sometimes chips its teeth.

name: Gabite
flavor_text: In rare cases, it molts and sheds its scales. Medicine containing its scales as an ingredient will make a weary body feel invigorated.

attacks.name: Linear Attack
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Zubat
flavor_text: It emits ultrasonic waves from its mouth to check its surroundings. Even in tight caves, Zubat flies around with skill.

name: Golbat
flavor_text: It loves to drink other creatures’ blood. It’s said that if it finds others of its kind going hungry, it sometimes shares the blood it’s gathered.

name: Crobat

ability.name: Ability: Cunning Link
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, you may do 30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Both of its legs have turned into wings. Without a sound, Crobat flies swiftly toward its prey and sinks its fangs into the nape of its target’s neck.

name: Croagunk
flavor_text: Inflating its poison sacs, it fills the area with an odd sound and hits flinching opponents with a poison jab.

name: Toxicroak

attacks.name: Toxic
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. Do 20 damage to this Pokémon instead of the usual amount for this Special Condition.

flavor_text: Swaying and dodging the attacks of its foes, it weaves its flexible body in close, then lunges out with its poisonous claws.

name: Magnemite
flavor_text: The electromagnetic waves emitted by the units at the sides of its head expel antigravity, which allows it to float.

name: Magneton
flavor_text: Three Magnemite are linked by a strong magnetic force. Earaches will occur if you get too close.

name: Magnezone

ability.name: Ability: Resilience Link
ability.effect: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, this Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: As it zooms through the sky, this Pokémon seems to be receiving signals of unknown origin while transmitting signals of unknown purpose.

name: Mawile

attacks.name: Iron Beam Breaker
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a [M] Pokémon, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: It uses its docile-looking face to lull foes into complacency, then bites with its huge, relentless jaws.

attacks.name: Defensive Unit
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

name: Bronzor
flavor_text: Ancient people believed that the pattern on Bronzor’s back contained a mysterious power.

name: Bronzong

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: In ages past, this Pokémon was revered as a bringer of rain. It was found buried in the ground.

name: Dialga

attacks.name: Time Mash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, during your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavor_text: Radiant light caused Dialga to take on a form bearing a striking resemblance to the creator Pokémon. Dialga now wields such colossal strength that one must conclude this is its true form.

name: Giratina

attacks.name: Crisis Dive
attacks.effect: Discard 2 random Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours, where common knowledge is distorted and strange.

name: Eevee
flavor_text: Its ability to evolve into many forms allows it to adapt smoothly and perfectly to any environment.

name: Snorlax

attacks.name: Collapse
attacks.effect: This Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.

name: Hoothoot
flavor_text: It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen.

name: Noctowl

attacks.name: Silent Wing
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand.

flavor_text: Its eyes are specially developed to enable it to see clearly even in murky darkness and minimal light.

name: Starly
flavor_text: They flock around mountains and fields, chasing after bug Pokémon. Their singing is noisy and annoying.

name: Staravia
flavor_text: Recognizing their own weakness, they always live in a group. When alone, a Staravia cries noisily.

name: Staraptor

attacks.name: Brave Bird
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavor_text: When Staravia evolve into Staraptor, they leave the flock to live alone. They have sturdy wings.

name: Shaymin

ability.name: Ability: Sky Support
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, your Active Basic Pokemon's Retreat Cost is 1 less.

flavor_text: It can dissolve toxins in the air to instantly transform ruined land into a lush field of flowers.

name: Arceus

attacks.name: Power Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: According to the legends of Sinnoh, this Pokémon emerged from an egg and shaped all there is in this world.

attacks.name: Ultimate Force
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Fabled Luster
ability.effect: This Pokémon can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

name: Houndoom

attacks.name: Corner
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavor_text: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.

name: Marill
flavor_text: The fur on its body naturally repels water. It can stay dry even when it plays in the water.

name: Unown

ability.name: Ability: CHECK
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may choose either player. Look at the top card of that player's deck.

flavor_text: Its flat, thin body is always stuck on walls. Its shape appears to have some meaning.

name: Sudowoodo

attacks.name: Fighting Headbutt
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: Although it always pretends to be a tree, its composition appears more similar to rock than to vegetation.

name: Magnemite
flavor_text: The electromagnetic waves emitted by the units at the sides of its head expel antigravity, which allows it to float.

name: Shaymin

ability.name: Ability: Sky Support
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, your Active Basic Pokemon's Retreat Cost is 1 less.

flavor_text: It can dissolve toxins in the air to instantly transform ruined land into a lush field of flowers.

ability.name: Ability: Forest Breath
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may take a [G] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your [G] Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Snowy Terrain
ability.effect: During Pokémon Checkup, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, do 10 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Linear Attack
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Defensive Unit
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

attacks.name: Ultimate Force
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Fabled Luster
ability.effect: This Pokémon can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

ability.name: Ability: Forest Breath
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may take a [G] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your [G] Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Snowy Terrain
ability.effect: During Pokémon Checkup, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, do 10 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Defensive Unit
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

attacks.name: Ultimate Force
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Fabled Luster
ability.effect: This Pokémon can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

attacks.name: Ultimate Force
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Fabled Luster
ability.effect: This Pokémon can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

name: Weedle

attacks.name: Multiply
attacks.effect: Put 1 random Weedle from your deck onto your Bench.

flavor_text: Often found in forests and grasslands. It has a sharp, toxic barb of around two inches on top of its head.

name: Kakuna

attacks.name: String Shot
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: Almost incapable of moving, this Pokémon can only harden its shell to protect itself when it is in danger.

attacks.name: Crushing Spear
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Pinsir

attacks.name: Guillotine Rush
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 40 more damage for each heads.

flavor_text: These Pokémon judge one another based on pincers. Thicker, more impressive pincers make for more popularity with the opposite gender.

name: Sprigatito

attacks.name: Cry for Help
attacks.effect: Put 1 random [G] Pokémon from your deck into your hand.

flavor_text: Its fluffy fur is similar in composition to plants. This Pokémon frequently washes its face to keep it from drying out.

name: Floragato
flavor_text: Floragato deftly wields the vine hidden beneath its long fur, slamming the hard flower bud against its opponents.

name: Meowscarada

attacks.name: Fighting Claws
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text: This Pokémon uses the reflective fur lining its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating.

name: Charmander
flavor_text: It has a preference for hot things. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

name: Charmeleon
flavor_text: It has a barbaric nature. In battle, it whips its fiery tail around and slashes away with sharp claws.

attacks.name: Stoke
attacks.effect: Take 3 [R] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

name: Magmar
flavor_text: Magmar dispatches its prey with fire. But it regrets this habit once it realizes that it has burned its intended prey to a charred crisp.

name: Magmortar

attacks.name: Smoke Bomb
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to use an attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen.

flavor_text: When Magmortar inhales deeply, the fire burning in its belly intensifies, rising in temperature to over 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Paldean Tauros

attacks.name: Blaze Tackle
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavor_text: When heated by fire energy, its horns can get hotter than 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit. Those gored by them will suffer both wounds and burns.

name: Tentacool
flavor_text: Tentacool is not a particularly strong swimmer. It drifts across the surface of shallow seas as it searches for prey.

name: Tentacruel
flavor_text: When the red orbs on Tentacruel’s head glow brightly, watch out. The Pokémon is about to fire off a burst of ultrasonic waves.

name: Buizel
flavor_text: It inflates its flotation sac, keeping its face above water in order to watch for prey movement.

name: Floatzel

attacks.name: Water Arrow
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: With its flotation sac inflated, it can carry people on its back. It deflates the sac before it dives.

name: Wiglett

attacks.name: Spring Out
attacks.effect: 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random. Do 30 damage to it.

flavor_text: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.

attacks.name: Pop Out Throughout
attacks.effect: 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random 3 times. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, do 50 damage to it.

name: Dondozo

attacks.name: Ocean Cyclone
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon is a glutton, but it’s bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey.

name: Tatsugiri

ability.name: Ability: Retreat Directive
ability.effect: Your Active Dondozo has no Retreat Cost.

flavor_text: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.

attacks.name: Thunderbolt
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Voltorb
flavor_text: It rolls to move. If the ground is uneven, a sudden jolt from hitting a bump can cause it to explode.

name: Electrode

attacks.name: Tumbling Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: The more energy it charges up, the faster it gets. But this also makes it more likely to explode.

name: Pachirisu

attacks.name: Plasma
attacks.effect: Take a [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched [L] Pokémon.

flavor_text: It’s one of the kinds of Pokémon with electric cheek pouches. It shoots charges from its tail.

name: Pawmi
flavor_text: It has underdeveloped electric sacs on its cheeks. These sacs can produce electricity only if Pawmi rubs them furiously with the pads on its forepaws.

name: Pawmo
flavor_text: When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks.

name: Pawmot

ability.name: Ability: Counterattack
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, do 20 damage to the Attacking Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon normally is slow to react, but once it enters battle, it will strike down its enemies with lightning-fast movements.

name: Abra
flavor_text: This Pokémon uses its psychic powers while it sleeps. The contents of Abra’s dreams affect the powers that the Pokémon wields.

name: Kadabra
flavor_text: Using its psychic power, Kadabra levitates as it sleeps. It uses its springy tail as a pillow.

name: Alakazam

attacks.name: Psychic Suppression
attacks.effect: This attack also does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any Energy attached.

flavor_text: It has an incredibly high level of intelligence. Some say that Alakazam remembers everything that ever happens to it, from birth till death.

name: Mr. Mime

attacks.name: Juggling
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: The broadness of its hands may be no coincidence—many scientists believe its palms became enlarged specifically for pantomiming.

name: Drifloon
flavor_text: It is whispered that any child who mistakes Drifloon for a balloon and holds on to it could wind up missing.

name: Drifblim
flavor_text: It can generate and release gas within its body. That’s how it can control the altitude of its drift.

attacks.name: Chaotic Impact
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

ability.name: Ability: Broken-Space Bellow
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may take a [P] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.

name: Gimmighoul

attacks.name: Chest-ouflage
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure.

name: Machop
flavor_text: Its whole body is composed of muscles. Even though it’s the size of a human child, it can hurl 100 grown-ups.

name: Machoke

attacks.name: Pummel
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power-save belt to be able to regulate its motions.

name: Machamp

attacks.name: Power Press
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [F] Energy attached, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: It quickly swings its four arms to rock its opponents with ceaseless punches and chops from all angles.

name: Hitmonlee
flavor_text: This amazing Pokémon has an awesome sense of balance. It can kick in succession from any position.

name: Hitmonchan
flavor_text: Its punches slice the air. They are launched at such high speed, even a slight graze could cause a burn.

name: Riolu
flavor_text: They communicate with one another using their auras. They are able to run all through the night.

attacks.name: Aura Sphere
attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Flamigo

attacks.name: Double Kick
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.

name: Ekans
flavor_text: By dislocating its jaw, it can swallow prey larger than itself. After a meal, it curls up and rests.

name: Arbok

attacks.name: Venomous Fang
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: After stunning its opponents with the pattern on its stomach, it quickly wraps them up in its body and waits for them to stop moving.

name: Paldean Wooper

attacks.name: Poison Jab
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: After losing a territorial struggle, Wooper began living on land. The Pokémon changed over time, developing a poisonous film to protect its body.

attacks.name: Venoshock
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Spiritomb

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavor_text: Its constant mischief and misdeeds resulted in it being bound to an Odd Keystone by a mysterious spell.

name: Shroodle
flavor_text: Though usually a mellow Pokémon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire.

name: Grafaiai

ability.name: Ability: Poison Coating
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: The color of the poisonous saliva depends on what the Pokémon eats. Grafaiai covers its fingers in its saliva and draws patterns on trees in forests.

name: Tinkatink
flavor_text: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.

name: Tinkatuff

attacks.name: Tenacious Hammer
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.

attacks.name: Terrific Thumping
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 80 more damage.

name: Varoom
flavor_text: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.

name: Revavroom

attacks.name: Spinning Drift
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders— now numbering eight—to generate energy.

name: Gholdengo

attacks.name: Scintillating Surfing
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each [M] Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.

name: Rattata
flavor_text: Its incisors grow continuously throughout its life. If its incisors get too long, this Pokémon becomes unable to eat, and it starves to death.

name: Raticate
flavor_text: People say that it fled from its enemies by using its small webbed hind feet to swim from island to island in Alola.

name: Jigglypuff
flavor_text: It hugely inflates its stomach and sings a mysterious melody. If you hear this melody, you’ll become sleepy right away.

name: Wigglytuff

ability.name: Ability: Comforting Song
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may heal 20 damage from your Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: It has a very fine fur. Take care not to make it angry, or it may inflate steadily and hit with a body slam.

name: Lickitung
flavor_text: If this Pokémon’s sticky saliva gets on you and you don’t clean it off, an intense itch will set in. The itch won’t go away, either.

name: Lickilicky
flavor_text: Lickilicky’s strange tongue can stretch to many times the length of its body. No one has figured out how Lickilicky’s tongue can stretch so far.

name: Bidoof
flavor_text: With nerves of steel, nothing can perturb it. It is more agile and active than it appears.

attacks.name: Carefree Press
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Buneary
flavor_text: If both of Buneary’s ears are rolled up, something is wrong with its body or mind. It’s a sure sign the Pokémon is in need of care.

name: Lopunny
flavor_text: Lopunny is constantly monitoring its surroundings. If danger approaches, this Pokémon responds with superdestructive kicks.

name: Cyclizar

attacks.name: Overacceleration
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Overacceleration attack does +20 damage.

flavor_text: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.

name: Meowscarada

attacks.name: Fighting Claws
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text: This Pokémon uses the reflective fur lining its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating.

name: Buizel
flavor_text: It inflates its flotation sac, keeping its face above water in order to watch for prey movement.

name: Tatsugiri

ability.name: Ability: Retreat Directive
ability.effect: Your Active Dondozo has no Retreat Cost.

flavor_text: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.

ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: The color of the poisonous saliva depends on what the Pokémon eats. Grafaiai covers its fingers in its saliva and draws patterns on trees in forests.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each [M] Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

name: Varoom
flavor_text: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.

name: Revavroom

attacks.name: Spinning Drift
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.
