flavor_text: One of the dangerous UBs, high energy readings can be detected coming from both of its huge arms.

name: Cyclizar

attacks.name: Overacceleration
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Overacceleration attack does +20 damage.

flavor_text: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.

name: Cyclizar

attacks.name: Overacceleration
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Overacceleration attack does +20 damage.

flavor_text: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.

name: Floragato
flavor_text: Floragato deftly wields the vine hidden beneath its long fur, slamming the hard flower bud against its opponents.

name: Crawdaunt

ability.name: Ability: Unruly Claw
ability.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: A rough customer that wildly flails its giant claws. It is said to be extremely hard to raise.

name: Greninja

ability.name: Ability: Water Shuriken
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may do 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.

name: Gardevoir

ability.name: Ability: Psy Shadow
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may take 1 [P] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to the [P] Pokémon in the Active Spot.

flavor_text: To protect its Trainer, it will expend all its psychic power to create a small black hole.

name: Slurpuff

attacks.name: Sweets Relay
attacks.effect: If 1 of your Pokémon used Sweets Relay during your last turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: By taking in a person’s scent, it can sniff out their mental and physical condition. It’s hoped that this skill will have many medical applications.

name: Farfetch’d
flavor_text: The stalk this Pokémon carries in its wings serves as a sword to cut down opponents. In a dire situation, the stalk can also serve as food.

attacks.name: Big Beat
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Big Beat.

attacks.name: Crimson Storm
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Phoenix Turbo
attacks.effect: Take a [R], [W], and [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach them to your Benched Basic Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Dimensional Storm
attacks.effect: Discard 3 [W] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack also does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Circle Circuit
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Benched [L] Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psydrive
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [P] Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Genome Hacking
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

ability.name: Ability: Psychic Connect
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may move all [P] Energy from 1 of your Benched [P] Pokémon to your Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Metallic Turbo
attacks.effect: Take 2 [M] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sol Breaker
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

ability.name: Ability: Rising Road
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may switch it with your Active Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Veevee ’volve
ability.effect: This Pokémon can evolve into any Pokémon that evolves from Eevee if you play it from your hand onto this Pokémon. (This Pokémon can't evolve during your first turn or the turn you play it.)

attacks.name: Elemental Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a [R], [W], and [L] Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ultimate Force
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Fabled Luster
ability.effect: This Pokémon can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

attacks.name: Circle Circuit
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Benched [L] Pokémon.

attacks.name: Chaotic Impact
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

ability.name: Ability: Broken-Space Bellow
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may take a [P] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.

ability.name: Ability: Nightmare Aura
ability.effect: Whenever you attach a [D] Energy from your Energy Zone to this Pokémon, do 20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Pinsir

attacks.name: X-Scissor
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: This Pokémon clamps its pincers down on its prey and then either splits the prey in half or flings it away.

attacks.name: Critical Scissors
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 70 more damage.

name: Wurmple
flavor_text: It lives among the tall grass and in forests. It repels attacks by raising up the spikes on its rear.

name: Silcoon

attacks.name: Harden
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks if that damage is 40 or less.

flavor_text: It drinks dew that collects on its silk and waits for evolution. Its hard cocoon repels attacks.

name: Beautifly

attacks.name: Skill Dive
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: It has an aggressive nature. It stabs prey with its long, narrow mouth to drain the prey’s fluids.

name: Cascoon

attacks.name: Harden
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks if that damage is 40 or less.

flavor_text: It never forgets any attack it endured while in the cocoon. After evolution, it seeks payback.

name: Dustox

attacks.name: Select Powder
attacks.effect: Choose either Poisoned or Confused. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now affected by that Special Condition.

flavor_text: It violently flutters its wings to scatter toxic dust when attacked. It becomes active after sunset.

name: Seedot
flavor_text: It attaches itself to a tree branch using the top of its head. Strong winds can sometimes make it fall.

name: Nuzleaf
flavor_text: They live in holes bored in large trees. The sound of Nuzleaf’s grass flute fills listeners with dread.

name: Shiftry

attacks.name: Nipping Cyclone
attacks.effect: Discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

flavor_text: It lives quietly in the deep forest. It is said to create chilly winter winds with the fans it holds.

name: Shroomish
flavor_text: If it senses danger, it scatters spores from the top of its head to protect itself.

name: Breloom
flavor_text: The seeds on its tail are made of toxic spores. It knocks out foes with quick, virtually invisible punches.

name: Pansage
flavor_text: It’s good at finding berries and gathers them from all over. It’s kind enough to share them with friends.

name: Simisage

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter.

name: Cottonee
flavor_text: It shoots cotton from its body to protect itself. If it gets caught up in hurricane-strength winds, it can get sent to the other side of the Earth.

attacks.name: Grass Knot
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy in your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost.

name: Petilil
flavor_text: If the leaves on its head are pruned with regularity, this Pokémon can be grown into a fine plump shape.

name: Lilligant

ability.name: Ability: Toughness Aroma
ability.effect: Each of your [G] Pokémon gets +20 HP.

flavor_text: No matter how much time and money is spent raising it, its flowers are the most beautiful when they bloom in the wild.

name: Maractus

attacks.name: Dazzle Dance
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavor_text: Arid regions are their habitat. They move rhythmically, making a sound similar to maracas.

name: Virizion

attacks.name: Sacred Sword
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Sacred Sword.

flavor_text: It darts around opponents with a flurry of quick movements, slicing them up with its horns.

name: Skiddo
flavor_text: As long as it has sunlight and water, Skiddo can make energy with the leaves on its body, allowing it to live on rocky mountains barren of food.

name: Gogoat

attacks.name: Double-Edge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavor_text: These Pokémon live in herds in mountainous places. The victor in their contests of clashing horns will become the leader of the herd.

name: Phantump
flavor_text: With a voice like a human child’s, it cries out to lure adults deep into the forest, getting them lost among the trees.

name: Trevenant

attacks.name: Horn Leech
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Small roots that extend from the tips of this Pokémon’s feet can tie into the trees of the forest and give Trevenant control over them.

name: Grookey
flavor_text: It attacks with rapid beats of its stick. As it strikes with amazing speed, it gets more and more pumped.

name: Thwackey
flavor_text: When it’s drumming out rapid beats in battle, it gets so caught up in the rhythm that it won’t even notice that it’s already knocked out its opponent.

name: Rillaboom

ability.name: Ability: Captivating Rhythm
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may flip a coin. If heads, switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

flavor_text: The one with the best drumming techniques becomes the boss of the troop. It has a gentle disposition and values harmony among its group.

name: Growlithe
flavor_text: It’s very friendly and faithful to people. It will try to repel enemies by barking and biting.

name: Arcanine

attacks.name: Fire Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

flavor_text: Its magnificent bark conveys a sense of majesty. Anyone hearing it can’t help but grovel before it.

name: Ponyta
flavor_text: If you’ve been accepted by Ponyta, its burning mane is mysteriously no longer hot to the touch.

attacks.name: Sprinting Flare
attacks.effect: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Ho-Oh

attacks.name: Blessed Burn
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from each of your Benched Basic Pokémon.

flavor_text: It will reveal itself before a pure-hearted Trainer by shining its bright, rainbow-colored wings.

name: Torchic
flavor_text: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Combusken
flavor_text: During a battle, the hot flame in its body increases. Its kicks have outstanding destructive power.

name: Blaziken

attacks.name: Blaze Kick
attacks.effect: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: When facing a tough foe, it looses flames from its wrists. Its powerful legs let it jump clear over buildings.

attacks.name: Mega Burning
attacks.effect: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Pansear
flavor_text: This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Simisear

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: When it gets excited, embers rise from its head and tail and it gets hot. For some reason, it loves sweets.

name: Darumaka

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavor_text: This popular symbol of good fortune will never fall over in its sleep, no matter how it’s pushed or pulled.

name: Darmanitan

attacks.name: Darmani-Hands
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

flavor_text: This Pokémon’s power level rises along with the temperature of its fire, which can reach 2,500 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Litwick
flavor_text: The younger the life this Pokémon absorbs, the brighter and eerier the flame on its head burns.

name: Lampent
flavor_text: It lurks in cities, pretending to be a lamp. Once it finds someone whose death is near, it will trail quietly after them.

name: Chandelure

ability.name: Ability: Slow Sear
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavor_text: In homes illuminated by Chandelure instead of lights, funerals were a constant occurrence— or so it’s said.

name: Heatmor

attacks.name: Tongue Whip
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: A flame serves as its tongue, melting through the hard shell of Durant so that Heatmor can devour their insides.

name: Litleo
flavor_text: The more a Litleo trains its body and spirit by battling mighty enemies, the hotter its mane will grow.

name: Pyroar

attacks.name: Fire Blast
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: The mane of a male Pyroar heats up to over 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit during battle. Merely approaching it will cause severe burns.

name: Turtonator

attacks.name: Shell Trap
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is damaged by an attack, do 20 damage to the Attacking Pokémon.

flavor_text: Eating sulfur in its volcanic habitat is what causes explosive compounds to develop in its shell. Its droppings are also dangerously explosive.

name: Psyduck
flavor_text: If its chronic headache peaks, it may exhibit odd powers. It seems unable to recall such an episode.

name: Golduck
flavor_text: It swims gracefully along on the quiet, slow- moving rivers and lakes of which it is so fond.

name: Magikarp

attacks.name: Waterfall Evolution
attacks.effect: Put a random card from your deck that evolves from this Pokémon onto this Pokémon to evolve it.

flavor_text: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.

name: Gyarados

attacks.name: Hammering Tail
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavor_text: It appears whenever there is world conflict, burning down any place it travels through.

attacks.name: Mega Blaster
attacks.effect: Discard the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck.

name: Lotad
flavor_text: Its leaf grew too large for it to live on land. That is how it began to live floating in the water.

name: Lombre
flavor_text: It lives at the water’s edge where it is sunny. It sleeps on a bed of water grass by day and becomes active at night.

name: Ludicolo

attacks.name: Rhythmic Steps
attacks.effect: If you have exactly 1, 3, or 5 cards in your hand, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: If it hears festive music, it begins moving in rhythm in order to amplify its power.

name: Wailmer
flavor_text: When it sucks in a large volume of seawater, it becomes like a big, bouncy ball. It eats a ton of food daily.

name: Wailord

attacks.name: Whale Pump
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 more damage for each [W] Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: The biggest of all Pokémon. It can dive to a depth of almost 10,000 feet on only one breath.

name: Corphish
flavor_text: It was originally a Pokémon from afar that escaped to the wild. It can adapt to the dirtiest river.

name: Crawdaunt
flavor_text: A brutish Pokémon that loves to battle. It will crash itself into any foe that approaches its nest.

name: Luvdisc

attacks.name: Paired Tackle
attacks.effect: If you have exactly 2, 4, or 6 cards in your hand, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: During the spawning season, countless Luvdisc congregate at coral reefs, turning the waters pink.

name: Panpour
flavor_text: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large.

name: Simipour

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: It prefers places with clean water. When its tuft runs low, it replenishes it by siphoning up water with its tail.

name: Tympole
flavor_text: It uses sound waves to communicate with others of its kind. People and other Pokémon species can’t hear its cries of warning.

name: Palpitoad
flavor_text: On occasion, their cries are sublimely pleasing to the ear. Palpitoad with larger lumps on their bodies can sing with a wider range of sounds.

name: Seismitoad

attacks.name: Split Spiral Punch
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavor_text: This Pokémon is popular among the elderly, who say the vibrations of its lumps are great for massages.

name: Tirtouga
flavor_text: Tirtouga is considered to be the ancestor of many turtle Pokémon. It was restored to life from a fossil.

name: Carracosta

attacks.name: Blocking Shell
attacks.effect: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

flavor_text: This Pokémon emerges from the water in search of prey despite the fact that it moves more slowly on land.

name: Frillish
flavor_text: Legend has it that the residents of a sunken ancient city changed into these Pokémon.

name: Jellicent

ability.name: Ability: Bouncy Body
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, take a [W] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Whenever a full moon hangs in the night sky, schools of Jellicent gather near the surface of the sea, waiting for their prey to appear.

name: Keldeo

attacks.name: Sacred Sword
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Sacred Sword.

flavor_text: It crosses the world, running over the surfaces of oceans and rivers. It appears at scenic waterfronts.

name: Froakie
flavor_text: It protects its skin by covering its body in delicate bubbles. Beneath its happy-go-lucky air, it keeps a watchful eye on its surroundings.

name: Frogadier

attacks.name: Bounce
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its swiftness is unparalleled. It can scale a tower of more than 2,000 feet in a minute’s time.

ability.name: Ability: Shifting Stream
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may switch your Active [W] Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Bergmite
flavor_text: They live in mountainous regions of frigid cold. On rare occasions, they ride on the back of an Avalugg to cross seas and move to new habitats.

name: Avalugg

attacks.name: Frost Barrier
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: This Pokémon uses its massive icy body to flatten anything that gets in its way. When it’s floating out on the ocean, it looks exactly like drift ice.

name: Chewtle
flavor_text: A popular game among children is to lift up sticks that Chewtle have bitten onto to see whose Chewtle can hang on the longest.

name: Drednaw

attacks.name: Jaw Lock
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavor_text: Drednaw lurks along the shoreline. When prey come to drink water, Drednaw stretches its neck out and chomps down on them.

name: Arrokuda
flavor_text: It takes down prey by charging into them with its hard, pointed jaw. But Arrokuda’s eyesight is poor, so this tactic has a low success rate.

name: Barraskewda

attacks.name: Double-Edge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavor_text: It spins its tail fins to propel itself, surging forward at speeds of over 100 knots before ramming prey and spearing into them.

name: Eiscue

ability.name: Ability: Ice Face
ability.effect: If this Pokémon has full HP, it takes −40 damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: If you lick the ice covering its face, you’ll find it has a faintly salty taste. This species rode here on ocean currents from a cold, faraway land.

ability.name: Ability: Electromagnetic Wall
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, whenever your opponent attaches an Energy from their Energy Zone to 1 of their Pokémon, do 20 damage to that Pokémon.

name: Mareep
flavor_text: Its fleece grows continually. In the summer, the fleece is fully shed, but it grows back in a week.

name: Flaaffy
flavor_text: Because of its rubbery, electricity-resistant skin, it can store lots of electricity in its fur.

name: Ampharos

attacks.name: Zapping Bullet
attacks.effect: 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon is chosen at random. This attack also does 20 damage to it.

flavor_text: When it gets dark, the light from its bright, shiny tail can be seen from far away on the ocean’s surface.

attacks.name: Lightning Lancer
attacks.effect: 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon is chosen at random 3 times. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, also do 20 damage to it.

name: Shinx
flavor_text: The extension and contraction of its muscles generates electricity. Its fur glows when it’s in trouble.

name: Luxio
flavor_text: By gathering their tails together, they collectively generate powerful electricity from their claws.

name: Luxray

attacks.name: Flash Impact
attacks.effect: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Luxray’s ability to see through objects comes in handy when it’s scouting for danger.

name: Pachirisu

attacks.name: Attack the Wound
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: A pair may be seen rubbing their cheek pouches together in an effort to share stored electricity.

name: Blitzle
flavor_text: Its mane shines when it discharges electricity. They use the frequency and rhythm of these flashes to communicate.

name: Zebstrika
flavor_text: They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates.

name: Joltik
flavor_text: Joltik can be found clinging to other Pokémon. It’s soaking up static electricity because it can’t produce a charge on its own.

name: Galvantula
flavor_text: It lays traps of electrified threads near the nests of bird Pokémon, aiming to snare chicks that are not yet good at flying.

name: Dedenne

attacks.name: Electric Nibbling
attacks.effect: Discard a [L] Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Dedenne emit electrical waves from the whiskers on their cheeks to communicate with each other. When low on electricity, they curl up and sleep.

name: Yamper

attacks.name: Roar
attacks.effect: Switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

flavor_text: This gluttonous Pokémon only assists people with their work because it wants treats. As it runs, it crackles with electricity.

name: Boltund
flavor_text: It sends electricity through its legs to boost their strength. Running at top speed, it easily breaks 50 mph.

name: Natu
flavor_text: Because its wings aren’t yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always staring at something.

name: Xatu
flavor_text: This odd Pokémon can see both the past and the future. It eyes the sun’s movement all day.

name: Misdreavus

attacks.name: Double Spin
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: It loves to bite and yank people’s hair from behind without warning, just to see their shocked reactions.

name: Mismagius
flavor_text: Its cries sound like incantations to torment the foe. It appears where you least expect it.

name: Sableye

attacks.name: Dirty Throw
attacks.effect: Discard a card from your hand. If you can't, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: Materials from gems it has eaten float to the surface of its body and can form an infinite number of patterns among individuals.

attacks.name: Mega Harmony
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Duskull

attacks.name: Ambush
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: Making itself invisible, it silently sneaks up to prey. It has the ability to slip through thick walls.

name: Dusclops
flavor_text: It seeks drifting will-o’-the-wisps and sucks them into its empty body. What happens inside is a mystery.

name: Dusknoir

ability.name: Ability: Fade into Darkness
ability.effect: When this Pokémon is Knocked Out, flip a coin. If heads, your opponent can't get any points for it.

flavor_text: With the mouth on its belly, Dusknoir swallows its target whole. The soul is the only thing eaten— Dusknoir disgorges the body before departing.

name: Jirachi

attacks.name: Star Drop
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: It is said to have the ability to grant any wish for just one week every thousand years.

name: Drifloon

attacks.name: Wind Blast
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Because of the way it floats aimlessly, an old folktale calls it a “signpost for wandering spirits.”

name: Drifblim

attacks.name: Balloon Barrage
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: They carry people and Pokémon, but the wind can catch them, so there can’t be a fixed destination.

name: Chingling

attacks.name: Jingly Noise
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Item cards from their hand.

flavor_text: There is an orb inside its mouth. When it hops, the orb bounces all over and makes a ringing sound.

name: Yamask
flavor_text: The spirit of a person from a bygone age became this Pokémon. It rambles through ruins, searching for someone who knows its face.

name: Cofagrigus

attacks.name: Soul Shot
attacks.effect: Discard 2 cards from your hand. If you can't discard 2 cards, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: There are many depictions of Cofagrigus decorating ancient tombs. They’re symbols of the wealth that kings of bygone eras had.

name: Gothita
flavor_text: Beware of touching the ribbon-shaped feelers that control its psychic power. Gothita will begin bawling if you do.

name: Gothorita
flavor_text: Using its psychic power, it arranges pebbles to form the shapes of constellations. Some people believe this Pokémon came from outer space.

name: Gothitelle

attacks.name: Stellar Cradle
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if they attach Energy from their Energy Zone to the Defending Pokémon, that Pokémon will be Asleep.

flavor_text: It gazes at the stars to predict the future. It acts somewhat detached because it has seen the end of all existence.

name: Spritzee
flavor_text: The scent its body gives off enraptures those who smell it. Noble ladies had no shortage of love for Spritzee.

name: Aromatisse

attacks.name: Confounding Cologne
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavor_text: The scents Aromatisse can produce range from sweet smells that bolster allies to foul smells that sap an opponent’s will to fight.

name: Swirlix

attacks.name: Cotton Guard
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: The sweet smell of cotton candy perfumes Swirlix’s fluffy fur. This Pokémon spits out sticky string to tangle up its enemies.

name: Slurpuff

attacks.name: Draining Kiss
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Slurpuff’s fur contains a lot of air, making it soft to the touch and lighter than it looks.

name: Carbink

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: It’s said that somewhere in the world, there’s a mineral vein housing a large pack of slumbering Carbink. It’s also said that this pack has a queen.

name: Klefki

ability.name: Ability: Dismantling Keys
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon. If you do, discard this Pokémon.

flavor_text: In the past, noble families entrusted their vault keys to a Klefki. They passed the Klefki down through the generations, taking good care of it.

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Watch Over
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may heal 20 damage from your Active Pokémon.

name: Sandshrew
flavor_text: It burrows into the ground to create its nest. If hard stones impede its tunneling, it uses its sharp claws to shatter them and then carries on digging.

name: Sandslash
flavor_text: It climbs trees by hooking on with its sharp claws. Sandslash shares the berries it gathers, dropping them down to Sandshrew waiting below the tree.

attacks.name: Quick Straight
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness.

name: Sudowoodo

attacks.name: Fight Back
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: To avoid being attacked, it does nothing but mimic a tree. It hates water and flees from rain.

name: Makuhita
flavor_text: It toughens up by slamming into thick trees over and over. It gains a sturdy body and dauntless spirit.

name: Hariyama

attacks.name: Slapping Knockdown
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: It stomps on the ground to build power. It can send a 10-ton truck flying with a straight-arm punch.

name: Hippopotas
flavor_text: It shrouds itself in sand to ward off germs. It travels easily through the sands of the desert.

name: Hippowdon

attacks.name: Crashing Fangs
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, during your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavor_text: It brandishes its gaping mouth in a display of fearsome strength. It raises vast quantities of sand while attacking.

name: Sandile
flavor_text: They live hidden under hot desert sands in order to keep their body temperature from dropping.

name: Krokorok
flavor_text: Thanks to the special membrane covering its eyes, it can see its surroundings clearly, even in the middle of the night.

name: Krookodile

attacks.name: Chomp Chomp Bite
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its unique faculty of sight can detect small prey more than 30 miles away, even in the midst of a sandstorm.

name: Archen
flavor_text: Archen is said to be the ancestor of bird Pokémon. It lived in treetops, eating berries and bug Pokémon.

name: Archeops

attacks.name: Wild Spin
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. During your next turn, this Pokémon's Wild Spin attack does +20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: Though capable of flight, Archeops was apparently better at hunting on the ground.

name: Golett
flavor_text: This Pokémon was created from clay. It received orders from its master many thousands of years ago, and it still follows those orders to this day.

name: Golurk

attacks.name: Heavy Rocket
attacks.effect: Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. This attack does 60 damage for each Pokémon with a Retreat Cost of 3 or more you find there. Shuffle the revealed cards back into your deck.

flavor_text: There’s a theory that inside Golurk is a perpetual motion machine that produces limitless energy, but this belief hasn’t been proven.

name: Terrakion

attacks.name: Sacred Sword
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Sacred Sword.

flavor_text: It has phenomenal power. It will mercilessly crush anyone or anything that bullies small Pokémon.

name: Pancham
flavor_text: Wanting to make sure it’s taken seriously, Pancham’s always giving others a glare. But if it’s not focusing, it ends up smiling.

name: Crabrawler
flavor_text: If it loses its pincers, they’ll quickly regrow. The pincers are popular ingredients in paella since their shells produce a tasty soup stock.

name: Crabominable

attacks.name: Last-Chance Punch
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon's remaining HP is 30 or less, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: Though its punches are powerful, this Pokémon’s movements are sluggish. It blows icy bubbles from its mouth to immobilize its opponents.

name: Stufful
flavor_text: The way it protects itself by flailing its arms may be an adorable sight, but stay well away. This is flailing that can snap thick tree trunks.

name: Bewear
flavor_text: The moves it uses to take down its prey would make a martial artist jealous. It tucks subdued prey under its arms to carry them to its nest.

name: Sandygast

attacks.name: Sand Attack
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to use an attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen.

flavor_text: It flings sand into the eyes of its prey and tries to close in on them while they’re blinded, but since Sandygast is so slow, the prey tends to escape.

name: Palossand

attacks.name: Life Sucker
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: From the hollows in its arms, it fires the bones of its victims, which are all dried up after being drained of their vitality.

name: Rolycoly
flavor_text: Chunks of the surface of this Pokémon’s body that have grown old and flaked off have long been used for fuel as an alternative to coal.

name: Carkol
flavor_text: Due to the coal tar created inside it, the heap of coal on Carkol’s back never falls apart, even when the Pokémon rolls around at high speeds.

name: Coalossal

attacks.name: Coal Drop
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a [G] Pokémon, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: It’s gentle usually but fearsome when angered. With a body that burns at over 2,700 degrees Fahrenheit, it crushes foes and turns them to ash.

name: Murkrow
flavor_text: If spotted, it will lure an unwary person into chasing it, then lose the pursuer on mountain trails.

name: Honchkrow

attacks.name: Evil Admonition
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 more damage for each of your opponent's Pokémon in play that has an Ability.

flavor_text: A single cry from this nocturnal Pokémon, and more than 100 of its Murkrow cronies will assemble.

name: Absol

attacks.name: Ominous Claw
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent reveals their hand. Choose a Supporter card you find there and discard it.

flavor_text: Because of this Pokémon’s ability to detect danger, people mistook Absol as a bringer of doom.

attacks.name: Darkness Claw
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand. Choose a Supporter card you find there and discard it.

name: Skorupi
flavor_text: It attacks using the claws on its tail. Once locked in its grip, its prey is unable to move as this Pokémon’s poison seeps in.

name: Drapion

attacks.name: Stun Poison
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned and Paralyzed.

flavor_text: It’s so vicious that it’s called the Sand Demon. Yet when confronted by Hippowdon, Drapion keeps a low profile and will never pick a fight.

name: Darkrai

attacks.name: Shadow Cage
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavor_text: It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon.

name: Deino
flavor_text: It nests deep inside a cave. Food there is scarce, so Deino will sink its teeth into anything that moves and attempt to eat it.

name: Zweilous
flavor_text: The two heads have different likes and dislikes. Because the heads fight with each other, Zweilous gets stronger without needing to rely on others.

name: Hydreigon

attacks.name: Hyper Ray
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Roar in Unison
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may take 2 [D] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon. If you do, do 30 damage to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It’s said that Hydreigon grew ferocious because people in times long past loathed it, considering it to be evil incarnate and attacking it relentlessly.

name: Pangoro

attacks.name: Overdrive Smash
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Overdrive Smash attack does +30 damage.

flavor_text: Using its leaf, Pangoro can predict the moves of its opponents. It strikes with punches that can turn a dump truck into scrap with just one hit.

name: Skrelp
flavor_text: This Pokémon is a poor swimmer. If it’s caught in a fierce storm, it will sometimes get washed far away and become unable to return to its home.

ability.name: Ability: Poison Point
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, the Attacking Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Mareanie

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: It has excellent regenerative capabilities. Legs that a Mareanie has lost have a very bitter, astringent flavor—they’re not suitable as food.

name: Toxapex

attacks.name: Venoshock
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text: Toxapex gets into fierce battles with Bruxish over areas where warm ocean currents flow, but the odds are always against it.

name: Impidimp
flavor_text: They live in groups, pestering and playing pranks on each other to polish their troublemaking skills.

name: Morgrem

attacks.name: False Surrender
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon absorbs negative emotions and turns them into energy. It’s popular with people who tend to think gloomy thoughts.

name: Grimmsnarl
flavor_text: It lives deep within the forest. Even after evolving into this splendid form, it hasn’t given up on its petty misdeeds and pranks.

name: Ferroseed
flavor_text: Mossy caves are their preferred dwellings. Enzymes contained in mosses help Ferroseed’s spikes grow big and strong.

name: Ferrothorn

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: Its spikes are harder than steel. This Pokémon crawls across rock walls by stabbing the spikes on its feelers into the stone.

name: Durant

attacks.name: Bite Together
attacks.effect: If Durant is on your Bench, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: They lay their eggs deep inside their nests. When attacked by Heatmor, they retaliate using their massive mandibles.

name: Cobalion

attacks.name: Sacred Sword
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Sacred Sword.

flavor_text: It has a body and heart of steel. It worked with its allies to punish people when they hurt Pokémon.

name: Honedge
flavor_text: The blue eye on the sword’s handguard is the true body of Honedge. With its old cloth, it drains people’s lives away.

name: Doublade
flavor_text: The two swords employ a strategy of rapidly alternating between offense and defense to bring down their prey.

name: Aegislash

ability.name: Ability: Cursed Metal
ability.effect: Attacks used by your [P] Pokémon and [M] Pokémon do +30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Once upon a time, a king with an Aegislash reigned over the land. His Pokémon eventually drained him of life, and his kingdom fell with him.

name: Meltan
flavor_text: It dissolves and eats metal. Circulating liquid metal within its body is how it generates energy.

attacks.name: Metal Arms
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 50 more damage.

name: Corviknight

attacks.name: Iron Wings
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [M] Energy from this Pokémon. During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −50 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: Although its wings have partly turned to steel and become heavy as a result, this Pokémon flies through the skies with ease.

name: Druddigon

attacks.name: Giga Claw
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: Druddigon are vicious and cunning. They take up residence in nests dug out by other Pokémon, treating the stolen nests as their own lairs.

name: Goomy

ability.name: Ability: Sticky Membrane
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, attacks used by your opponent's Active Pokémon cost 1 [C] more.

flavor_text: Goomy’s horns are excellent sensory organs that cover all five of Goomy’s senses. Goomy picks up on danger from the movement of the air.

name: Sliggoo
flavor_text: When Sliggoo senses danger, the mucus coating its entire body becomes more concentrated— it’ll dissolve anything.

name: Goodra

attacks.name: Spiral Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 40 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon is uncontrollable when enraged. It rampages on and on, lashing its tail with enough power to send a dump truck flying.

name: Pidgey
flavor_text: It is docile and prefers to avoid conflict. If disturbed, however, it can ferociously strike back.

name: Pidgeotto
flavor_text: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this Pokémon will fiercely peck at any intruder.

name: Pidgeot

attacks.name: Twister
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon. If both of them are tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: It spreads its gorgeous wings widely to intimidate enemies. It races through the skies at Mach-2 speed.

attacks.name: Wild Tackle
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

name: Eevee

ability.name: Ability: Boosted Evolution
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, it can evolve during your first turn or the turn you play it.

flavor_text: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element stones.

name: Aipom

attacks.name: Tail Smash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: It searches for prey from the tops of trees. When it spots its favorite food, Bounsweet, Aipom gets excited and pounces.

name: Ambipom

attacks.name: Excited Tail
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads. If this Pokémon has Lucky Mittens attached, flip 4 coins instead.

flavor_text: It uses its tails for everything. If it wraps both of its tails around you and gives you a squeeze, that’s proof it really likes you.

name: Miltank

attacks.name: Body Slam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: This Pokémon needs to be milked every day, or else it will fall ill. The flavor of Miltank milk changes with the seasons.

name: Zigzagoon
flavor_text: A Pokémon with abundant curiosity. It shows an interest in everything, so it always zigzags.

name: Linoone
flavor_text: It uses its explosive speed and razor-sharp claws to bring down prey. Running along winding paths is not its strong suit.

name: Whismur
flavor_text: When Whismur cries, the sound of its own voice startles it, making the Pokémon cry even louder. It cries until it’s exhausted, then it falls asleep.

name: Loudred
flavor_text: The force of this Pokémon’s loud voice isn’t just the sound—it’s also the wave of air pressure that blows opponents away and damages them.

name: Exploud

attacks.name: Booming Roar
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Item cards from their hand.

flavor_text: This Pokémon can do more than just shout. To communicate with others of its kind, it’ll emit all sorts of sounds from the holes in its body.

name: Skitty

attacks.name: Play Rough
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: It shows its cute side by chasing its own tail until it gets dizzy.

name: Delcatty

ability.name: Ability: Search for Friends
ability.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may put a Supporter card from your discard pile into your hand.

flavor_text: It is highly popular among female Trainers for its sublime fur. It does not keep a nest.

name: Spinda

attacks.name: Dizzying Headbutt
attacks.effect: Both Active Pokémon are now Confused.

flavor_text: Each Spinda’s spot pattern is different. With its stumbling movements, it evades opponents’ attacks brilliantly!

name: Swablu

attacks.name: Sing
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: It can’t relax if it or its surroundings are not clean. It wipes off dirt with its wings.

name: Altaria

attacks.name: Do the Wave
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: On sunny days, it flies freely through the sky and blends into the clouds. It sings in a beautiful soprano.

name: Chatot

attacks.name: Sleepy Song
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: It can learn and speak human words. If they gather, they all learn the same saying.

name: Patrat
flavor_text: Extremely cautious, one of them will always be on the lookout, but it won’t notice a foe coming from behind.

name: Watchog

attacks.name: Biting Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: When they see an enemy, their tails stand high, and they spit the seeds of berries stored in their cheek pouches.

name: Lillipup

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

flavor_text: This Pokémon is far brighter than the average child, and Lillipup won’t forget the love it receives or any abuse it suffers.

name: Herdier
flavor_text: The black fur that covers this Pokémon’s body is dense and springy. Even sharp fangs bounce right off.

name: Stoutland

attacks.name: Dangerous Bite
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Basic Pokémon, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text: Stoutland is immensely proud of its impressive moustache. It’s said that moustache length is what determines social standing among this species.

name: Rufflet
flavor_text: With its sharp claws, this Pokémon pierces its prey, and then it pecks at them. Although it also consumes berries, it’s a carnivore at heart.

name: Braviary
flavor_text: For the sake of its friends, this brave warrior of the sky will not stop battling, even if injured.

name: Furfrou

ability.name: Ability: Fur Coat
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: Left alone, its fur will grow longer and longer, but it will only allow someone it trusts to cut it.

name: Furfrou

ability.name: Ability: Fur Coat
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: Left alone, its fur will grow longer and longer, but it will only allow someone it trusts to cut it.

name: Furfrou

ability.name: Ability: Fur Coat
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: Left alone, its fur will grow longer and longer, but it will only allow someone it trusts to cut it.

name: Rookidee
flavor_text: The females are fussier than the males. If another creature dirties a female Rookidee’s wings, it’ll peck the offender relentlessly in a burning rage.

name: Corvisquire
flavor_text: This intelligent Pokémon will quickly learn how to use any tool it can hold in its beak or its talons.

name: Wooloo

attacks.name: Continuous Tumble
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: If its fleece grows too long, Wooloo won’t be able to move. Cloth made with the wool of this Pokémon is surprisingly strong.

name: Dubwool

attacks.name: Boundless Power
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavor_text: Its majestic horns are meant only to impress the opposite gender. They never see use in battle.

name: Beautifly

attacks.name: Skill Dive
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: It has an aggressive nature. It stabs prey with its long, narrow mouth to drain the prey’s fluids.

name: Skiddo
flavor_text: As long as it has sunlight and water, Skiddo can make energy with the leaves on its body, allowing it to live on rocky mountains barren of food.

name: Rillaboom

ability.name: Ability: Captivating Rhythm
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may flip a coin. If heads, switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

flavor_text: The one with the best drumming techniques becomes the boss of the troop. It has a gentle disposition and values harmony among its group.

name: Growlithe
flavor_text: It’s very friendly and faithful to people. It will try to repel enemies by barking and biting.

name: Chandelure

ability.name: Ability: Slow Sear
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavor_text: In homes illuminated by Chandelure instead of lights, funerals were a constant occurrence— or so it’s said.

name: Magikarp

attacks.name: Waterfall Evolution
attacks.effect: Put a random card from your deck that evolves from this Pokémon onto this Pokémon to evolve it.

flavor_text: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.

name: Ludicolo

attacks.name: Rhythmic Steps
attacks.effect: If you have exactly 1, 3, or 5 cards in your hand, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: If it hears festive music, it begins moving in rhythm in order to amplify its power.

name: Jellicent

ability.name: Ability: Bouncy Body
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, take a [W] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Whenever a full moon hangs in the night sky, schools of Jellicent gather near the surface of the sea, waiting for their prey to appear.

name: Keldeo

attacks.name: Sacred Sword
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Sacred Sword.

flavor_text: It crosses the world, running over the surfaces of oceans and rivers. It appears at scenic waterfronts.

name: Eiscue

ability.name: Ability: Ice Face
ability.effect: If this Pokémon has full HP, it takes −40 damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: If you lick the ice covering its face, you’ll find it has a faintly salty taste. This species rode here on ocean currents from a cold, faraway land.

name: Luxray

attacks.name: Flash Impact
attacks.effect: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Luxray’s ability to see through objects comes in handy when it’s scouting for danger.

name: Cofagrigus

attacks.name: Soul Shot
attacks.effect: Discard 2 cards from your hand. If you can't discard 2 cards, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: There are many depictions of Cofagrigus decorating ancient tombs. They’re symbols of the wealth that kings of bygone eras had.

name: Gothita
flavor_text: Beware of touching the ribbon-shaped feelers that control its psychic power. Gothita will begin bawling if you do.

name: Makuhita
flavor_text: It toughens up by slamming into thick trees over and over. It gains a sturdy body and dauntless spirit.

name: Hippowdon

attacks.name: Crashing Fangs
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, during your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavor_text: It brandishes its gaping mouth in a display of fearsome strength. It raises vast quantities of sand while attacking.

name: Archeops

attacks.name: Wild Spin
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. During your next turn, this Pokémon's Wild Spin attack does +20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: Though capable of flight, Archeops was apparently better at hunting on the ground.

name: Pancham
flavor_text: Wanting to make sure it’s taken seriously, Pancham’s always giving others a glare. But if it’s not focusing, it ends up smiling.

name: Honchkrow

attacks.name: Evil Admonition
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 more damage for each of your opponent's Pokémon in play that has an Ability.

flavor_text: A single cry from this nocturnal Pokémon, and more than 100 of its Murkrow cronies will assemble.

name: Hydreigon

attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Roar in Unison
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may take 2 [D] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon. If you do, do 30 damage to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It’s said that Hydreigon grew ferocious because people in times long past loathed it, considering it to be evil incarnate and attacking it relentlessly.

attacks.name: Sprinting Flare
attacks.effect: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Mega Burning
attacks.effect: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Mega Blaster
attacks.effect: Discard the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck.

ability.name: Ability: Shifting Stream
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may switch your Active [W] Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Electromagnetic Wall
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, whenever your opponent attaches an Energy from their Energy Zone to 1 of their Pokémon, do 20 damage to that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Lightning Lancer
attacks.effect: 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon is chosen at random 3 times. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, also do 20 damage to it.

attacks.name: Mega Harmony
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psychic

attacks.name: Darkness Claw
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand. Choose a Supporter card you find there and discard it.

ability.name: Ability: Poison Point
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, the Attacking Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Metal Arms
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 50 more damage.

attacks.name: Wild Tackle
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Mega Burning
attacks.effect: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Mega Blaster
attacks.effect: Discard the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Mega Harmony
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Bellsprout
flavor_text: Even though its body is extremely skinny, it is blindingly fast when catching its prey.

name: Weepinbell
flavor_text: The leafy parts act as cutters for slashing foes. It spits a fluid that dissolves everything.

name: Victreebel

ability.name: Ability: Fragrance Trap
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, once during your turn, you may switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Basic Pokémon to the Active Spot.

flavor_text: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.

name: Rowlet

attacks.name: Skill Dive
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: It sends its feathers, which are as sharp as blades, flying in attack. Its legs are strong, so its kicks are also formidable.

name: Dartrix

attacks.name: Skill Dive
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: This narcissistic Pokémon is a clean freak. If you don’t groom it diligently, it may stop listening to you.

name: Moltres

attacks.name: Sky Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: It’s one of the legendary bird Pokémon. When Moltres flaps its flaming wings, they glimmer with a dazzling red glow.

name: Litten

attacks.name: Heat Tackle
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavor_text: If you try too hard to get close to it, it won’t open up to you. Even if you do grow close, giving it too much affection is still a no-no.

name: Torracat

attacks.name: Heat Tackle
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavor_text: Torracat will let its Trainer coddle it once they’ve grown close, but it’s a powerful, sharp-clawed Pokémon, so its Trainer gets covered in scratches.

name: Poliwag

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Put 1 random Poliwag from your deck onto your Bench.

flavor_text: For Poliwag, swimming is easier than walking. The swirl pattern on its belly is actually part of the Pokémon’s innards showing through the skin.

name: Poliwhirl
flavor_text: Staring at the swirl on its belly causes drowsiness. This trait of Poliwhirl’s has been used in place of lullabies to get children to go to sleep.

name: Poliwrath

ability.name: Ability: Counterattack
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, do 20 damage to the Attacking Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its body is solid muscle. When swimming through cold seas, Poliwrath uses its impressive arms to smash through drift ice and plow forward.

name: Articuno

attacks.name: Ice Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: It’s said that this Pokémon’s beautiful blue wings are made of ice. Articuno flies over snowy mountains, its long tail fluttering along behind it.

name: Manaphy

attacks.name: Oceanic Gift
attacks.effect: Choose 2 of your Benched Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, take a [W] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to that Pokémon.

flavor_text: It is born with a wondrous power that lets it bond with any kind of Pokémon.

name: Popplio

attacks.name: Sing
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: The balloons it inflates with its nose grow larger and larger as it practices day by day.

name: Brionne
flavor_text: It gets excited when it sees a dance it doesn’t know. This hard worker practices diligently until it can learn that dance.

name: Zapdos

attacks.name: Raging Thunder
attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon has complete control over electricity. There are tales of Zapdos nesting in the dark depths of pitch-black thunderclouds.

name: Oricorio

ability.name: Ability: Safeguard
ability.effect: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon ex.

flavor_text: This form of Oricorio has sipped yellow nectar. It uses nimble steps to approach opponents, then knocks them out with electric punches.

name: Zeraora

ability.name: Ability: Thunderclap Flash
ability.effect: At the end of your first turn, take a [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It electrifies its claws and tears its opponents apart with them. Even if they dodge its attack, they’ll be electrocuted by the flying sparks.

name: Drowzee
flavor_text: It remembers every dream it eats. It rarely eats the dreams of adults because children’s are much tastier.

name: Hypno

ability.name: Ability: Sleep Pendulum
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of psi moves, such as Hypnosis and Confusion.

name: Geodude
flavor_text: Geodude that have lived a long life have had all their edges smoothed out until they’re totally round. They also have a calm, quiet disposition.

name: Graveler
flavor_text: It climbs up cliffs as it heads toward the peak of a mountain. As soon as it reaches the summit, it rolls back down the way it came.

name: Golem

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: When Golem grow old, they stop shedding their shells. Those that have lived a long, long time have shells green with moss.

name: Rockruff

attacks.name: Signs of Evolution
attacks.effect: Put a random card that evolves from Rockruff from your deck into your hand.

flavor_text: This Pokémon is very friendly when it’s young. Its disposition becomes vicious once it matures, but it never forgets the kindness of its master.

name: Alolan Diglett
flavor_text: The metal-rich geology of this Pokémon’s habitat caused it to develop steel whiskers on its head.

name: Meowth

attacks.name: Pay Day
attacks.effect: Draw 1 card.

flavor_text: All it does is sleep during the daytime. At night, it patrols its territory with its eyes aglow.

name: Persian

attacks.name: Shadow Claw
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

flavor_text: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.

name: Doduo
flavor_text: A two-headed Pokémon that was discovered as a sudden mutation. It runs at a pace of over 60 miles per hour.

name: Dodrio
flavor_text: An enemy that takes its eyes off any of the three heads—even for a second—will get pecked severely.

name: Bidoof

attacks.name: Super Fang
attacks.effect: Halve your opponent's Active Pokémon's remaining HP, rounded down.

flavor_text: With nerves of steel, nothing can perturb it. It is more agile and active than it appears.

attacks.name: Pierce the Pain
attacks.effect: This attack does 100 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that have damage on them.

attacks.name: Fire Fang
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Scar-Charged Smash
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Dimensional Storm
attacks.effect: Discard 3 [W] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack also does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hydro Pump
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 1 extra [W] Energy attached, this attack does 40 more damage.

attacks.name: Sparkling Aria
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunderbolt
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Plasma Hurricane
attacks.effect: Take a [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Lycanfang
attacks.effect: Discard a [F] Energy from this Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Offload Pass
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, move all [F] Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Triplet Headbutt
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Metallic Turbo
attacks.effect: Take 2 [M] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Carefree Press
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ultimate Force
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Fabled Luster
ability.effect: This Pokémon can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

name: Lilligant

ability.name: Ability: Toughness Aroma
ability.effect: Each of your [G] Pokémon gets +20 HP.

flavor_text: No matter how much time and money is spent raising it, its flowers are the most beautiful when they bloom in the wild.

name: Klefki

ability.name: Ability: Dismantling Keys
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon. If you do, discard this Pokémon.

flavor_text: In the past, noble families entrusted their vault keys to a Klefki. They passed the Klefki down through the generations, taking good care of it.

name: Bulbasaur
flavor_text: While it is young, it uses the nutrients that are stored in the seed on its back in order to grow.

name: Ivysaur

attacks.name: Synthesis
attacks.effect: Take 2 [G] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: The more sunlight Ivysaur bathes in, the more strength wells up within it, allowing the bud on its back to grow larger.

name: Venusaur

attacks.name: Poisonous Whip
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: A bewitching aroma wafts from its flower. The fragrance becalms those engaged in a battle.

attacks.name: Critical Bloom
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned and Asleep.

name: Spinarak
flavor_text: Although the poison from its fangs isn’t that strong, it’s potent enough to weaken prey that gets caught in its web.

name: Ariados

ability.name: Ability: Trap Territory
ability.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost is 1 more.

flavor_text: It spews threads from its mouth to catch its prey. When night falls, it leaves its web to go hunt aggressively.

name: Sunkern
flavor_text: It is very weak. Its only means of defense is to shake its leaves desperately at its attacker.

name: Sunflora

attacks.name: Quick-Grow Beam
attacks.effect: If Quick-Grow Extract is in your discard pile, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: Since it converts sunlight into energy, it is always looking in the direction of the sun.

name: Burmy
flavor_text: If its cloak is broken in battle, it quickly remakes the cloak with materials nearby.

name: Mothim
flavor_text: It flutters around at night and steals honey from the Combee hive.

name: Charmander
flavor_text: From the time it is born, a flame burns at the tip of its tail. Its life would end if the flame were to go out.

name: Charmeleon

ability.name: Ability: Ignition
ability.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may take a [R] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to your Active [R] Pokémon.

flavor_text: If it becomes agitated during battle, it spouts intense flames, incinerating its surroundings.

name: Charizard

attacks.name: Inferno Onrush
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavor_text: Its wings can carry this Pokémon close to an altitude of 4,600 feet. It blows out fire at very high temperatures.

attacks.name: Crimson Dive
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

name: Houndour

attacks.name: Roar
attacks.effect: Switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

flavor_text: It uses different kinds of cries for communicating with others of its kind and for pursuing its prey.

name: Houndoom
flavor_text: Upon hearing its eerie howls, other Pokémon get the shivers and head straight back to their nests.

name: Squirtle
flavor_text: When it feels threatened, it draws its limbs inside its shell and sprays water from its mouth.

name: Wartortle

ability.name: Ability: Shell Shield
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks.

flavor_text: It cleverly controls its furry ears and tail to maintain its balance while swimming.

name: Blastoise

attacks.name: Double Splash
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [W] Energy attached, this attack also does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: The rocket cannons on its shell fire jets of water capable of punching holes through thick steel.

attacks.name: Triple Bombardment
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 3 extra [W] Energy attached, this attack also does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Basculin

attacks.name: Surprise Strike
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: Anglers love the fight this Pokémon puts up on the hook. And there are always more to catch— many people release them into lakes illicitly.

name: Clauncher
flavor_text: Clauncher’s claws will regrow if they fall off. The meat inside the claws is edible, but it has a distinct flavor that doesn’t appeal to all tastes.

name: Clawitzer

attacks.name: Aqua Shower
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: The cannonballs of seawater that Clawitzer launches from its claw are powerful enough to punch through tanker hulls.

name: Magnemite
flavor_text: The electromagnetic waves emitted by the units at the sides of its head expel antigravity, which allows it to float.

name: Magneton

attacks.name: Spark
attacks.effect: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Three Magnemite are linked by a strong magnetic force. Earaches will occur if you get too close.

name: Magnezone

attacks.name: Mirror Shot
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to use an attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen.

flavor_text: Exposure to a special magnetic field changed Magneton’s molecular structure, turning it into Magnezone.

name: Emolga
flavor_text: This Pokémon absolutely loves sweet berries. Sometimes it stuffs its cheeks full of so much food that it can’t fly properly.

name: Helioptile

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: The sun powers this Pokémon’s electricity generation. Interruption of that process stresses Helioptile to the point of weakness.

name: Heliolisk

attacks.name: Thunderbolt
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: One Heliolisk basking in the sun with its frill outspread is all it would take to produce enough electricity to power a city.

name: Misdreavus

attacks.name: Lead
attacks.effect: Put a random Supporter card from your deck into your hand.

flavor_text: It loves to bite and yank people’s hair from behind without warning, just to see their shocked reactions.

name: Mismagius

attacks.name: Stored Power
attacks.effect: Move all [P] Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its cries sound like incantations to torment the foe. It appears where you least expect it.

name: Solosis
flavor_text: Many say that the special liquid covering this Pokémon’s body would allow it to survive in the vacuum of space.

name: Duosion
flavor_text: Its brain has split into two, and the two halves rarely think alike. Its actions are utterly unpredictable.

name: Reuniclus

ability.name: Ability: Infinite Increase
ability.effect: This Pokémon gets +30 HP for each [P] Energy attached to it.

flavor_text: It’s said that drinking the liquid surrounding Reuniclus grants wisdom. Problem is, the liquid is highly toxic to anything besides Reuniclus itself.

name: Spritzee

attacks.name: Sweet Scent
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

flavor_text: The scent its body gives off enraptures those who smell it. Noble ladies had no shortage of love for Spritzee.

name: Aromatisse

attacks.name: Perfume Blast
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon cost 1 [C] more.

flavor_text: The scents Aromatisse can produce range from sweet smells that bolster allies to foul smells that sap an opponent’s will to fight.

name: Xerneas

attacks.name: Geoburst
attacks.effect: This attack's damage is reduced by the amount of damage this Pokémon has on it.

flavor_text: When the horns on its head shine in seven colors, it is said to be sharing everlasting life.

name: Onix

attacks.name: Dig
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It rapidly bores through the ground at 50 mph by squirming and twisting its massive, rugged body.

name: Makuhita
flavor_text: It toughens up by slamming into thick trees over and over. It gains a sturdy body and dauntless spirit.

name: Hariyama
flavor_text: It stomps on the ground to build power. It can send a 10-ton truck flying with a straight-arm punch.

name: Nosepass

attacks.name: Rising Lunge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavor_text: The magnet in Nosepass’s nose provides an unerring compass, making it an excellent partner for Trainers going on a journey.

attacks.name: Rapid Smashers
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 90 damage for each heads. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Mienfoo
flavor_text: Though small, Mienfoo’s temperament is fierce. Any creature that approaches Mienfoo carelessly will be greeted with a flurry of graceful attacks.

name: Mienshao
flavor_text: Delivered at blinding speeds, kicks from this Pokémon can shatter massive boulders into tiny pieces.

name: Grimer
flavor_text: Appears in filthy areas. It thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.

name: Muk

attacks.name: Gunk Shot
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: They love to gather in smelly areas where sludge accumulates, making the stench around them worse.

name: Purrloin

attacks.name: Trip Over
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: Opponents that get drawn in by its adorable behavior come away with stinging scratches from its claws and stinging pride from its laughter.

name: Liepard

attacks.name: Snatch and Flee
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals a random card from their hand and shuffles it into their deck. Shuffle this Pokémon into your deck.

flavor_text: Don’t be fooled by its gorgeous fur and elegant figure. This is a moody and vicious Pokémon.

name: Trubbish
flavor_text: Its favorite places are unsanitary ones. If you leave trash lying around, you could even find one of these Pokémon living in your room.

name: Garbodor

attacks.name: Acid Spray
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon eats trash, which turns into poison inside its body. The main component of the poison depends on what sort of trash was eaten.

name: Steelix

attacks.name: Metal Defender
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon has no Weakness.

flavor_text: It is thought its body transformed as a result of iron accumulating internally from swallowing soil.

attacks.name: Adamantine Rolling
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks and has no Weakness.

name: Probopass

attacks.name: Metallic Turbo
attacks.effect: Take 2 [M] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: It exudes strong magnetism from all over. It controls three small units called Mini-Noses.

name: Genesect

attacks.name: Metal Blast
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each [M] Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: This ancient bug Pokémon was altered by Team Plasma. They upgraded the cannon on its back.

name: Ditto

attacks.name: Copy a Friend
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your Benched Pokémon's attacks, except any Pokémon ex, and use it as this attack. If this Pokémon doesn't have the necessary Energy to use that attack, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: It can freely recombine its own cellular structure to transform into other life-forms.

name: Porygon

attacks.name: Stiffen
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: State-of-the-art technology was used to create Porygon. It was the first artificial Pokémon to be created via computer programming.

name: Porygon2
flavor_text: This is a Porygon that was updated with special data. Porygon2 develops itself by learning about many different subjects all on its own.

name: Porygon-Z

attacks.name: Cyberjack
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Trainer card in your opponent's deck.

flavor_text: Porygon-Z had a program installed to allow it to move between dimensions, but the program also caused instability in Porygon-Z’s behavior.

name: Starly

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Put 1 random Starly from your deck onto your Bench.

flavor_text: Because they are weak individually, they form groups. However, they bicker if the group grows too big.

name: Staravia

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: They maintain huge flocks, although fierce scuffles break out between various flocks.

name: Staraptor

attacks.name: Hurricane Wing
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: It never stops attacking even if it is injured. It fusses over the shape of its comb.

name: Buneary

attacks.name: Double Kick
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Buneary can attack by rolling up their ears and then striking with the force created by unrolling them. This attack becomes stronger with training.

name: Lopunny

attacks.name: Double Kick
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Once hot seasons are over, Lopunny’s coat will be replaced with fur that holds a lot of insulating air in preparation for colder weather.

name: Bouffalant

attacks.name: Revenge
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: These Pokémon live in herds of about 20 individuals. Bouffalant that betray the herd will lose the hair on their heads for some reason.

name: Furfrou

ability.name: Ability: Fur Coat
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: Left alone, its fur will grow longer and longer, but it will only allow someone it trusts to cut it.

name: Ariados

ability.name: Ability: Trap Territory
ability.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost is 1 more.

flavor_text: It spews threads from its mouth to catch its prey. When night falls, it leaves its web to go hunt aggressively.

name: Sunflora

attacks.name: Quick-Grow Beam
attacks.effect: If Quick-Grow Extract is in your discard pile, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: Since it converts sunlight into energy, it is always looking in the direction of the sun.

name: Reuniclus

ability.name: Ability: Infinite Increase
ability.effect: This Pokémon gets +30 HP for each [P] Energy attached to it.

flavor_text: It’s said that drinking the liquid surrounding Reuniclus grants wisdom. Problem is, the liquid is highly toxic to anything besides Reuniclus itself.

name: Xerneas

attacks.name: Geoburst
attacks.effect: This attack's damage is reduced by the amount of damage this Pokémon has on it.

flavor_text: When the horns on its head shine in seven colors, it is said to be sharing everlasting life.

name: Trubbish
flavor_text: Its favorite places are unsanitary ones. If you leave trash lying around, you could even find one of these Pokémon living in your room.

name: Buneary

attacks.name: Double Kick
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.
