flavor_text: Buneary can attack by rolling up their ears and then striking with the force created by unrolling them. This attack becomes stronger with training.

attacks.name: Critical Bloom
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned and Asleep.

attacks.name: Crimson Dive
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Triple Bombardment
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 3 extra [W] Energy attached, this attack also does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rapid Smashers
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 90 damage for each heads. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Adamantine Rolling
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks and has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Critical Bloom
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned and Asleep.

attacks.name: Triple Bombardment
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 3 extra [W] Energy attached, this attack also does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rapid Smashers
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 90 damage for each heads. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Adamantine Rolling
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks and has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Crimson Dive
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

name: Oddish

attacks.name: Poison Powder
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: If exposed to moonlight, it starts to move. It roams far and wide at night to scatter its seeds.

name: Gloom
flavor_text: Its pistils exude an incredibly foul odor. The horrid stench can cause fainting at a distance of 1.25 miles.

name: Vileplume

attacks.name: Soothing Scent
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: It has the world’s largest petals. With every step, the petals shake out heavy clouds of toxic pollen.

name: Charizard

attacks.name: Inferno Onrush
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavor_text: Its wings can carry this Pokémon close to an altitude of 4,600 feet. It blows out fire at very high temperatures.

name: Shellder
flavor_text: It is encased in a shell that is harder than diamond. Inside, however, it is surprisingly tender.

name: Cloyster

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: Cloyster that live in seas with harsh tidal currents grow large, sharp spikes on their shells.

name: Sandshrew
flavor_text: It burrows into the ground to create its nest. If hard stones impede its tunneling, it uses its sharp claws to shatter them and then carries on digging.

name: Sandslash
flavor_text: It climbs trees by hooking on with its sharp claws. Sandslash shares the berries it gathers, dropping them down to Sandshrew waiting below the tree.

name: Type: Null

attacks.name: Quick Blow
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavor_text: A Pokémon weapon developed for a specific mission, it went berserk during an experiment, so it was cryogenically frozen.

name: Silvally

attacks.name: Brave Buddies
attacks.effect: If you played a Supporter card from your hand during this turn, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: This is its form once it has awakened and evolved. Freed from its heavy mask, its speed is greatly increased.

attacks.name: Big Beat
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Big Beat.

ability.name: Ability: Psychic Connect
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may move all [P] Energy from 1 of your Benched [P] Pokémon to your Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Grindcore
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sol Breaker
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

ability.name: Ability: Rising Road
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may switch it with your Active Pokémon.

name: Aegislash

ability.name: Ability: Cursed Metal
ability.effect: Attacks used by your [P] Pokémon and [M] Pokémon do +30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Once upon a time, a king with an Aegislash reigned over the land. His Pokémon eventually drained him of life, and his kingdom fell with him.

name: Ledyba
flavor_text: These very cowardly Pokémon join together and use Reflect to protect their nest.

name: Ledian

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: It flies through the night sky, sprinkling sparkly dust. According to some, if that dust sticks to you, good things will happen to you.

name: Shuckle

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: The berries stored in its vaselike shell eventually become a thick, pulpy juice.

name: Roselia

attacks.name: Trip Over
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: It uses the different poisons in each hand separately when it attacks. The stronger its aroma, the healthier it is.

name: Roserade

attacks.name: Poison Ring
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can't retreat.

flavor_text: The poison in its right hand is quick acting. The poison in its left hand is slow acting. Both are life threatening.

name: Cacnea
flavor_text: It lives in arid locations. Its yellow flowers bloom once a year.

name: Cacturne

attacks.name: Spike Rend
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: It lives in deserts. It becomes active at night when it hunts for prey exhausted from the desert’s heat.

name: Chespin
flavor_text: Eating lots of berries makes the bark shell that covers Chespin’s head and body grow sturdier.

name: Quilladin
flavor_text: It can send a trailer flying with a tackle. It’s numb to pain, so even violent collisions don’t faze it.

name: Chesnaught

attacks.name: Needle Lariat
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is damaged by an attack, do 80 damage to the Attacking Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its gentle disposition would have it avoid conflict, but it gives opponents a thrashing with its thorned fists when the situation calls for it.

name: Scatterbug
flavor_text: This Pokémon scatters poisonous powder to repel enemies. It will eat different plants depending on where it lives.

name: Spewpa

attacks.name: Signs of Evolution
attacks.effect: Put a random card that evolves from Spewpa from your deck into your hand.

flavor_text: Spewpa doesn’t live in a fixed location. It roams where it pleases across the fields and mountains, building up the energy it needs to evolve.

name: Vivillon

attacks.name: Vivid Powder
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned and Asleep.

flavor_text: This Pokémon was born in a land where flowers bloom. It scatters colorful, toxic scales from its wings during battle.

name: Buzzwole

attacks.name: Ground Beat
attacks.effect: If your opponent has gotten exactly 1 point, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: Buzzwole goes around showing off its abnormally swollen muscles. It is one kind of Ultra Beast.

name: Gossifleur
flavor_text: It whirls around in the wind while singing a joyous song. This delightful display has charmed many into raising this Pokémon.

name: Eldegoss

attacks.name: Float Up
attacks.effect: You may shuffle this Pokémon and all attached cards into your deck.

flavor_text: The cotton on the head of this Pokémon can be spun into a glossy, gorgeous yarn—a Galar regional specialty.

attacks.name: Energized Leaves
attacks.effect: If the amount of Energy attached to both Active Pokémon is 5 or more, this attack does 60 more damage.

ability.name: Ability: Soothing Wind
ability.effect: Each of your Pokémon that has any Energy attached recovers from all Special Conditions and can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

name: Alolan Marowak

attacks.name: Fiery Bone
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

flavor_text: The cursed flames that light up the bone carried by this Pokémon are said to cause both mental and physical pain that will never fade.

name: Reshiram

attacks.name: Blue Flare
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: When Reshiram’s tail flares, the heat energy moves the atmosphere and changes the world’s weather.

name: Litleo
flavor_text: The more a Litleo trains its body and spirit by battling mighty enemies, the hotter its mane will grow.

name: Pyroar
flavor_text: The females of a pride work together to bring down prey. It’s thanks to them that their pride doesn’t starve.

name: Oricorio

attacks.name: Inspiring Dance
attacks.effect: During your next turn, attacks used by your Pokémon do +20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: This form of Oricorio has sipped red nectar. It whips up blazing flames as it moves to the steps of its passionate dance.

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Pop-Punk
attacks.effect: Discard 3 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Scorbunny
flavor_text: Fire energy gathers in the pads of its feet, raising their temperature. Once hot, Scorbunny’s footpads can deal heavy damage to opponents.

name: Raboot
flavor_text: While it prides itself on its varied kicking moves, it can also deliver powerful headbutts once its flames have heated up its forehead.

name: Cinderace

attacks.name: Fireball Shot
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavor_text: Using a ball that it made out of flames, Cinderace blinds its opponents and keeps them at bay.

name: Hearthflame Mask Ogerpon

attacks.name: Hearthflame Dance
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, take 2 [R] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: In this form, it draws on the power of fire. It spears its enemies with thorn-covered ivy.

name: Alolan Vulpix
flavor_text: In hot weather, this Pokémon makes ice shards with its six tails and sprays them around to cool itself off.

attacks.name: Binding Snow
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't take any Energy from their Energy Zone to attach to their Active Pokémon.

name: Galarian Mr. Mime
flavor_text: It can radiate chilliness from the bottoms of its feet. It’ll spend the whole day tap-dancing on a frozen floor.

name: Galarian Mr. Rime

attacks.name: Triple Spin
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Its amusing movements make it very popular. It releases its psychic power from the pattern on its belly.

name: Delibird

attacks.name: Box of Surprises
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 70 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon. If tails, heal 30 damage from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: It always carries its food with it, wherever it goes. If attacked, it throws its food at the opponent.

name: Mudkip
flavor_text: When it uses its large tail fin, it picks up speed rapidly in the water. It is strong in spite of its small size.

name: Marshtomp
flavor_text: It is at its best when on muddy ground that offers poor footing. It quickly overwhelms opponents that are bogged down and unable to move.

name: Swampert

attacks.name: Large Whirlpool
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from among the Energy attached to all Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

flavor_text: Swampert’s arms are rock-hard. With one swing, they can batter down Swampert’s foes. This Pokémon makes its nest on beautiful beaches.

attacks.name: Strong-Armed Destroyer
attacks.effect: Discard 2 random Energy from among the Energy attached to all Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

name: Vanillite
flavor_text: Supposedly, this Pokémon was born from an icicle. It spews out freezing air at −58 degrees Fahrenheit to make itself more comfortable.

name: Vanillish
flavor_text: It blasts enemies with cold air reaching −148 degrees Fahrenheit, freezing them solid. But it spares their lives afterward—it’s a kind Pokémon.

name: Vanilluxe

attacks.name: Sweets Relay
attacks.effect: If 1 of your Pokémon used Sweets Relay during your last turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: People believe this Pokémon formed when two Vanillish stuck together. Its body temperature is roughly 21 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Cryogonal

attacks.name: Frozen Lock
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Item cards from their hand.

flavor_text: Cryogonal uses its chains of ice to constrict its opponents and then flash-freezes them where they stand.

name: Amaura
flavor_text: Amaura is an ancient Pokémon that has gone extinct. Specimens of this species can sometimes be found frozen in ice.

name: Aurorus

attacks.name: Hail Prison
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [W] Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: When gripped by rage, Aurorus will emanate freezing air, covering everything around it in ice.

name: Chewtle
flavor_text: A popular game among children is to lift up sticks that Chewtle have bitten onto to see whose Chewtle can hang on the longest.

name: Drednaw
flavor_text: Drednaw lurks along the shoreline. When prey come to drink water, Drednaw stretches its neck out and chomps down on them.

name: Cramorant

attacks.name: Spit-Out Shot
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Cramorant takes advantage of Arrokuda’s frantic thrashing to help spit Arrokuda out at high speed.

name: Arrokuda
flavor_text: After it’s eaten its fill, its movements become extremely sluggish. That’s when Cramorant swallows it up.

name: Barraskewda
flavor_text: It spins its tail fins to propel itself, surging forward at speeds of over 100 knots before ramming prey and spearing into them.

name: Wellspring Mask Ogerpon

attacks.name: Wellspring Dance
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack also does 40 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: In this form, it draws on the power of water. It attacks unrelentingly with kicks and ivy strikes.

name: Pikachu

attacks.name: Thunder Jolt
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavor_text: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity can build and cause lightning storms.

name: Alolan Raichu

attacks.name: Thunder Spear
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Surge Surfer
ability.effect: If a Stadium is in play, this Pokémon has no Retreat Cost.

flavor_text: This Pokémon rides on its tail while it uses its psychic powers to levitate. It attacks with star-shaped thunderbolts.

name: Zapdos

attacks.name: Heavy Thunder
attacks.effect: 1 other Pokémon (either yours or your opponent's) is chosen at random 1 time. Do 100 damage to the chosen Pokémon.

flavor_text: Zapdos is a legendary bird Pokémon. It’s said that when Zapdos rubs its feathers together, lightning will fall immediately after.

name: Plusle

attacks.name: Electric Tail
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: This Pokémon absorbs electricity from telephone poles. It shorts out the electricity stored inside its body to create noises.

name: Minun

attacks.name: Buddy Spark
attacks.effect: If Plusle is on your Bench, this attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its dislike of water makes it take shelter under the eaves of houses in rain. It uses pom-poms made of sparks for cheering.

name: Toxel
flavor_text: This selfish, attention-seeking Pokémon stores poison and electricity in two different sacs inside its body.

attacks.name: Damaging Spark
attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has damage on it.

name: Tadbulb

attacks.name: Charge
attacks.effect: Take a [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It floats using the electricity stored in its body. When thunderclouds are around, Tadbulb will float higher off the ground.

name: Bellibolt
flavor_text: What appear to be eyeballs are actually organs for discharging the electricity generated by Bellibolt’s belly-button dynamo.

name: Galarian Ponyta
flavor_text: This Pokémon will look into your eyes and read the contents of your heart. If it finds evil there, it promptly hides away.

name: Galarian Rapidash

attacks.name: Photon Laser
attacks.effect: If you have 5 or more [P] Energy in play, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: Brave and prideful, this Pokémon dashes airily through the forest, its steps aided by the psychic power stored in the fur on its fetlocks.

name: Wobbuffet

attacks.name: Flip Over
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavor_text: To keep its pitch-black tail hidden, it lives quietly in the darkness. It is never first to attack.

name: Snubbull
flavor_text: Its growls make its opponents uneasy. This laid-back Pokémon tends to sleep half the day.

name: Granbull
flavor_text: It can make most any Pokémon run away by opening its big mouth to reveal its thick fangs.

name: Ralts

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavor_text: It is highly attuned to the emotions of people and Pokémon. It hides if it senses hostility.

name: Kirlia

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavor_text: The cheerful spirit of its Trainer gives it energy for its psychokinetic power. It spins and dances when happy.

name: Gardevoir

attacks.name: Psy Turbo
attacks.effect: Take 2 [P] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched [P] Pokémon.

flavor_text: It unleashes psychokinetic energy at full power when protecting a Trainer it has bonded closely with.

attacks.name: Fantasia Force
attacks.effect: Take 3 [P] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to your [P] Pokémon in any way you like.

name: Litwick
flavor_text: While shining a light and pretending to be a guide, it leeches off the life-force of any who follow it.

name: Lampent
flavor_text: The spirits it absorbs fuel its baleful fire. It hangs around hospitals waiting for people to pass on.

name: Chandelure

attacks.name: Past Friends
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Supporter card in your discard pile.

flavor_text: It absorbs spirits, which it then burns. By waving the flames on its arms, it puts its foes into a hypnotic trance.

name: Meloetta

ability.name: Ability: Strange Singing
ability.effect: At the beginning of your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, put a random [P] Pokémon from your deck into your hand.

flavor_text: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.

name: Pumpkaboo
flavor_text: The light that streams out from the holes in the pumpkin can hypnotize and control the people and Pokémon that see it.

name: Gourgeist

attacks.name: Soul Shot
attacks.effect: Discard a card from your hand. If you can't, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: In the darkness of a new-moon night, Gourgeist will come knocking. Whoever answers the door will be swept off to the afterlife.

ability.name: Ability: Disguise
ability.effect: When this Pokémon is first damaged by an attack after coming into play, prevent that damage.

name: Sinistea

attacks.name: Hide
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Sinistea gets into your body when you drink it, and then it steals your vitality from within. It also tastes awful.

name: Polteageist

ability.name: Ability: Refreshing Tea
ability.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may have your opponent shuffle their hand into their deck. For each remaining point that your opponent needs to win, they draw a card.

flavor_text: These Pokémon multiply by creeping into teapots and pouring themselves into leftover tea.

name: Indeedee

attacks.name: Zen Shard
attacks.effect: This attack does 70 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon never leaves its Trainer’s side. It predicts their actions with its psychic power and takes care of their day-to-day needs.

name: Sandshrew

attacks.name: Double Scratch
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: No matter how high a place it falls from, this Pokémon can save itself by rolling into a ball and bouncing.

name: Sandslash

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: The spikes on its body are made up of its hardened hide. It rolls up and attacks foes with its spikes.

name: Machop

attacks.name: Shatter
attacks.effect: Discard a Stadium in play.

flavor_text: Always brimming with power, it passes time by lifting boulders. Doing so makes it even stronger.

name: Machoke
flavor_text: Its formidable body never gets tired. It helps people by doing work such as the moving of heavy goods.

name: Machamp

attacks.name: Knocking Hammer
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavor_text: With four arms that react more quickly than it can think, it can execute many punches at once.

name: Cubone
flavor_text: This Pokémon wears the skull of its deceased mother. Sometimes Cubone’s dreams make it cry, but each tear Cubone sheds makes it stronger.

name: Meditite
flavor_text: It meditates to heighten its inner energy and to float in the air. It eats one berry a day.

name: Medicham

attacks.name: Psykick
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any [P] Energy attached, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: It elegantly avoids attacks with dance-like steps, then launches a devastating blow in the same motion.

name: Roggenrola
flavor_text: When it detects a noise, it starts to move. The energy core inside it makes this Pokémon slightly warm to the touch.

name: Boldore
flavor_text: It relies on sound in order to monitor what’s in its vicinity. When angered, it will attack without ever changing the direction it’s facing.

attacks.name: Megaton Cannon
attacks.effect: This attack does 140 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Drilbur
flavor_text: It makes its way swiftly through the soil by putting both claws together and rotating at high speed.

name: Tyrunt
flavor_text: This Pokémon is selfish and likes to be pampered. It can also inflict grievous wounds on its Trainer just by playing around.

name: Tyrantrum

attacks.name: Tyrannical Fang
attacks.effect: If you have fewer Pokémon in play than your opponent, this attack does 80 more damage.

flavor_text: A single bite of Tyrantrum’s massive jaws will demolish a car. This Pokémon was the king of the ancient world.

name: Passimian

attacks.name: Fling
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: The boss chooses 10 members of the group to go out hunting. The hunting party will evenly split the food they find with the rest of the group.

name: Falinks

ability.name: Ability: Coordinated Unit
ability.effect: If you have another Falinks in play, this Pokémon's attacks do +20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon, and this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: The leader, known as the brass, uses its extendible horn to issue orders to the others when it’s time to change formation.

name: Cornerstone Mask Ogerpon

attacks.name: Cornerstone Dance
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −100 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: In this form, it draws on the power of stone. Its body is rock-solid, protecting it from all manner of attacks.

name: Alolan Meowth

attacks.name: Swagger
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Deeply proud and keenly smart, this Pokémon moves with cunning during battle and relentlessly attacks enemies’ weak points.

name: Alolan Persian
flavor_text: This Pokémon is one tough opponent. Not only does it have formidable physical abilities, but it’s also not above fighting dirty.

name: Alolan Grimer
flavor_text: Alolan Grimer will gladly gobble up any kind of trash, making it a widely used and popular Pokémon at garbage disposal facilities.

name: Alolan Muk

ability.name: Ability: Power of Alchemy
ability.effect: Basic Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities.

flavor_text: What look like fangs and claws are actually crystallized poison that will afflict you at a mere touch, so don’t get too close.

name: Galarian Zigzagoon
flavor_text: Thought to be the oldest form of Zigzagoon, it moves in zigzags and wreaks havoc upon its surroundings.

name: Galarian Linoone
flavor_text: This very aggressive Pokémon will recklessly challenge opponents stronger than itself.

name: Galarian Obstagoon

attacks.name: Merciless Strike
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: It evolved after experiencing numerous fights. While crossing its arms, it lets out a shout that would make any opponent flinch.

name: Stunky
flavor_text: The foul fluid from its rear is so revolting that it can make people feel queasy up to a mile and a quarter away.

name: Skuntank

attacks.name: Smokescreen Shot
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to use an attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen.

flavor_text: It attacks by spraying a repugnant fluid from its tail, but the stench dulls after a few squirts.

name: Spiritomb

ability.name: Ability: Final Scream
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, do 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: It was formed by uniting 108 spirits. It has been bound to the Odd Keystone to keep it from doing any mischief.

name: Purrloin

attacks.name: Whiny Voice
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, look at a random card from your opponent's hand and shuffle it into their deck.

flavor_text: Opponents that get drawn in by its adorable behavior come away with stinging scratches from its claws and stinging pride from its laughter.

name: Liepard

attacks.name: Fasten Claws
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: Don’t be fooled by its gorgeous fur and elegant figure. This is a moody and vicious Pokémon.

name: Scraggy
flavor_text: It will abruptly headbutt anyone that makes eye contact with it. Its skull is extremely hard.

name: Scrafty

attacks.name: Crush the Weak
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has more Energy attached than your opponent's Active Pokémon, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: This Pokémon may be rude, but it takes very good care of its family, its friends, and its turf.

name: Yveltal

attacks.name: Evil Crash
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from both Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon once more.

name: Guzzlord

attacks.name: Breakcore
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: An unknown life-form called a UB. It may be constantly hungry—it is certainly always devouring something.

name: Galarian Meowth
flavor_text: These daring Pokémon have coins on their foreheads. Darker coins are harder, and harder coins garner more respect among Meowth.

name: Galarian Perrserker

ability.name: Ability: Dig Up
ability.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may put 2 random Pokémon Tool cards from your discard pile into your hand.

flavor_text: After many battles, it evolved dangerous claws that come together to form daggers when extended.

name: Mawile
flavor_text: It chomps with its gaping mouth. Its huge jaws are actually steel horns that have been transformed.

attacks.name: Heat-Up Crunch
attacks.effect: Until this Pokémon leaves the Active Spot, this Pokémon's Heat-Up Crunch attack does +30 damage. This effect stacks.

name: Excadrill
flavor_text: Its drill, which has evolved into steel, is strong enough to bore through iron plates. This Pokémon is a great help in tunnel construction.

name: Ferroseed
flavor_text: Mossy caves are their preferred dwellings. Enzymes contained in mosses help Ferroseed’s spikes grow big and strong.

name: Ferrothorn

attacks.name: Pummel
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: Its spikes are harder than steel. This Pokémon crawls across rock walls by stabbing the spikes on its feelers into the stone.

name: Galarian Stunfisk

attacks.name: Snapping Trap
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot when your opponent's Active Pokémon retreats, this attack does 40 damage to the new Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its conspicuous lips lure prey in as it lies in wait in the mud. When prey gets close, Stunfisk clamps its jagged steel fins down on them.

name: Honedge
flavor_text: The blue eye on the sword’s handguard is the true body of Honedge. With its old cloth, it drains people’s lives away.

name: Doublade

attacks.name: Dual Blades
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: The two swords employ a strategy of rapidly alternating between offense and defense to bring down their prey.

name: Aegislash

attacks.name: Superb Shield
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −80 damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon ex.

flavor_text: Its potent spectral powers allow it to manipulate others. It once used its powers to force people and Pokémon to build a kingdom to its liking.

name: Bagon
flavor_text: Its belief that it will be able to fly one day is apparently the influence of information carried in its genes.

name: Shelgon
flavor_text: Its armored body makes all attacks bounce off. The armor is too tough, however, making it heavy and somewhat sluggish.

name: Salamence

attacks.name: Dragon Dive
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

flavor_text: It becomes uncontrollable if it is enraged. It destroys everything with shredding claws and fire.

name: Meowth

attacks.name: Feelin’ Fine
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

ability.name: Ability: Carefree Steps
ability.effect: If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, prevent that damage.

flavor_text: It loves things that sparkle. When it sees a shiny object, the gold coin on its head shines, too.

name: Persian
flavor_text: It has a vicious temperament. Beware if it raises its tail straight up. This is a signal that it is about to pounce and bite.

name: Kangaskhan

attacks.name: Steady Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: There are records of a lost human child being raised by a childless Kangaskhan.

attacks.name: Double-Punching Family
attacks.effect: This attack is used twice in a row. The second attack does 40 damage. (If the first attack Knocks Out your opponent's Active Pokémon, the second attack is used after your opponent chooses a new Active Pokémon.)

name: Sentret

attacks.name: Tail Rap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: If it encounters a foe, it will stand up on its tail, making itself look bigger than usual to intimidate them.

name: Furret
flavor_text: It is nimble and has a very flexible body. Even if you get ahold of it, it’ll slip right out of your arms.

name: Smeargle

ability.name: Ability: Portrait
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may look at a random Supporter card from your opponent's hand. Use the effect of that card as the effect of this Ability.

flavor_text: The color of the mysterious fluid secreted from the tip of the tail is predetermined for each Smeargle.

name: Lugia

attacks.name: Aeroblast
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 more damage for each heads.

flavor_text: It is said to be the guardian of the seas. It is rumored to have been seen on the night of a storm.

name: Taillow
flavor_text: It dislikes cold seasons. They migrate to other lands in search of warmth, flying over 180 miles a day.

name: Swellow

ability.name: Ability: Repelling Wind
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may switch out your opponent's Active Basic Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

flavor_text: It dives at a steep angle as soon as it spots its prey. It catches its prey with sharp claws.

name: Slakoth

attacks.name: Yawn
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: The way Slakoth lolls around makes anyone who watches it feel like doing the same.

name: Vigoroth

attacks.name: Best Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: It is always hungry because it won’t stop rampaging. Even while it is eating, it can’t keep still.

name: Slaking

attacks.name: Knuckle Sandwich
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from this Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Snoozing Habit
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, whenever you attach an Energy from your Energy Zone to it, it is now Asleep.

flavor_text: This Pokémon lives lying on its side. It only rolls over and moves when there is no more grass to eat.

name: Spinda

attacks.name: Teetering Steps
attacks.effect: This Pokémon is now Confused.

flavor_text: Each Spinda’s spot pattern is different. With its stumbling movements, it evades opponents’ attacks brilliantly!

name: Tornadus

attacks.name: Blow Through
attacks.effect: If a Stadium is in play, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: Tornadus expels massive energy from its tail, causing severe storms. Its power is great enough to blow houses away.

name: Bunnelby
flavor_text: It’s very sensitive to danger. The sound of Corviknight’s flapping will have Bunnelby digging a hole to hide underground in moments.

name: Diggersby

attacks.name: Earthquake
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: The fur on its belly retains heat exceptionally well. People used to make heavy winter clothing from fur shed by this Pokémon.

name: Furfrou

ability.name: Ability: Fur Coat
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: Left alone, its fur will grow longer and longer, but it will only allow someone it trusts to cut it.

name: Tandemaus

attacks.name: Flock
attacks.effect: Put 3 random cards from among Tandemaus and Maushold from your deck onto your Bench.

flavor_text: The pair sticks together no matter what. They split any food they find exactly in half and then eat it together.

name: Maushold

attacks.name: Family Beatdown
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Tandemaus and Maushold you have in play. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: The larger pair protects the little ones during battles. When facing strong opponents, the whole group will join the fight.

name: Cacnea
flavor_text: It lives in arid locations. Its yellow flowers bloom once a year.

name: Roserade

attacks.name: Poison Ring
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. During your opponent's next turn, that Pokémon can't retreat.

flavor_text: The poison in its right hand is quick acting. The poison in its left hand is slow acting. Both are life threatening.

name: Vivillon

attacks.name: Vivid Powder
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned and Asleep.

flavor_text: This Pokémon was born in a land where flowers bloom. It scatters colorful, toxic scales from its wings during battle.

name: Buzzwole

attacks.name: Ground Beat
attacks.effect: If your opponent has gotten exactly 1 point, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: Buzzwole goes around showing off its abnormally swollen muscles. It is one kind of Ultra Beast.

name: Reshiram

attacks.name: Blue Flare
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: When Reshiram’s tail flares, the heat energy moves the atmosphere and changes the world’s weather.

name: Oricorio

attacks.name: Inspiring Dance
attacks.effect: During your next turn, attacks used by your Pokémon do +20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: This form of Oricorio has sipped red nectar. It whips up blazing flames as it moves to the steps of its passionate dance.

name: Scorbunny
flavor_text: Fire energy gathers in the pads of its feet, raising their temperature. Once hot, Scorbunny’s footpads can deal heavy damage to opponents.

name: Aurorus

attacks.name: Hail Prison
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [W] Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: When gripped by rage, Aurorus will emanate freezing air, covering everything around it in ice.

name: Cramorant

attacks.name: Spit-Out Shot
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Cramorant takes advantage of Arrokuda’s frantic thrashing to help spit Arrokuda out at high speed.

name: Minun

attacks.name: Buddy Spark
attacks.effect: If Plusle is on your Bench, this attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its dislike of water makes it take shelter under the eaves of houses in rain. It uses pom-poms made of sparks for cheering.

name: Toxel
flavor_text: This selfish, attention-seeking Pokémon stores poison and electricity in two different sacs inside its body.

name: Galarian Ponyta
flavor_text: This Pokémon will look into your eyes and read the contents of your heart. If it finds evil there, it promptly hides away.

name: Snubbull
flavor_text: Its growls make its opponents uneasy. This laid-back Pokémon tends to sleep half the day.

name: Indeedee

attacks.name: Zen Shard
attacks.effect: This attack does 70 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon never leaves its Trainer’s side. It predicts their actions with its psychic power and takes care of their day-to-day needs.

name: Sandshrew

attacks.name: Double Scratch
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: No matter how high a place it falls from, this Pokémon can save itself by rolling into a ball and bouncing.

name: Tyrantrum

attacks.name: Tyrannical Fang
attacks.effect: If you have fewer Pokémon in play than your opponent, this attack does 80 more damage.

flavor_text: A single bite of Tyrantrum’s massive jaws will demolish a car. This Pokémon was the king of the ancient world.

name: Falinks

ability.name: Ability: Coordinated Unit
ability.effect: If you have another Falinks in play, this Pokémon's attacks do +20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon, and this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: The leader, known as the brass, uses its extendible horn to issue orders to the others when it’s time to change formation.

name: Alolan Muk

ability.name: Ability: Power of Alchemy
ability.effect: Basic Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities.

flavor_text: What look like fangs and claws are actually crystallized poison that will afflict you at a mere touch, so don’t get too close.

name: Purrloin

attacks.name: Whiny Voice
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, look at a random card from your opponent's hand and shuffle it into their deck.

flavor_text: Opponents that get drawn in by its adorable behavior come away with stinging scratches from its claws and stinging pride from its laughter.

name: Yveltal

attacks.name: Evil Crash
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from both Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon once more.

name: Galarian Obstagoon

attacks.name: Merciless Strike
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: It evolved after experiencing numerous fights. While crossing its arms, it lets out a shout that would make any opponent flinch.

name: Galarian Perrserker

ability.name: Ability: Dig Up
ability.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may put 2 random Pokémon Tool cards from your discard pile into your hand.

flavor_text: After many battles, it evolved dangerous claws that come together to form daggers when extended.

name: Salamence

attacks.name: Dragon Dive
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon also does 50 damage to itself.

flavor_text: It becomes uncontrollable if it is enraged. It destroys everything with shredding claws and fire.

name: Slakoth

attacks.name: Yawn
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: The way Slakoth lolls around makes anyone who watches it feel like doing the same.

attacks.name: Energized Leaves
attacks.effect: If the amount of Energy attached to both Active Pokémon is 5 or more, this attack does 60 more damage.

ability.name: Ability: Soothing Wind
ability.effect: Each of your Pokémon that has any Energy attached recovers from all Special Conditions and can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Pop-Punk
attacks.effect: Discard 3 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Binding Snow
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't take any Energy from their Energy Zone to attach to their Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Strong-Armed Destroyer
attacks.effect: Discard 2 random Energy from among the Energy attached to all Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Damaging Spark
attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has damage on it.

attacks.name: Fantasia Force
attacks.effect: Take 3 [P] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to your [P] Pokémon in any way you like.

ability.name: Ability: Disguise
ability.effect: When this Pokémon is first damaged by an attack after coming into play, prevent that damage.

attacks.name: Megaton Cannon
attacks.effect: This attack does 140 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

attacks.name: Heat-Up Crunch
attacks.effect: Until this Pokémon leaves the Active Spot, this Pokémon's Heat-Up Crunch attack does +30 damage. This effect stacks.

attacks.name: Double-Punching Family
attacks.effect: This attack is used twice in a row. The second attack does 40 damage. (If the first attack Knocks Out your opponent's Active Pokémon, the second attack is used after your opponent chooses a new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Energized Leaves
attacks.effect: If the amount of Energy attached to both Active Pokémon is 5 or more, this attack does 60 more damage.

ability.name: Ability: Soothing Wind
ability.effect: Each of your Pokémon that has any Energy attached recovers from all Special Conditions and can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Pop-Punk
attacks.effect: Discard 3 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Binding Snow
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't take any Energy from their Energy Zone to attach to their Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Strong-Armed Destroyer
attacks.effect: Discard 2 random Energy from among the Energy attached to all Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Damaging Spark
attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has damage on it.

ability.name: Ability: Disguise
ability.effect: When this Pokémon is first damaged by an attack after coming into play, prevent that damage.

attacks.name: Megaton Cannon
attacks.effect: This attack does 140 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

attacks.name: Heat-Up Crunch
attacks.effect: Until this Pokémon leaves the Active Spot, this Pokémon's Heat-Up Crunch attack does +30 damage. This effect stacks.

attacks.name: Double-Punching Family
attacks.effect: This attack is used twice in a row. The second attack does 40 damage. (If the first attack Knocks Out your opponent's Active Pokémon, the second attack is used after your opponent chooses a new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Fantasia Force
attacks.effect: Take 3 [P] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to your [P] Pokémon in any way you like.

name: Meowth

attacks.name: Feelin’ Fine
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

ability.name: Ability: Carefree Steps
ability.effect: If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, prevent that damage.

flavor_text: It loves things that sparkle. When it sees a shiny object, the gold coin on its head shines, too.

name: Tangela

attacks.name: Sleep Powder
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: Hidden beneath a tangle of vines that grows nonstop even if the vines are torn off, this Pokémon’s true appearance remains a mystery.

name: Magby

attacks.name: Toasty Toss
attacks.effect: Take a [R] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Basic Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon is still small and timid. Whenever Magby gets excited or surprised, flames leak from its mouth and its nose.

name: Magmar

attacks.name: Stoke
attacks.effect: Take a [R] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Magmar dispatches its prey with fire. But it regrets this habit once it realizes that it has burned its intended prey to a charred crisp.

name: Horsea
flavor_text: Horsea makes its home in oceans with gentle currents. If this Pokémon is under attack, it spits out pitch-black ink and escapes.

name: Seadra
flavor_text: It’s the males that raise the offspring. While Seadra are raising young, the spines on their backs secrete thicker and stronger poison.

name: Mantyke

attacks.name: Splashy Toss
attacks.effect: Take a [W] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Basic Pokémon.

flavor_text: It’s highly friendly and easily tamed. Tours that take people swimming with Mantyke are a super-popular beach activity.

name: Omanyte
flavor_text: Because some Omanyte manage to escape after being restored or are released into the wild by people, this species is becoming a problem.

name: Omastar

attacks.name: Ancient Whirlpool
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't attack.

flavor_text: Weighed down by a large and heavy shell, Omastar couldn’t move very fast. Some say it went extinct because it was unable to catch food.

name: Pichu

attacks.name: Crackly Toss
attacks.effect: Take a [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Basic Pokémon.

flavor_text: It is unskilled at storing electric power. Any kind of shock causes it to discharge energy spontaneously.

name: Clefairy
flavor_text: It is said that happiness will come to those who see a gathering of Clefairy dancing under a full moon.

name: Clefable
flavor_text: A timid fairy Pokémon that is rarely seen, it will run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: Latias

attacks.name: Crossing Flights
attacks.effect: If Latios is on your Bench, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavor_text: It communicates using telepathy. Its body is covered in down that refracts light to make it invisible.

name: Latios

attacks.name: Luster Purge
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Fantastical Floating
ability.effect: If you have Latias in play, this Pokémon has no Retreat Cost.

flavor_text: It understands human speech and is highly intelligent. It is a tender Pokémon that dislikes fighting.

name: Hitmonlee

attacks.name: Stretch Kick
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This amazing Pokémon has an awesome sense of balance. It can kick in succession from any position.

name: Hitmonchan
flavor_text: Its punches slice the air. They are launched at such high speed, even a slight graze could cause a burn.

name: Kabuto
flavor_text: This species is almost entirely extinct. Kabuto molt every three days, making their shells harder and harder.

name: Kabutops

attacks.name: Leech Life
attacks.effect: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Kabutops slices its prey apart and sucks out the fluids. The discarded body parts become food for other Pokémon.

name: Phanpy

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavor_text: This Pokémon lives and nests on a riverbank. After playing in the mud, it won’t be able to settle down unless it washes its body.

name: Tyrogue
flavor_text: It is always bursting with energy. To make itself stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.

name: Tauros

attacks.name: Fighting Tackle
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 80 more damage.

flavor_text: When Tauros begins whipping itself with its tails, it’s a warning that the Pokémon is about to charge with astounding speed.

attacks.name: Fire Spin
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Combust
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may attach a [R] Energy from your discard pile to this Pokémon. If you do, do 20 damage to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Phoenix Turbo
attacks.effect: Take a [R], [W], and [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach them to your Benched Basic Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Stormy Prison
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

ability.name: Ability: Psychic Healing
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Happy Ribbon
ability.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Gigantic Press
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [F] Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

ability.name: Ability: Dark Chase
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has damage on it to the Active Spot.

attacks.name: Elemental Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a [R], [W], and [L] Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Meloetta

ability.name: Ability: Strange Singing
ability.effect: At the beginning of your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, put a random [P] Pokémon from your deck into your hand.

flavor_text: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.

name: Sprigatito
flavor_text: The sweet scent its body gives off mesmerizes those around it. The scent grows stronger when this Pokémon is in the sun.

name: Floragato
flavor_text: The hardness of Floragato’s fur depends on the Pokémon’s mood. When Floragato is prepared to battle, its fur becomes pointed and needle sharp.

attacks.name: Flower Trick
attacks.effect: Choose a spot from among your opponent's Active Spot and Bench. At the end of your opponent's next turn, do 70 damage to the Pokémon in the spot you chose.

name: Tarountula
flavor_text: The thread it secretes from its rear is as strong as wire. The secret behind the thread’s strength is the topic of ongoing research.

name: Spidops

attacks.name: Bind Down
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavor_text: Spidops covers its territory in tough, sticky threads to set up traps for intruders.

name: Nymble

attacks.name: U-turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: It’s highly skilled at a fighting style in which it uses its jumping capabilities to dodge incoming attacks while also dealing damage to opponents.

name: Smoliv

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.

name: Dolliv
flavor_text: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.

name: Arboliva

ability.name: Ability: Extra Heal
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may heal 60 damage from 1 of your Pokémon ex that has any Energy attached. If you do, discard a random Energy from that Pokémon.

flavor_text: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.

name: Bramblin
flavor_text: Not even Bramblin knows where it is headed as it tumbles across the wilderness, blown by the wind. It loathes getting wet.

name: Brambleghast

attacks.name: Continuous Tumble
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Brambleghast wanders around arid regions. On rare occasions, mass outbreaks of these Pokémon will bury an entire town.

name: Capsakid
flavor_text: Traditional Paldean dishes can be extremely spicy because they include the shed front teeth of Capsakid among their ingredients.

name: Scovillain

attacks.name: Red-Hot Headbutt
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a [G] or [M] Pokémon, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: The green head has turned vicious due to the spicy chemicals stimulating its brain. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.

name: Rellor

attacks.name: Ball Roll
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: It rolls its mud ball around while the energy it needs for evolution matures. Eventually the time comes for it to evolve.

name: Wo-Chien

attacks.name: Binding Greed
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon cost 2 [C] more.

flavor_text: It drains the life-force from vegetation, causing nearby forests to instantly wither and fields to turn barren.

name: Fuecoco

attacks.name: Cheerful Singing
attacks.effect: Put 1 random Basic Pokémon from your deck onto your Bench.

flavor_text: Its flame sac is small, so energy is always leaking out. This energy is released from the dent atop Fuecoco’s head and flickers to and fro.

name: Crocalor
flavor_text: The valve in Crocalor’s flame sac is closely connected to its vocal cords. This Pokémon utters a guttural cry as it spews flames every which way.

name: Skeledirge

ability.name: Ability: Passionate Voice
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may discard 1 [R] Energy from this Pokémon in order to use this Ability. During this turn, attacks used by your [R] Pokémon do +50 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Skeledirge’s gentle singing soothes the souls of all that hear it. It burns its enemies to a crisp with flames of over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Charcadet
flavor_text: Its firepower increases when it fights, reaching over 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit. It likes berries that are rich in fat.

attacks.name: Armor Cannon
attacks.effect: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Armor
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.

name: Chi-Yu

attacks.name: Megafire of Envy
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: The envy accumulated within curved beads that sparked multiple conflicts has clad itself in fire and become a Pokémon.

name: Quaxly

attacks.name: Splashing Dodge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its strong legs let it easily swim around in even fast-flowing rivers. It likes to keep things tidy and is prone to overthinking things.

name: Quaxwell

attacks.name: Splashing Turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: The hardworking Quaxwell observes people and Pokémon from various regions and incorporates their movements into its own dance routines.

name: Quaquaval

ability.name: Ability: Torrent
ability.effect: If this Pokémon's remaining HP is 50 or less, attacks used by this Pokémon do +60 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Dancing in ways that evoke far-away places, this Pokémon mesmerizes all that see it. Flourishes of its decorative water feathers slice into its foes.

name: Wiglett
flavor_text: Though it looks like Diglett, Wiglett is an entirely different species. The resemblance seems to be a coincidental result of environmental adaptation.

name: Wugtrio

attacks.name: Triple Whip
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: A variety of fish Pokémon, Wugtrio was once considered to be a regional form of Dugtrio.

name: Finizen
flavor_text: Its water ring is made from seawater mixed with a sticky fluid that Finizen secretes from its blowhole.

name: Palafin

attacks.name: Jet Punch
attacks.effect: This attack also does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This hero of the ocean swims at a speed of 50 knots and saves drowning people and Pokémon.

name: Cetoddle
flavor_text: It lives in frigid regions in pods of five or so individuals. It loves the minerals found in snow and ice.

name: Cetitan

attacks.name: Ice Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: Ice energy builds up in the horn on its upper jaw, causing the horn to reach cryogenic temperatures that freeze its surroundings.

name: Veluza

attacks.name: Shedding Spiral
attacks.effect: If you have no cards in your deck, this attack can be used for 1 [W] Energy.

flavor_text: Veluza has excellent regenerative capabilities. It sheds spare flesh from its body to boost its agility, then charges at its prey.

name: Dondozo

attacks.name: Giga Impact
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavor_text: It treats Tatsugiri like its boss and follows it loyally. Though powerful, Dondozo is apparently not very smart.

name: Tatsugiri

attacks.name: Rally Back
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: Tatsugiri is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It feigns weakness to lure in prey, then orders its partner to attack.

name: Frigibax
flavor_text: This Pokémon lives in forests and craggy areas. Using the power of its dorsal fin, it cools the inside of its nest like a refrigerator.

name: Arctibax
flavor_text: It attacks with the blade of its frozen dorsal fin by doing a front flip in the air. Arctibax’s strong back and legs allow it to pull off this technique.

name: Baxcalibur

ability.name: Ability: Ice Maker
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may take a [W] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to the [W] Pokémon in the Active Spot.

flavor_text: It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down and spewing frigid air from its mouth. It finishes opponents off with its dorsal blade.

attacks.name: Diving Icicles
attacks.effect: Discard all [W] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 130 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Pawmi

attacks.name: Random Spark
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: The pads of its paws are electricity-discharging organs. Pawmi fires electricity from its forepaws while standing unsteadily on its hind legs.

name: Pawmo
flavor_text: Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously.

name: Pawmot

attacks.name: Thunder Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a [L] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Pawmot’s fluffy fur acts as a battery. It can store the same amount of electricity as an electric car.

name: Tadbulb
flavor_text: It floats using the electricity stored in its body. When thunderclouds are around, Tadbulb will float higher off the ground.

attacks.name: High-Voltage Cannon
attacks.effect: If you have 4 or more [L] Energy in play, this attack does 70 more damage.

name: Wattrel
flavor_text: These Pokémon make their nests on coastal cliffs. The nests have a strange, crackling texture, and they’re a popular delicacy.

name: Kilowattrel
flavor_text: It uses its throat sac to store electricity generated by its wings. There’s hardly any oil in its feathers, so it is a poor swimmer.

name: Miraidon

attacks.name: Lightning Laser
attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This seems to be the Iron Serpent mentioned in an old book. The Iron Serpent is said to have turned the land to ash with its lightning.

name: Fidough
flavor_text: The yeast in Fidough’s breath is useful for cooking, so this Pokémon has been protected by people since long ago.

name: Dachsbun

attacks.name: Play Rough
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: The pleasant aroma that emanates from this Pokémon’s body helps wheat grow, so Dachsbun has been treasured by farming villages.

name: Ceruledge

attacks.name: Fighting Sword
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text: An old set of armor steeped in grudges caused this Pokémon’s evolution. Ceruledge cuts its enemies to pieces without mercy.

name: Rabsca

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavor_text: An infant sleeps inside the ball. Rabsca rolls the ball soothingly with its legs to ensure the infant sleeps comfortably.

name: Flittle
flavor_text: It spends its time running around wastelands. If anyone steals its beloved berries, it will chase them down and exact its revenge.

name: Espathra

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: It emits psychic power from the gaps between its multicolored frills and sprints at speeds greater than 120 mph.

name: Greavard

attacks.name: Soul Shot
attacks.effect: Discard a card from your hand. If you can't, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: This friendly Pokémon doesn’t like being alone. Pay it even the slightest bit of attention, and it will follow you forever.

name: Houndstone

attacks.name: Last Respects
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each [P] Pokémon in your discard pile.

flavor_text: A lovingly mourned Pokémon was reborn as Houndstone. It doesn’t like anyone touching the protuberance atop its head.

name: Gimmighoul

attacks.name: Continuous Coin Toss
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.

name: Mankey

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: It is extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment, then thrashing away the next instant.

name: Primeape

attacks.name: Rage
attacks.effect: This attack does more damage equal to the damage this Pokémon has on it.

flavor_text: Some researchers theorize that Primeape remains angry even when inside a Poké Ball.

name: Annihilape

attacks.name: Dynamite Punch
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavor_text: It imbues its fists with the power of the rage that it kept hidden in its heart. Opponents struck by these imbued fists will be shattered to their core.

name: Paldean Tauros
flavor_text: This kind of Tauros, known as the Combat Breed, is distinguished by its thick, powerful muscles and its fierce disposition.

name: Toedscool
flavor_text: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.

name: Toedscruel

attacks.name: Stun Spore
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: It coils its 10 tentacles around prey and sucks out their nutrients, causing the prey pain. The folds along the rim of its head are a popular delicacy.

name: Klawf

attacks.name: Adrenaline Hammer
attacks.effect: This Pokémon is now Confused.

flavor_text: This Pokémon lives on sheer cliffs. It sidesteps opponents’ attacks, then lunges for their weak spots with its claws.

name: Ting-Lu

attacks.name: Arrogant Impact
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon's remaining HP is 60 or less, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: It slowly brings its exceedingly heavy head down upon the ground, splitting the earth open with huge fissures that run over 160 feet deep.

name: Koraidon

attacks.name: Rampaging Fang
attacks.effect: Discard 2 [F] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.

name: Paldean Wooper
flavor_text: It’s dangerous for Wooper to travel alone. They line up in groups of three or four and help each other as they walk around the wetlands.

name: Paldean Clodsire

attacks.name: Muddy Hammer
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavor_text: It lives at the bottom of ponds and swamps. It will carry Wooper on its back and ferry them across water from one shore to the other.

name: Lokix

attacks.name: Rocket Jump
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: It uses its normally folded third set of legs when in Showdown Mode. This places a huge burden on its body, so it can’t stay in this mode for long.

name: Maschiff
flavor_text: Its well-developed jaw and fangs are strong enough to crunch through boulders, and its thick fat makes for an excellent defense.

name: Mabosstiff

attacks.name: Wild Tackle
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavor_text: Mabosstiff loves playing with children. Though usually gentle, it takes on an intimidating look when protecting its family.

name: Shroodle
flavor_text: To keep enemies away from its territory, it paints markings around its nest using a poisonous liquid that has an acrid odor.

name: Grafaiai

attacks.name: Colorful Attack
attacks.effect: If your Pokémon in play have 3 or more different types of Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: Each Grafaiai paints its own individual pattern, and it will paint that same pattern over and over again throughout its life.

name: Bombirdier

attacks.name: Fly
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bundle up food, which it carries back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises.

name: Tinkatink
flavor_text: This Pokémon pounds iron scraps together to make a hammer. It will remake the hammer again and again until it’s satisfied with the result.

name: Tinkatuff
flavor_text: These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other’s hammers by smashing them together.

name: Tinkaton

attacks.name: Gigaton Hammer
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Gigaton Hammer.

flavor_text: The hammer tops 220 pounds, yet it gets swung around easily by Tinkaton as it steals whatever it pleases and carries its plunder back home.

name: Varoom
flavor_text: The steel section is Varoom’s actual body. This Pokémon clings to rocks and converts the minerals within into energy to fuel its activities.

name: Revavroom

attacks.name: Poison Gas
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: Revavroom viciously threatens others with the sound of its exhaust. It sticks its tongue out from its cylindrical mouth and sprays toxic fluids.

name: Orthworm

attacks.name: Iron Supply
attacks.effect: Take a [M] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon lives in arid deserts. It maintains its metal body by consuming iron from the soil.

attacks.name: Spending Rush
attacks.effect: 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random for each [M] Energy attached to this Pokémon. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, do 40 damage to it.

name: Lechonk
flavor_text: This Pokémon spurns all but the finest of foods. Its body gives off an herblike scent that bug Pokémon detest.

name: Oinkologne

attacks.name: Leg Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, during your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavor_text: It entrances female Pokémon with the sweet, alluring scent that wafts from all over its body.

name: Tandemaus

attacks.name: Double Hit
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: The pair sticks together no matter what. They split any food they find exactly in half and then eat it together.

name: Maushold

attacks.name: Triple Gnawing
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: The little one just appeared one day. They all live together like a family, but the relationship between the three is still unclear.

name: Squawkabilly

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: Green-feathered flocks hold the most sway. When they’re out searching for food in the mornings and evenings, it gets very noisy.

name: Cyclizar

attacks.name: Driving Buddy
attacks.effect: If you played a Supporter card from your hand during this turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: It can sprint at over 70 mph while carrying a human. The rider’s body heat warms Cyclizar’s back and lifts the Pokémon’s spirit.

name: Flamigo
flavor_text: Thanks to a behavior of theirs known as “synchronizing,” an entire flock of these Pokémon can attack simultaneously in perfect harmony.

name: Fuecoco

attacks.name: Cheerful Singing
attacks.effect: Put 1 random Basic Pokémon from your deck onto your Bench.

flavor_text: Its flame sac is small, so energy is always leaking out. This energy is released from the dent atop Fuecoco’s head and flickers to and fro.

name: Greavard

attacks.name: Soul Shot
attacks.effect: Discard a card from your hand. If you can't, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: This friendly Pokémon doesn’t like being alone. Pay it even the slightest bit of attention, and it will follow you forever.

name: Gimmighoul

attacks.name: Continuous Coin Toss
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.

name: Paldean Wooper
flavor_text: It’s dangerous for Wooper to travel alone. They line up in groups of three or four and help each other as they walk around the wetlands.

name: Orthworm

attacks.name: Iron Supply
attacks.effect: Take a [M] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon lives in arid deserts. It maintains its metal body by consuming iron from the soil.

name: Maushold

attacks.name: Triple Gnawing
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: The little one just appeared one day. They all live together like a family, but the relationship between the three is still unclear.

attacks.name: Flower Trick
attacks.effect: Choose a spot from among your opponent's Active Spot and Bench. At the end of your opponent's next turn, do 70 damage to the Pokémon in the spot you chose.

attacks.name: Armor Cannon
attacks.effect: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Armor
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.

attacks.name: Diving Icicles
attacks.effect: Discard all [W] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 130 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: High-Voltage Cannon
attacks.effect: If you have 4 or more [L] Energy in play, this attack does 70 more damage.

attacks.name: Spending Rush
attacks.effect: 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random for each [M] Energy attached to this Pokémon. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, do 40 damage to it.

attacks.name: Flower Trick
attacks.effect: Choose a spot from among your opponent's Active Spot and Bench. At the end of your opponent's next turn, do 70 damage to the Pokémon in the spot you chose.

attacks.name: Armor Cannon
attacks.effect: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Armor
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.

attacks.name: Diving Icicles
attacks.effect: Discard all [W] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 130 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: High-Voltage Cannon
attacks.effect: If you have 4 or more [L] Energy in play, this attack does 70 more damage.

attacks.name: Spending Rush
attacks.effect: 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random for each [M] Energy attached to this Pokémon. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, do 40 damage to it.

name: Sprigatito
flavor_text: The sweet scent its body gives off mesmerizes those around it. The scent grows stronger when this Pokémon is in the sun.

name: Floragato
flavor_text: The hardness of Floragato’s fur depends on the Pokémon’s mood. When Floragato is prepared to battle, its fur becomes pointed and needle sharp.

name: Meowscarada

attacks.name: Fighting Claws
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text: This Pokémon uses the reflective fur lining its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating.

name: Pawmi

attacks.name: Random Spark
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: The pads of its paws are electricity-discharging organs. Pawmi fires electricity from its forepaws while standing unsteadily on its hind legs.

name: Pawmo
flavor_text: Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously.

name: Pawmot

attacks.name: Thunder Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a [L] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Pawmot’s fluffy fur acts as a battery. It can store the same amount of electricity as an electric car.

name: Gimmighoul

attacks.name: Continuous Coin Toss
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.

name: Tinkatink
flavor_text: This Pokémon pounds iron scraps together to make a hammer. It will remake the hammer again and again until it’s satisfied with the result.

name: Tinkatuff
flavor_text: These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other’s hammers by smashing them together.

name: Gholdengo

attacks.name: Scintillating Surfing
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each [M] Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.

attacks.name: Blazing Beatdown
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [R] Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

ability.name: Ability: Legendary Pulse
ability.effect: At the end of your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, draw a card.

attacks.name: Crystal Waltz
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage for each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

ability.name: Ability: Legendary Pulse
ability.effect: At the end of your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, draw a card.

attacks.name: Voltaic Bullet
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Legendary Pulse
ability.effect: At the end of your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, draw a card.

attacks.name: Terrific Thumping
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 80 more damage.

name: Baxcalibur

ability.name: Ability: Ice Maker
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may take a [W] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to the [W] Pokémon in the Active Spot.

flavor_text: It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down and spewing frigid air from its mouth. It finishes opponents off with its dorsal blade.

name: Scyther

attacks.name: U-turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: The sharp scythes on its forearms become increasingly sharp by cutting through hard objects.

name: Pineco
flavor_text: It spits out a fluid that it uses to glue tree bark to its body. The fluid hardens when it touches air.

name: Volbeat

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavor_text: It flashes the light on its rear to communicate with other Volbeat. It loves the sweet aroma given off by Illumise.

name: Illumise

attacks.name: Mental Crush
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Confused, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: It guides Volbeat to draw signs in the night sky. There are scholars who research the meaning of these signs.

name: Phantump
flavor_text: This Pokémon came to be when the spirit of a deceased child possessed a tree stump. It now wanders the forest searching for friends.

name: Trevenant

attacks.name: Rumble Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 40 more damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Trevenant is very kind to Pokémon living in the forest. It doesn’t even care if these Pokémon take up residence in the greenery on its head.

name: Charmander
flavor_text: If Charmander is healthy, the flame on the tip of its tail will burn vigorously and won’t go out even if it gets a bit wet.

name: Charmeleon

ability.name: Ability: Ignition
