ability.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may take a [R] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to your Active [R] Pokémon.

flavor_text: It is very hotheaded by nature, so it constantly seeks opponents to battle against. Its aggression will not be quelled if it doesn’t win.

attacks.name: Raging Blaze
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon's remaining HP is 110 or less, this attack does 80 more damage.

name: Ponyta

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

flavor_text: If you’ve been accepted by Ponyta, its burning mane is mysteriously no longer hot to the touch.

name: Rapidash

attacks.name: Overdrive Smash
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Overdrive Smash attack does +30 damage.

flavor_text: The fastest runner becomes the leader, and it decides the herd’s pace and direction of travel.

name: Magmar
flavor_text: Wavering flames similar to those of the sun appear on the surface of this Pokémon’s body.

name: Magmortar

attacks.name: Thundering Volcano
attacks.effect: If Electivire is on your Bench, this attack also does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: They dwell in volcanic craters. It’s said that only a single pair of Magmortar will inhabit any given volcano.

name: Paldean Tauros

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

flavor_text: People call this kind of Tauros the Blaze Breed due to the hot air it snorts from its nostrils. Its three tails are intertwined.

name: Slowpoke
flavor_text: It is always vacantly lost in thought, but no one knows what it is thinking about. It is good at fishing with its tail.

attacks.name: Laundry-Go-Round
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack also does 20 damage for each heads to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Lapras

attacks.name: Raging Freeze
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: Able to understand human speech and very intelligent, it loves to swim in the sea with people on its back.

name: Piplup
flavor_text: It doesn’t like to be taken care of. It’s difficult to bond with since it won’t listen to its Trainer.

name: Prinplup

attacks.name: Water Splash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: Because every Prinplup considers itself to be the most important, they can never form a group.

name: Empoleon

attacks.name: Emperor’s Strike
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has more remaining HP than this Pokémon, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: It avoids unnecessary disputes, but it will mercilessly decimate anything that threatens the safety of its colony.

name: Phione

attacks.name: Aqua Turbo
attacks.effect: Take a [W] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched [W] Pokémon.

flavor_text: It drifts in warm seas. It always returns to where it was born, no matter how far it may have drifted.

name: Pikachu
flavor_text: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity can build and cause lightning storms.

name: Raichu

attacks.name: Thunder
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavor_text: If the electric pouches in its cheeks become fully charged, both ears will stand straight up.

name: Electabuzz
flavor_text: Research is progressing on storing lightning in Electabuzz so this energy can be used at any time.

name: Electivire

attacks.name: Incendiary Thunder
attacks.effect: If Magmortar is on your Bench, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text: This Pokémon presses the tips of its tails onto an opponent and instantly sends over 20,000 volts of high-voltage electricity through them.

name: Electrike

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: It stores electricity in its fur. It gives off sparks from all over its body in seasons when the air is dry.

attacks.name: Lightning Accelerator
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each point you have gotten.

name: Drowzee

attacks.name: Hypnosis
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: When it twitches its nose, it can tell where someone is sleeping and what that person is dreaming about.

name: Hypno

attacks.name: Hypnoblast
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: Always holding a pendulum that it swings at a steady rhythm, it causes drowsiness in anyone nearby.

name: Mew

attacks.name: Miraculous Memory
attacks.effect: 1 attack from among the Pokémon in your opponent's hand and deck is chosen at random, and you use the chosen attack as this attack.

flavor_text: Its DNA is said to contain the genetic codes of all Pokémon, so it can use all kinds of techniques.

name: Spoink
flavor_text: Using its tail like a spring, it keeps its heart beating by bouncing constantly. If it stops, it dies.

name: Grumpig

attacks.name: Swaying Dance
attacks.effect: If your opponent has exactly 2, 4, or 6 cards in their hand, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: It uses black pearls to amplify its psychic power. It does a strange dance to control foes’ minds.

name: Diglett

attacks.name: Slight Intrusion
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavor_text: Its skin is very thin. If it is exposed to light, its blood heats up, causing it to grow weak.

name: Dugtrio
flavor_text: In battle, it digs through the ground and strikes the unsuspecting foe from an unexpected direction.

name: Groudon

attacks.name: Gaia Blast
attacks.effect: Discard 2 random Energy from among the Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

flavor_text: This legendary Pokémon is said to represent the land. It went to sleep after dueling Kyogre.

name: Hawlucha

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavor_text: Hawlucha live quietly without flocking together. They fight constantly with their natural enemies: noisy groups of Primeape.

name: Gastly
flavor_text: Its body is made of gas. Despite lacking substance, it can envelop an opponent of any size and cause suffocation.

name: Haunter

attacks.name: Spin Turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: In total darkness, where nothing is visible, Haunter lurks, silently stalking its next victim.

attacks.name: Labyrinth of Shadows
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Trainer cards from their hand.

name: Darkrai

attacks.name: Dark Slumber
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

ability.name: Ability: Bad Dreams
ability.effect: At the end of each turn, if your opponent's Active Pokémon is Asleep, do 20 damage to that Pokémon.

flavor_text: It chases people and Pokémon from its territory by causing them to experience deep, nightmarish slumbers.

name: Trubbish
flavor_text: This Pokémon was born from a bag stuffed with trash. Galarian Weezing relish the fumes belched by Trubbish.

name: Garbodor
flavor_text: The toxic liquid it launches from its right arm is so virulent that it can kill a weakened creature instantly.

name: Zorua

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: To protect themselves from danger, they hide their true identities by transforming into people and Pokémon.

name: Zoroark

attacks.name: Energy Crush
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage for each Energy attached to all of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: Each has the ability to fool a large group of people simultaneously. They protect their lair with illusory scenery.

name: Morpeko

attacks.name: Energizer Wheel
attacks.effect: Move 2 [D] Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Hunger has disrupted this Pokémon’s hormonal balance. The Electric-type energy stored in its cheek sacs has turned into Dark-type energy.

name: Forretress

attacks.name: Enormous Explosion
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 100 damage to itself and 50 damage to all Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

flavor_text: Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside this shell is a total mystery.

attacks.name: Bullet Slugger
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 50 more damage.

name: Kartana
flavor_text: Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.

name: Varoom
flavor_text: The steel section is Varoom’s actual body. This Pokémon clings to rocks and converts the minerals within into energy to fuel its activities.

name: Revavroom

ability.name: Ability: Metal Transport
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may switch your Active [M] Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Revavroom viciously threatens others with the sound of its exhaust. It sticks its tongue out from its cylindrical mouth and sprays toxic fluids.

name: Dratini

attacks.name: Tail Strike
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavor_text: It is born large to start with. It repeatedly sheds its skin as it steadily grows longer.

name: Dragonair

attacks.name: Sky’s Blessing
attacks.effect: Take a [W] and a [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach them to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It is called the divine Pokémon. When its entire body brightens slightly, the weather changes.

name: Dragonite

attacks.name: Dragon Wave
attacks.effect: Discard a [W] and a [L] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It can fly in spite of its big and bulky physique. It circles the globe in just 16 hours.

name: Axew
flavor_text: If you see peculiar teeth marks on boulders or trees, it means an Axew is likely living nearby.

name: Fraxure
flavor_text: Fraxure uses its thick tusks to neatly cut prey into two portions—one to eat now and one to save for later.

name: Haxorus

attacks.name: Frenzied Blade
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

flavor_text: It overwhelms enemies with its prized tusks, which are sharp enough to cut through a metal transmission tower in one strike.

name: Druddigon

attacks.name: Clutch
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavor_text: Druddigon are vicious and cunning. They take up residence in nests dug out by other Pokémon, treating the stolen nests as their own lairs.

name: Jigglypuff
flavor_text: If it inflates to sing a lullaby, it can perform longer and cause sure drowsiness in its audience.

name: Wigglytuff
flavor_text: The rich, fluffy fur that covers its body feels so good that anyone who feels it can’t stop touching it.

name: Miltank

attacks.name: Rout
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon needs to be milked every day, or else it will fall ill. The flavor of Miltank milk changes with the seasons.

name: Chatot

attacks.name: Spinning Draw
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

flavor_text: It can learn and speak human words. If they gather, they all learn the same saying.

name: Minccino

attacks.name: Play Rough
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavor_text: These Pokémon like things neat and tidy. They are always sweeping and dusting their habitat, using their tails as brooms.

name: Cinccino
flavor_text: The oil that seeps from its body is really smooth. For people troubled by bad skin, this oil is an effective treatment.

name: Furfrou

attacks.name: Quick Blow
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

ability.name: Ability: Fur Coat
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: Left alone, its fur will grow longer and longer, but it will only allow someone it trusts to cut it.

name: Lapras

attacks.name: Raging Freeze
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: Able to understand human speech and very intelligent, it loves to swim in the sea with people on its back.

name: Empoleon

attacks.name: Emperor’s Strike
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has more remaining HP than this Pokémon, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: It avoids unnecessary disputes, but it will mercilessly decimate anything that threatens the safety of its colony.

name: Groudon

attacks.name: Gaia Blast
attacks.effect: Discard 2 random Energy from among the Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

flavor_text: This legendary Pokémon is said to represent the land. It went to sleep after dueling Kyogre.

name: Morpeko

attacks.name: Energizer Wheel
attacks.effect: Move 2 [D] Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Hunger has disrupted this Pokémon’s hormonal balance. The Electric-type energy stored in its cheek sacs has turned into Dark-type energy.

name: Revavroom

ability.name: Ability: Metal Transport
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may switch your Active [M] Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Revavroom viciously threatens others with the sound of its exhaust. It sticks its tongue out from its cylindrical mouth and sprays toxic fluids.

name: Miltank

attacks.name: Rout
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon needs to be milked every day, or else it will fall ill. The flavor of Miltank milk changes with the seasons.

attacks.name: Raging Blaze
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon's remaining HP is 110 or less, this attack does 80 more damage.

attacks.name: Laundry-Go-Round
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack also does 20 damage for each heads to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Lightning Accelerator
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each point you have gotten.

attacks.name: Labyrinth of Shadows
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Trainer cards from their hand.

attacks.name: Bullet Slugger
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 50 more damage.

attacks.name: Laundry-Go-Round
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack also does 20 damage for each heads to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Lightning Accelerator
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each point you have gotten.

name: Mew

attacks.name: Miraculous Memory
attacks.effect: 1 attack from among the Pokémon in your opponent's hand and deck is chosen at random, and you use the chosen attack as this attack.

flavor_text: Its DNA is said to contain the genetic codes of all Pokémon, so it can use all kinds of techniques.

name: Mew

attacks.name: Miraculous Memory
attacks.effect: 1 attack from among the Pokémon in your opponent's hand and deck is chosen at random, and you use the chosen attack as this attack.

flavor_text: Its DNA is said to contain the genetic codes of all Pokémon, so it can use all kinds of techniques.

name: Scyther

attacks.name: U-turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: The sharp scythes on its forearms become increasingly sharp by cutting through hard objects.

name: Pineco
flavor_text: It spits out a fluid that it uses to glue tree bark to its body. The fluid hardens when it touches air.

name: Phantump
flavor_text: This Pokémon came to be when the spirit of a deceased child possessed a tree stump. It now wanders the forest searching for friends.

name: Trevenant

attacks.name: Rumble Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 40 more damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Trevenant is very kind to Pokémon living in the forest. It doesn’t even care if these Pokémon take up residence in the greenery on its head.

name: Charmander
flavor_text: If Charmander is healthy, the flame on the tip of its tail will burn vigorously and won’t go out even if it gets a bit wet.

name: Charmeleon

ability.name: Ability: Ignition
ability.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may take a [R] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to your Active [R] Pokémon.

flavor_text: It is very hotheaded by nature, so it constantly seeks opponents to battle against. Its aggression will not be quelled if it doesn’t win.

name: Ponyta

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

flavor_text: If you’ve been accepted by Ponyta, its burning mane is mysteriously no longer hot to the touch.

name: Rapidash

attacks.name: Overdrive Smash
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Overdrive Smash attack does +30 damage.

flavor_text: The fastest runner becomes the leader, and it decides the herd’s pace and direction of travel.

name: Slowpoke
flavor_text: It is always vacantly lost in thought, but no one knows what it is thinking about. It is good at fishing with its tail.

name: Pikachu
flavor_text: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity can build and cause lightning storms.

name: Raichu

attacks.name: Thunder
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavor_text: If the electric pouches in its cheeks become fully charged, both ears will stand straight up.

name: Electrike

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: It stores electricity in its fur. It gives off sparks from all over its body in seasons when the air is dry.

name: Hawlucha

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavor_text: Hawlucha live quietly without flocking together. They fight constantly with their natural enemies: noisy groups of Primeape.

name: Gastly
flavor_text: Its body is made of gas. Despite lacking substance, it can envelop an opponent of any size and cause suffocation.

name: Haunter

attacks.name: Spin Turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: In total darkness, where nothing is visible, Haunter lurks, silently stalking its next victim.

name: Zorua

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: To protect themselves from danger, they hide their true identities by transforming into people and Pokémon.

name: Zoroark

attacks.name: Energy Crush
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage for each Energy attached to all of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: Each has the ability to fool a large group of people simultaneously. They protect their lair with illusory scenery.

name: Forretress

attacks.name: Enormous Explosion
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 100 damage to itself and 50 damage to all Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

flavor_text: Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside this shell is a total mystery.

name: Dratini

attacks.name: Tail Strike
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavor_text: It is born large to start with. It repeatedly sheds its skin as it steadily grows longer.

name: Dragonair

attacks.name: Sky’s Blessing
attacks.effect: Take a [W] and a [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach them to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It is called the divine Pokémon. When its entire body brightens slightly, the weather changes.

name: Dragonite

attacks.name: Dragon Wave
attacks.effect: Discard a [W] and a [L] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It can fly in spite of its big and bulky physique. It circles the globe in just 16 hours.

name: Axew
flavor_text: If you see peculiar teeth marks on boulders or trees, it means an Axew is likely living nearby.

name: Fraxure
flavor_text: Fraxure uses its thick tusks to neatly cut prey into two portions—one to eat now and one to save for later.

name: Haxorus

attacks.name: Frenzied Blade
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

flavor_text: It overwhelms enemies with its prized tusks, which are sharp enough to cut through a metal transmission tower in one strike.

attacks.name: Raging Blaze
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon's remaining HP is 110 or less, this attack does 80 more damage.

attacks.name: Laundry-Go-Round
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack also does 20 damage for each heads to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Lightning Accelerator
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each point you have gotten.

attacks.name: Labyrinth of Shadows
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Trainer cards from their hand.

attacks.name: Bullet Slugger
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 50 more damage.

name: Arboliva

ability.name: Ability: Extra Heal
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may heal 60 damage from 1 of your Pokémon ex that has any Energy attached. If you do, discard a random Energy from that Pokémon.

flavor_text: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.

name: Tangela

attacks.name: Bind
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: Hidden beneath a tangle of vines that grows nonstop even if the vines are torn off, this Pokémon’s true appearance remains a mystery.

name: Tangrowth
flavor_text: Vine growth is accelerated for Tangrowth living in warm climates. If the vines grow long, Tangrowth shortens them by tearing parts of them off.

name: Heracross

attacks.name: Powerful Friends
attacks.effect: If you have any Stage 2 Pokémon on your Bench, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: With its herculean powers, it can easily throw around an object that is 100 times its own weight.

name: Celebi

ability.name: Ability: Time Recall
ability.effect: Each of your evolved Pokémon can use any attack from its previous Evolutions. (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack.)

flavor_text: This Pokémon traveled through time to come from the future. It bolsters grass and trees with its own strength, and it can heal wounds, too.

name: Treecko
flavor_text: Treecko can quickly scale even vertical surfaces. It senses humidity with its tail to predict the next day’s weather.

name: Grovyle

attacks.name: Slicing Snipe
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Grovyle leaps from branch to branch in large trees, moving with ease. It propels itself with astounding speed and force.

name: Sceptile

attacks.name: Leaf Blade
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: It agilely flits through the jungle and uses the sharp-edged leaves on its arms to cut down its prey.

attacks.name: Terminating Tail
attacks.effect: Discard Grass[G] Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Surskit

attacks.name: Firefighting
attacks.effect: Discard a [R] Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: It secretes a thick, sweet-scented syrup from the tip of its head. It lives on weed-choked ponds.

name: Masquerain
flavor_text: The antennae have distinctive patterns that look like eyes. When it rains, they grow heavy, making flight impossible.

name: Shroomish

attacks.name: Spore
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: If it senses danger, it scatters spores from the top of its head to protect itself.

name: Breloom

attacks.name: Pre-Dawn Strike
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Asleep, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: The seeds on its tail are made of toxic spores. It knocks out foes with quick, virtually invisible punches.

name: Budew

attacks.name: Prickly Powder
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon loses all Abilities. This effect lasts until the Defending Pokémon leaves the Active Spot.

flavor_text: This Pokémon is highly sensitive to temperature changes. When its bud starts to open, that means spring is right around the corner.

name: Carnivine
flavor_text: It binds itself to trees in marshes. It attracts prey with its sweet-smelling drool and gulps them down.

name: Sewaddle
flavor_text: The bumps on their heads are sensory organs. When Sewaddle meet, they greet each other by rubbing these bumps together.

name: Swadloon

attacks.name: Protect
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Swadloon wraps itself in leaves for protection. It uses the two leaves atop its head to detect air movements and feel out its surroundings.

name: Leavanny
flavor_text: This gentle Pokémon has strong protective instincts. The leaves on its arms are sharp enough to slice a thick tree in half with one stroke.

name: Durant

attacks.name: Bite Together
attacks.effect: If Durant is on your Bench, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: With their large mandibles, these Pokémon can crunch their way through rock. They work together to protect their eggs from Sandaconda.

name: Applin

attacks.name: Share
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Applin lives inside an apple. When an Applin is separated from its apple, its body loses moisture and the Pokémon grows weak.

name: Flapple

attacks.name: Sour Spit
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon cost 1 [C] more.

flavor_text: It uses its own body fluid to repair its apple. Strong Flapple that have won many battles have apples that are clay colored all over.

name: Numel

attacks.name: Knock Away
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: The flaming magma it stores in the hump on its back is the source of its tremendous power.

name: Camerupt

attacks.name: Eruption
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 30 more damage for each [R] Energy you discarded in this way.

flavor_text: The volcanoes on its back have a major eruption every 10 years—or whenever it becomes really angry.

attacks.name: Volcanic Kaboom
attacks.effect: 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random. Do 160 damage to it.

name: Castform Sunny Form

attacks.name: Sunny Scorching
attacks.effect: If a Stadium is in play, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

flavor_text: Castform changes to this form when it basks in bright sunlight. When you touch its glowing skin, it feels all dried out!

name: Victini

ability.name: Ability: Victory Star
ability.effect: Once during your turn, after you flip any coins for an attack of 1 of your [R] Pokémon, you may ignore all results of those coin flips and begin flipping those coins again. You can't use more than 1 Victory Star Ability each turn.

flavor_text: When it shares the infinite energy it creates, that being’s entire body will be overflowing with power.

name: Tepig

attacks.name: Stoke
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, take 2 [R] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon is a ravenous glutton. It uses its excellent sense of smell to find food, then cooks it to a crisp before eating.

name: Pignite
flavor_text: When defending its friends, Pignite will stand up to any opponent, no matter how strong. But it’s powerless when faced with an empty stomach.

name: Emboar

attacks.name: Flare Storm
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each [R] Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

flavor_text: It can throw a fire punch by setting its fists on fire with its fiery chin. It cares deeply about its friends.

name: Darumaka
flavor_text: This popular symbol of good fortune will never fall over in its sleep, no matter how it’s pushed or pulled.

name: Darmanitan

attacks.name: Double Smash
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: The thick arms of this hot-blooded Pokémon can deliver punches capable of obliterating a dump truck.

name: Larvesta
flavor_text: In ancient times, Larvesta was worshiped as the emissary of the sun. However, it was also viewed as a burden since it often caused forest fires.

name: Volcarona

attacks.name: Fire Arrow
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon scatters burning scales. Most of the danger of these scales is not in their heat—it’s in the way they rob the surrounding air of oxygen.

name: Poliwag
flavor_text: Its legs are newly grown, and it can’t walk very well. It seems to prefer swimming through the water instead.

name: Poliwhirl

attacks.name: Hit Twice
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Its skin is moist all over its body. The skin on its belly spiral also feels smooth.

name: Politoed

attacks.name: Raid
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon evolved from Poliwhirl during this turn, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: It’s the leader of Poliwag and Poliwhirl. When Politoed roars, they all cower in fear.

name: Paldean Tauros
flavor_text: It swims by jetting water from its horns. The most notable characteristic of the Aqua Breed is its high body fat, which allows it to float easily.

ability.name: Ability: Frozen Flow
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

name: Wooper
flavor_text: When it walks around on land, it coats its body with a slimy, poisonous film.

name: Quagsire

attacks.name: Muddy Headbutt
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any [F] Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: Due to its relaxed and carefree attitude, it often bumps its head on riverbed boulders and boat hulls as it swims.

name: Castform Rainy Form

attacks.name: Rainy Absorbing
attacks.effect: If a Stadium is in play, heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: This is Castform’s form when pelted by rain. In an experiment where it was placed in a shower, this Pokémon didn’t change to this form.

name: Castform Snowy Form

attacks.name: Snowy Chilling
attacks.effect: If a Stadium is in play, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: This is Castform’s form when caught in a hailstorm. Its whole body is chilled, and its skin is partially frozen!

name: Clamperl
flavor_text: Clamperl’s pearls are exceedingly precious. They can be more than 10 times as costly as Shellder’s pearls.

name: Huntail
flavor_text: Deep seas are their habitat. According to tradition, when Huntail wash up onshore, something unfortunate will happen.

name: Gorebyss
flavor_text: It sucks bodily fluids out of its prey. The leftover meat sinks to the seafloor, where it becomes food for other Pokémon.

name: Regice

attacks.name: Reflect Energy
attacks.effect: Move 2 random Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon’s body is made of solid ice. It’s said that Regice was born beneath thick ice in the ice age.

name: Cubchoo
flavor_text: When Cubchoo starts sneezing, watch out! If it spatters you with its frosty snot, you’ll get frostbite.

name: Beartic
flavor_text: Feared as the Snow-White Demon in northern lands, Beartic uses its frosty claws and fangs to attack prey.

name: Sobble

attacks.name: Find a Friend
attacks.effect: Put a random Pokémon from your deck into your hand.

flavor_text: It’s a very cautious Pokémon. When it has no choice but to battle, it hides itself before attacking.

name: Drizzile

ability.name: Ability: Swift Shot
ability.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may do 20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Highly intelligent but also very lazy, it defends its home by laying traps.

name: Inteleon

ability.name: Ability: Swift Shot
ability.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may do 30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: It may present itself as being well-mannered, but deep down, it still has a lazy side. It will slack off when its Trainer isn’t looking.

name: Rapid Strike Urshifu

attacks.name: Tornado Shot
attacks.effect: Discard a [W] Energy from this Pokémon, and this attack also does 40 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Double Type
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in play, it is [W] and [F] type.

flavor_text: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in defeating foes by raining many blows down on them. Its strikes are nonstop, flowing like a river.

name: Magnemite

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: It moves while constantly hovering. It discharges electromagnetic waves and so on from the units at its sides.

name: Magneton
flavor_text: They’re formed by several Magnemite linked together. They frequently appear when sunspots flare up.

attacks.name: Storm Blade
attacks.effect: Discard a [L] Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Voltorb

attacks.name: Single Shot Blast
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: It rolls to move. If the ground is uneven, a sudden jolt from hitting a bump can cause it to explode.

name: Electrode

attacks.name: Electroblast
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

flavor_text: The more energy it charges up, the faster it gets. But this also makes it more likely to explode.

name: Chinchou
flavor_text: It shoots positively and negatively charged electricity from the tips of its two antennae and stuns its opponents.

name: Lanturn
flavor_text: It blinds prey with an intense burst of light. With the prey incapacitated, the Pokémon swallows it in a single gulp.

name: Zekrom

attacks.name: Bolt Strike
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavor_text: Mythology tells us that if people lose the righteousness in their hearts, their kingdoms will be razed by Zekrom’s lightning.

name: Toxel
flavor_text: This selfish, attention-seeking Pokémon stores poison and electricity in two different sacs inside its body.

name: Toxtricity

attacks.name: Vengeful Shock
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 60 more damage, and your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text: The jolts of electricity it launches by violently strumming the protrusions on its chest easily exceed 15,000 volts.

name: Morpeko

attacks.name: Full Belly Bolt
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has no damage on it, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: It has a small stomach. If it isn’t constantly eating the seeds it keeps in its pockets, it will get hungry immediately.

name: Ralts
flavor_text: It is highly attuned to the emotions of people and Pokémon. It hides if it senses hostility.

name: Kirlia

attacks.name: Double Spin
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: The cheerful spirit of its Trainer gives it energy for its psychokinetic power. It spins and dances when happy.

name: Espurr
flavor_text: Behind an Espurr’s expressionless face is a frantic struggle to contain psychic power.

name: Meowstic

ability.name: Ability: Perplexing Ears
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may make your opponent's Active Pokémon Confused.

flavor_text: If Meowstic continuously emits its powerful psychic energy, it will damage its own body.

name: Diancie

attacks.name: Diamond Storm
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from each of your [P] Pokémon.

flavor_text: It can instantly create many diamonds by compressing the carbon in the air between its hands.

name: Oricorio

attacks.name: Pester the Dizzy
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Confused, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: This form of Oricorio has sipped pink nectar. It elevates its mind with the gentle steps of its dance, then unleashes its psychic energy.

name: Hatenna
flavor_text: It senses the feelings of other living creatures. Be careful not to expose it to strong emotions for too long, or it will end up exhausted.

name: Hattrem

attacks.name: Disarming Voice
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavor_text: The moment this Pokémon finds someone who’s emitting strong emotions, it will pummel them senseless with its braids to silence them.

name: Hatterene

attacks.name: Mental Crush
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Confused, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text: Beware of forests that show no signs of living creatures within. You may have wandered into Hatterene’s territory.

name: Bramblin
flavor_text: Not even Bramblin knows where it is headed as it tumbles across the wilderness, blown by the wind. It loathes getting wet.

name: Brambleghast

ability.name: Ability: Accept Pain
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may move 30 damage that your Active Pokémon has on it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Brambleghast wanders around arid regions. On rare occasions, mass outbreaks of these Pokémon will bury an entire town.

name: Gligar

attacks.name: Lunge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text: It glides as if sliding. It startles foes by clamping on to their faces, then jabs with its poison stinger.

name: Gliscor
flavor_text: It observes prey while hanging inverted from branches. When the chance presents itself, it swoops!

name: Trapinch
flavor_text: As it digs through the sand, its giant jaws crush any rocks that obstruct its path. It builds a funnel-shaped nest.

name: Regirock

attacks.name: Mad Hammer
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavor_text: Cutting-edge technology was used to study the internals of this Pokémon’s rock body, but nothing was found—not even a brain or a heart.

name: Bonsly

attacks.name: Teary Attack
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon do −30 damage.

flavor_text: From its eyes, it can expel excess moisture from its body. This liquid is similar in composition to human sweat.

name: Riolu

attacks.name: Fighting Fist
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: It has the peculiar power of being able to see emotions, such as joy and rage, in the form of waves.

name: Lucario

attacks.name: Close Combat
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes +20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: It controls waves known as auras, which are powerful enough to pulverize huge rocks. It uses these waves to take down its prey.

attacks.name: Fighting Pulse
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 1 extra [F] Energy attached, this attack does 50 more damage.

name: Croagunk
flavor_text: It rarely fights fairly, but that is strictly to ensure survival. It is popular as a mascot.

name: Toxicroak

attacks.name: Poison Jab
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: It bounces toward opponents and gouges them with poisonous claws. No more than a scratch is needed to knock out its adversaries.

name: Gallade

attacks.name: Earthen Sword
attacks.effect: If a Stadium is in play, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text: When trying to protect someone, it extends its elbows as if they were swords and fights savagely.

name: Throh

attacks.name: Circle Throw
attacks.effect: Switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

flavor_text: It performs throwing moves with first-rate skill. Over the course of many battles, Throh’s belt grows darker as it absorbs its wearer’s sweat.

name: Sawk

attacks.name: Brick Break
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: The karate chops of a Sawk that’s trained itself to the limit can cleave the ocean itself.

name: Dwebble
flavor_text: It first tries to find a rock to live in, but if there are no suitable rocks to be found, Dwebble may move in to the ports of a Hippowdon.

name: Meloetta

attacks.name: Inspiring Dance
attacks.effect: During your next turn, attacks used by your [F] Pokémon do +30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: The melodies sung by Meloetta have the power to make Pokémon that hear them happy or sad.

name: Stufful
flavor_text: The way it protects itself by flailing its arms may be an adorable sight, but stay well away. This is flailing that can snap thick tree trunks.

name: Bewear

attacks.name: Triple Smash
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: This immensely dangerous Pokémon possesses overwhelming physical strength. Its habitat is generally off-limits.

name: Rolycoly
flavor_text: Chunks of the surface of this Pokémon’s body that have grown old and flaked off have long been used for fuel as an alternative to coal.

name: Carkol
flavor_text: Due to the coal tar created inside it, the heap of coal on Carkol’s back never falls apart, even when the Pokémon rolls around at high speeds.

name: Coalossal

attacks.name: Mountain Crush
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavor_text: To intimidate its opponents, Coalossal will vigorously shake its body, scattering coal from its smoldering back.

name: Silicobra
flavor_text: Silicobra’s large nostrils are specialized for spraying sand, so this Pokémon is not very good at telling apart different smells.

name: Sandaconda

attacks.name: Super Sand Attack
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to use an attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen.

flavor_text: The sand it spews contains sharp, pointy gravel, which is actually just sand that Sandaconda’s saliva has hardened into irregular shapes.

name: Kubfu

attacks.name: Training
attacks.effect: Take a [C] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Kubfu trains hard to perfect its moves. The moves it masters will determine which form it takes when it evolves.

name: Zubat

attacks.name: Spin Turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Zubat live in caves, down where the sun’s light won’t reach. In the morning, they gather together to keep each other warm as they sleep.

name: Golbat
flavor_text: Its feet are tiny, but this Pokémon walks skillfully. It sneaks up on sleeping prey before sinking in its fangs and slurping up blood.

name: Crobat

attacks.name: Surprise Strike
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: This Pokémon flaps its four wings skillfully. Crobat can fly through cramped caves without needing to slow down.

name: Koffing

attacks.name: Gas Bomb
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavor_text: Toxic gas is held within its thin, balloon-shaped body, so it can cause massive explosions.

name: Weezing
flavor_text: When it inhales poisonous gases from garbage, its body expands, and its insides smell much worse.

name: Qwilfish

attacks.name: Spiny Rush
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

flavor_text: Experienced fishers say they try to catch Qwilfish in the brief moment that these Pokémon become defenseless just after launching poisonous spikes.

name: Seviper

attacks.name: Poison Jab
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: Constant polishing makes the edge of the blade on its tail extremely sharp. It’s Zangoose’s archrival.

name: Zorua

attacks.name: Ascension
attacks.effect: Put a random card from your deck that evolves from this Pokémon onto this Pokémon to evolve it.

flavor_text: To protect themselves from danger, they hide their true identities by transforming into people and Pokémon.

attacks.name: Brutal Bash
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Benched [D] Pokémon.

name: Foongus
flavor_text: This Pokémon prefers damp places. It spurts out poison spores to repel approaching enemies.

name: Amoonguss

attacks.name: Dangerous Spores
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned and Paralyzed.

flavor_text: Amoonguss mimics Poké Balls. It is not yet clear whether this mimicry is effective against other Pokémon.

name: Vullaby
flavor_text: Its healthy appetite leads to visible growth spurts. It often has to replace the bones it wears as its size increases.

name: Mandibuzz

attacks.name: Blindside
attacks.effect: This attack does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that have damage on them.

flavor_text: Watching from the sky, they attack weakened prey on the ground. They have a habit of decorating themselves with bones.

name: Inkay
flavor_text: Being upside-down improves its blood flow and clears its mind, causing the power of its psychic moves to increase dramatically.

name: Malamar

attacks.name: Evolution Jammer
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Pokémon from their hand to evolve their Pokémon.

flavor_text: It flashes the luminescent spots on its body to hypnotize its opponents, gaining total control over them.

name: Single Strike Urshifu

attacks.name: Power Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a [D] Energy from this Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Double Type
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in play, it is [F] and [D] type.

flavor_text: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.

name: Zarude

attacks.name: Dark Vengeance
attacks.effect: If any of your [D] Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 80 more damage.

flavor_text: Once the vines on Zarude’s body tear off, they become nutrients in the soil. This helps the plants of the forest grow.

name: Bombirdier

ability.name: Ability: Villainous Delivery
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, your Active [D] Pokémon's Retreat Cost is 1 less.

flavor_text: Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bundle up food, which it carries back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises.

name: Registeel

attacks.name: Protect Charge
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: It’s rumored that this Pokémon was born deep underground in the planet’s mantle and that it emerged onto the surface 10,000 years ago.

name: Bronzor
flavor_text: They are found in ancient tombs. The patterns on their backs are said to be imbued with mysterious power.

name: Bronzong

attacks.name: Psychic Resonance
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any [P] Pokémon in play, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavor_text: It brought rains by opening portals to another world. It was revered as a bringer of plentiful harvests.

name: Pawniard
flavor_text: It uses river stones to maintain the cutting edges of the blades covering its body. These sharpened blades allow it to bring down opponents.

name: Bisharp

attacks.name: Night Slash
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Bisharp mercilessly cuts its opponents to pieces with the sharp blades covering its body. It will do anything to win.

name: Magearna

attacks.name: Windup Cannon
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Built roughly 500 years ago by a scientist, the part called the Soul-Heart is the actual life-form.

name: Meltan
flavor_text: They live as a group, but when the time comes, one strong Meltan will absorb all the others and evolve.

name: Melmetal

attacks.name: Overdrive Smash
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Overdrive Smash attack does +60 damage.

flavor_text: Centrifugal force is behind the punches of Melmetal’s heavy hex-nut arms. Melmetal is said to deliver the strongest punches of all Pokémon.

attacks.name: Air Crash
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Vibrava

attacks.name: Sand Wind
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: It generates ultrasonic waves by vigorously vibrating its wings. After making its prey faint, it dissolves the prey with its digestive juices.

attacks.name: Dragon Pulse
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your deck.

ability.name: Ability: Sand Slammer
ability.effect: During Pokémon Checkup, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, do 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Chansey

attacks.name: Bind Wound
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

flavor_text: This kindly Pokémon lays highly nutritious eggs and shares them with injured Pokémon or people.

name: Blissey

ability.name: Ability: Happiness Supplement
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may remove a random Special Condition from your Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Whenever a Blissey finds a weakened Pokémon, it will share its egg and offer its care until the other Pokémon is all better.

name: Eevee

attacks.name: Jumping Kick
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

flavor_text: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element stones.

name: Dunsparce

attacks.name: Bop ’n’ Burrow
attacks.effect: You may shuffle this Pokémon and all attached cards into your deck.

flavor_text: If spotted, it escapes by burrowing with its tail. It can float just slightly using its wings.

name: Teddiursa
flavor_text: Its paws are soaked in oodles of honey. When nervous, Teddiursa will lick its paws and soon have a smile back on its face.

name: Ursaring

attacks.name: Raging Claws
attacks.effect: This attack does more damage equal to the damage this Pokémon has on it.

flavor_text: It is quite skilled at climbing trees. If it comes across a Primeape while searching for berries in the treetops, trouble will surely ensue.

name: Castform

attacks.name: Blow Through
attacks.effect: If a Stadium is in play, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavor_text: Its form changes depending on the weather. The rougher conditions get, the rougher Castform’s disposition!

name: Regigigas

attacks.name: Giga Turbo
attacks.effect: Take a [C] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Seal of Antiquity
ability.effect: If you don't have Regirock, Regice, and Registeel on your Bench, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavor_text: There is an enduring legend that states this Pokémon towed continents with ropes.

name: Patrat
flavor_text: Extremely cautious, one of them will always be on the lookout, but it won’t notice a foe coming from behind.

name: Watchog

attacks.name: Psych Up
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Psych Up attack does +30 damage.

flavor_text: When they see an enemy, their tails stand high, and they spit the seeds of berries stored in their cheek pouches.

name: Lillipup

attacks.name: Puppy Pile
attacks.effect: Reveal all of your Pokémon in play and in your hand that have the Puppy Pile attack, and this attack does 20 damage for each Pokémon you revealed in this way.

flavor_text: This Pokémon is far brighter than the average child, and Lillipup won’t forget the love it receives or any abuse it suffers.

name: Herdier
flavor_text: The black fur that covers this Pokémon’s body is dense and springy. Even sharp fangs bounce right off.

name: Stoutland

attacks.name: Fighting Fangs
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text: Stoutland is immensely proud of its impressive moustache. It’s said that moustache length is what determines social standing among this species.

name: Audino

attacks.name: Healing Light
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from each of your Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon has a kind heart. By touching with its feelers, Audino can gauge other creatures’ feelings and physical conditions.

attacks.name: Heartfelt Shine
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from each of your Pokémon.

name: Minccino

attacks.name: Fluffy Tail
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: These Pokémon like things neat and tidy. They are always sweeping and dusting their habitat, using their tails as brooms.

name: Cinccino

attacks.name: Knock Away
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: The oil that seeps from its body is really smooth. For people troubled by bad skin, this oil is an effective treatment.

name: Furfrou

attacks.name: Whimsy Tackle
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

ability.name: Ability: Fur Coat
ability.effect: This Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: Left alone, its fur will grow longer and longer, but it will only allow someone it trusts to cut it.

name: Rookidee

attacks.name: Pluck
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: The females are fussier than the males. If another creature dirties a female Rookidee’s wings, it’ll peck the offender relentlessly in a burning rage.

name: Corvisquire

attacks.name: Joust
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: This intelligent Pokémon will quickly learn how to use any tool it can hold in its beak or its talons.

name: Treecko
flavor_text: Treecko can quickly scale even vertical surfaces. It senses humidity with its tail to predict the next day’s weather.

name: Grovyle

attacks.name: Slicing Snipe
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Grovyle leaps from branch to branch in large trees, moving with ease. It propels itself with astounding speed and force.

name: Shroomish

attacks.name: Spore
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavor_text: If it senses danger, it scatters spores from the top of its head to protect itself.

name: Budew

attacks.name: Prickly Powder
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon loses all Abilities. This effect lasts until the Defending Pokémon leaves the Active Spot.

flavor_text: This Pokémon is highly sensitive to temperature changes. When its bud starts to open, that means spring is right around the corner.

name: Flapple

attacks.name: Sour Spit
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon cost 1 [C] more.

flavor_text: It uses its own body fluid to repair its apple. Strong Flapple that have won many battles have apples that are clay colored all over.

name: Tepig

attacks.name: Stoke
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, take 2 [R] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: This Pokémon is a ravenous glutton. It uses its excellent sense of smell to find food, then cooks it to a crisp before eating.

name: Quagsire

attacks.name: Muddy Headbutt
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any [F] Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: Due to its relaxed and carefree attitude, it often bumps its head on riverbed boulders and boat hulls as it swims.

name: Zekrom

attacks.name: Bolt Strike
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavor_text: Mythology tells us that if people lose the righteousness in their hearts, their kingdoms will be razed by Zekrom’s lightning.

name: Morpeko

attacks.name: Full Belly Bolt
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has no damage on it, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: It has a small stomach. If it isn’t constantly eating the seeds it keeps in its pockets, it will get hungry immediately.

name: Meowstic

ability.name: Ability: Perplexing Ears
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may make your opponent's Active Pokémon Confused.

flavor_text: If Meowstic continuously emits its powerful psychic energy, it will damage its own body.

name: Oricorio

attacks.name: Pester the Dizzy
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Confused, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text: This form of Oricorio has sipped pink nectar. It elevates its mind with the gentle steps of its dance, then unleashes its psychic energy.

name: Brambleghast

ability.name: Ability: Accept Pain
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may move 30 damage that your Active Pokémon has on it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Brambleghast wanders around arid regions. On rare occasions, mass outbreaks of these Pokémon will bury an entire town.

name: Bonsly

attacks.name: Teary Attack
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon do −30 damage.

flavor_text: From its eyes, it can expel excess moisture from its body. This liquid is similar in composition to human sweat.

name: Riolu

attacks.name: Fighting Fist
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: It has the peculiar power of being able to see emotions, such as joy and rage, in the form of waves.

name: Meloetta

attacks.name: Inspiring Dance
attacks.effect: During your next turn, attacks used by your [F] Pokémon do +30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: The melodies sung by Meloetta have the power to make Pokémon that hear them happy or sad.

name: Carkol
flavor_text: Due to the coal tar created inside it, the heap of coal on Carkol’s back never falls apart, even when the Pokémon rolls around at high speeds.

name: Kubfu

attacks.name: Training
attacks.effect: Take a [C] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: Kubfu trains hard to perfect its moves. The moves it masters will determine which form it takes when it evolves.

attacks.name: Poison Jab
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: Constant polishing makes the edge of the blade on its tail extremely sharp. It’s Zangoose’s archrival.

attacks.name: Ascension
attacks.effect: Put a random card from your deck that evolves from this Pokémon onto this Pokémon to evolve it.

flavor_text: To protect themselves from danger, they hide their true identities by transforming into people and Pokémon.

attacks.name: Evolution Jammer
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Pokémon from their hand to evolve their Pokémon.

flavor_text: It flashes the luminescent spots on its body to hypnotize its opponents, gaining total control over them.

name: Bisharp

attacks.name: Night Slash
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Bisharp mercilessly cuts its opponents to pieces with the sharp blades covering its body. It will do anything to win.

flavor_text: They live as a group, but when the time comes, one strong Meltan will absorb all the others and evolve.

name: Castform

attacks.name: Blow Through
attacks.effect: If a Stadium is in play, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavor_text: Its form changes depending on the weather. The rougher conditions get, the rougher Castform’s disposition!

attacks.name: Knock Away
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavor_text: The oil that seeps from its body is really smooth. For people troubled by bad skin, this oil is an effective treatment.

attacks.name: Terminating Tail
attacks.effect: Discard Grass[G] Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Volcanic Kaboom
attacks.effect: 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random. Do 160 damage to it.

ability.name: Ability: Frozen Flow
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Storm Blade
attacks.effect: Discard a [L] Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fighting Pulse
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 1 extra [F] Energy attached, this attack does 50 more damage.

attacks.name: Brutal Bash
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Benched [D] Pokémon.

attacks.name: Air Crash
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dragon Pulse
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your deck.

ability.effect: During Pokémon Checkup, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, do 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from each of your Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Frozen Flow
ability.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.effect: Discard a [L] Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Brutal Bash
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each of your Benched [D] Pokémon.

attacks.name: Air Crash
attacks.effect: Discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dragon Pulse
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your deck.

ability.name: Ability: Sand Slammer
ability.effect: During Pokémon Checkup, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, do 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Heartfelt Shine
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from each of your Pokémon.

name: Sobble

attacks.name: Find a Friend
attacks.effect: Put a random Pokémon from your deck into your hand.

flavor_text: It’s a very cautious Pokémon. When it has no choice but to battle, it hides itself before attacking.

attacks.name: Fighting Pulse
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 1 extra [F] Energy attached, this attack does 50 more damage.

name: Cottonee
flavor_text: It shoots cotton from its body to protect itself. If it gets caught up in hurricane-strength winds, it can get sent to the other side of the Earth.

name: Torchic
flavor_text: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Combusken
flavor_text: During a battle, the hot flame in its body increases. Its kicks have outstanding destructive power.

name: Blaziken

attacks.name: Blaze Kick
attacks.effect: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text: When facing a tough foe, it looses flames from its wrists. Its powerful legs let it jump clear over buildings.

name: Frillish
flavor_text: Legend has it that the residents of a sunken ancient city changed into these Pokémon.

name: Jellicent

ability.name: Ability: Bouncy Body
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, take a [W] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Whenever a full moon hangs in the night sky, schools of Jellicent gather near the surface of the sea, waiting for their prey to appear.

name: Onix

attacks.name: Dig
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text: It rapidly bores through the ground at 50 mph by squirming and twisting its massive, rugged body.

name: Zubat

attacks.name: Spin Turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text: Zubat live in caves, down where the sun’s light won’t reach. In the morning, they gather together to keep each other warm as they sleep.

name: Golbat
flavor_text: Its feet are tiny, but this Pokémon walks skillfully. It sneaks up on sleeping prey before sinking in its fangs and slurping up blood.

name: Crobat

attacks.name: Surprise Strike
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text: This Pokémon flaps its four wings skillfully. Crobat can fly through cramped caves without needing to slow down.

name: Grimer
flavor_text: Appears in filthy areas. It thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.

name: Muk

attacks.name: Gunk Shot
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavor_text: They love to gather in smelly areas where sludge accumulates, making the stench around them worse.

name: Absol

attacks.name: Ominous Claw
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent reveals their hand. Choose a Supporter card you find there and discard it.

flavor_text: Because of this Pokémon’s ability to detect danger, people mistook Absol as a bringer of doom.

name: Skrelp
flavor_text: This Pokémon is a poor swimmer. If it’s caught in a fierce storm, it will sometimes get washed far away and become unable to return to its home.

name: Steelix

attacks.name: Metal Defender
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon has no Weakness.

flavor_text: It is thought its body transformed as a result of iron accumulating internally from swallowing soil.

name: Chansey

attacks.name: Bind Wound
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

flavor_text: This kindly Pokémon lays highly nutritious eggs and shares them with injured Pokémon or people.

name: Blissey

ability.name: Ability: Happiness Supplement
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may remove a random Special Condition from your Active Pokémon.

flavor_text: Whenever a Blissey finds a weakened Pokémon, it will share its egg and offer its care until the other Pokémon is all better.

name: Porygon

attacks.name: Stiffen
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks.

flavor_text: State-of-the-art technology was used to create Porygon. It was the first artificial Pokémon to be created via computer programming.

name: Porygon2
flavor_text: This is a Porygon that was updated with special data. Porygon2 develops itself by learning about many different subjects all on its own.

name: Porygon-Z

attacks.name: Cyberjack
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Trainer card in your opponent's deck.

flavor_text: Porygon-Z had a program installed to allow it to move between dimensions, but the program also caused instability in Porygon-Z’s behavior.

attacks.name: Grass Knot
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy in your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost.

attacks.name: Mega Burning
attacks.effect: Discard a [R] Energy from this Pokémon. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

ability.name: Ability: Shifting Stream
ability.effect: Once during your turn, you may switch your Active [W] Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

ability.name: Ability: Electromagnetic Wall
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, whenever your opponent attaches an Energy from their Energy Zone to 1 of their Pokémon, do 20 damage to that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Quick Straight
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness.

attacks.name: Darkness Claw
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand. Choose a Supporter card you find there and discard it.

ability.name: Ability: Poison Point
ability.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, the Attacking Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Adamantine Rolling
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks and has no Weakness.

name: Celebi

ability.name: Ability: Time Recall
ability.effect: Each of your evolved Pokémon can use any attack from its previous Evolutions. (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack.)

flavor_text: This Pokémon traveled through time to come from the future. It bolsters grass and trees with its own strength, and it can heal wounds, too.

name: Bombirdier

ability.name: Ability: Villainous Delivery
ability.effect: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, your Active [D] Pokémon's Retreat Cost is 1 less.

flavor_text: Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bundle up food, which it carries back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises.
